enUs.title: Marathon Key Dates
enUs.subtitle: Mid-season begins July 21 and includes Vault Breaker, an experimental PVE mode on Cryo Archive.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
As we move deeper into the new season, we want to share some important dates coming up for Marathon. 

Mid-Season Begins July 21

First up, mid-season will start on July 21 and it will include the following updates.

Introducing Vault Breaker

Marathon's experimental PVE mode: Vault Breaker. Explore Cryo Archive as a crew, duo, or a solo player, taking on a progressively challenging series of vaults. Grow stronger across multiple matches with progression that’s unique to Vault Breaker, and push towards the final vault and the mysterious entity within. 

Vault Breaker requires a special Sponsored Kit to queue up, and any gear or items you find stay behind when you exfil. The exception to this is Vault Data. This new currency is found within vaults, and when extracted, can be exchanged for upgrades to your Vault Breaker Sponsored Kits as well as gear that can be used in other modes. This let’s you experience Cryo Archive without flooding the economy with low-risk, high-power Cryo loot.

Cradle Evolution System

Mid-season also brings the first iteration of the Cradle Evolution system. Upon maxing out your Cradle, you’ll now be able to reset back to zero to earn one additional maximum Energy point and unlock unique cosmetics, including multiple Runner shell styles. These cosmetics will be available later in the season, but if you unlock them ahead of time, you’ll automatically receive them once they’re available. With this change, Cradle progression speeds will also be increased. 

More to come!

On top of Vault Breaker and the Cradle Evolution system, we have other various other quality-of-life, tuning, and other changes, including the addition of player profile stats. We'll share more details when we get closer to release.

Season 3 Begins September 22

Looking further ahead, Season 3 will begin on September 22 and brings big changes to the early game experience, including a revamp of Perimeter to add major new areas, encounters, and gameplay. Season 3 also introduces a new Runner shell, new weapons and equipment, and lots of other content and surprises.

We’ll share more details about mid-season, including a full rundown on Vault Breakers, and our Season 3 plans as we get closer to their live dates.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》关键日期
zhChs.subtitle: 赛季中期更新将于7月22日开启，并带来低温档案室的实验性PVE模式“破库者”。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
在新赛季逐步展开之际，我们想与大家分享《失落星船：马拉松》接下来的一些重要日程。 

赛季中期更新将于7月22日开启

第一项重要安排是7月22日开启的赛季中期更新，届时将推出以下更新内容。

全新模式“破库者”

《失落星船：马拉松》的实验性PVE模式：破库者你可以组成完整团队、双人搭档，或独自深入低温档案室，攻克层层升级的保险库挑战。通过破库者专属进度系统，在多场对局中不断强化自身，并朝着终极保险库与其中的神秘存在迈进。 

参与破库者需要装备专属赞助包加入队列，而在疾行中获得的武器、装备和道具均无法携带撤离。不过，保险库数据不受此限制。这种全新货币可在保险库中获得，成功携带撤离后可用于升级你的破库者赞助包，也可兑换适用于其他模式的装备。借助这一设计，我们既能让玩家探索低温档案室，又能避免低风险获取高价值战利品的行为对游戏经济系统造成冲击。

摇篮进化系统

赛季中期还将带来摇篮进化系统的首个迭代版本。在摇篮升至满级后，你可以选择将其重置归零，换取额外的1点最大能量上限，并解锁独特装饰，其中包含多种疾行者外壳风格。这些装饰将在赛季后期上线，若你已提前完成解锁，即可在上线后自动获得。这一调整也会同步提高摇篮的进度提升效率。 

更多消息，敬请期待！

除了破库者和摇篮进化系统外，我们还将带来多项体验优化、调整，并新增玩家档案数据统计。我们将在临近上线时分享更多细节。

第3赛季将于9月23日开启

展望未来，我们将于9月23日开启第3赛季，并对前期游戏体验进行重大调整，其中包括全面重制外围区域，加入全新的关键区域、遭遇战与玩法内容。此外，第3赛季还会推出全新疾行者外壳、武器与装备，以及丰富的未公开内容与惊喜。

我们将在临近上线阶段分享更多关于赛季中期更新的细节，包括破库者的完整介绍以及第3赛季的整体规划。

enUs.title: Get to Know Marathon’s Bungie Rewards
enUs.subtitle: How to secure exclusive merchandise for your IRL vault.
enUs.author: Bungie Store Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
With the launch of Marathon’s second season, players around the world have been exploring the dark corners of Tau Ceti IV, defending themselves against threats seen and unseen, and with some skill and luck, successfully exfiling with loads of great loot.

Alongside the new features and challenges in the game, Season 2 also brings the launch of Bungie Rewards in Marathon. Bungie Rewards is a program where players can complete challenges in game to earn access to purchase exclusive digital and real-world merchandise that can’t be found anywhere else.

Here, we’ll take you through how the Bungie Rewards works, give you a look at what’s currently available in Marathon, and set you up for what’s yet to come.

Getting Started

First things first, check out the Marathon Bungie Rewards website. Here you’ll find the current listings of what’s available for Marathon players, as well as information on pricing, important earn-by and purchase-by dates, and the in-game challenges you need to complete to be eligible to earn or purchase Rewards items.

To claim any Rewards unlocked through gameplay, players need to meet the following requirements: 

  • Have your Marathon account linked with your Bungie.net profile.
  • Sign into Marathon.BungieStore.com (or Marathon.EU.Bungiestore.com for players in EU and UK) with the platform account that you play Marathon on. 

If you’re logged into Bungie.net with your Bungie.net profile (and have your Marathon account linked), you’ll be able to automatically see which items you are eligible for.

Shipping

Marathon Bungie Rewards are available to residents of the U.S., Canada, Australia, Japan, the E.U., and U.K (some restrictions may apply, see product pages for details). For orders to the E.U. and U.K., please visit marathon.eu.bungiestore.com. For more details on which countries we ship to (as well as additional information on delivery, shipping rates, and more) please see our Shipping Info page.

Runner Rewards

We recently added two more rewards to our Season 2 Bungie Rewards offerings for Marathon: the Compiler Effigy Pin and the Pinnacle Runner Pin. All four Rewards must be earned by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT and purchased by April 30, 2027 at 11:59PM PT, after which they will no longer be available.

Here’s the round-up of the Bungie Rewards available in Marathon Season 2:

Felini Plush

  • Successfully exfil as all available Runner shells (Assassin, Destroyer, Recon, Sentinel, Thief, Triage, and Vandal) and complete the Renaissance Runner Codex Challenge in Marathon by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT. Not available for shipping to Japan.

Notorious T-Shirt

  • Reach Season Level 100 and complete the Notorious Company Codex Challenge in Marathon by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT. 

Compiler Effigy Pin (NEW!)

  • Successfully exfil from Cryo Archive and complete the In From The Cold Codex Challenge in Marathon by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT. 

Pinnacle Runner Pin (NEW!)

  • Players who reach Pinnacle Rank III in Ranked and complete the Reaching The Peak Codex Challenge in Marathon by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT. Limited to 500 quantity.

To unlock access to Bungie Rewards offers in Marathon, players must first claim the related Codex Challenge in game.

You can expect more Bungie Rewards in future seasons, including a new set of Rewards for Season 3. We hope you enjoy these rewards and we look forward to sharing what’s coming up next. For more, follow us on socials on Twitter and Instagram, and as always, keep an eye on the Marathon Bungie Rewards website for the latest. Until then, see you on Tau Ceti IV!

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.1.0.3
enUs.subtitle: The one about Cryo Archive Sponsored Kits.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Item Economy

  • Fixed an issue where barter options were not populating for the Compiler Ganglion.
  • Swapped Arachne and Sekiguchi VIP upgrade costs so Synapse Cubes can be used for certain upgrades instead of the previous prestige salvage.
  • Adjusted MIDA’s final Capstone to now grant ANTI_VIRUS.EXE, providing 2 minutes of Anti-Virus protection at the beginning of a run. Previously was providing Cardio Kick that did not stack with the Dexterity track perk.

Combat

Weapons

KKV-9SD

  • Fixed an issue where the KKV-9SD would cease firing while holding down the trigger on certain controllers.

User Interface and Experience

  • Fixed an issue where stickers were not correctly showing up on the Retro_Remix WSTR Shotgun style.

Zones

Perimeter

  • Fixed an issue where Solo queue was selectable on Ranked.
    • Developer Note: The intention for players queueing into Ranked is the same as Season 1, which is that crews of all sizes enter the same match. It was not intended that players could select Solo queue in Ranked, and this did not function as players expected.

Dire Marsh (Night)

  • Fixed an issue that was preventing Reverbs from spawning consistently on standard Night Marsh.

Cryo Archive

  • Fixed an issue where the Cryo Archive sponsored kit could not be taken into Cryo Archive.

Stability

  • Fixed a few server stability issues.
enUs.bodyText: Item Economy Fixed an issue where barter options were not populating for the Compiler Ganglion. Swapped Arachne and Sekiguchi VIP upgrade costs so Synapse Cubes can be used for certain upgrades instead of the previous prestige salvage. Adjusted MIDA’s final Capstone to now grant ANTI_VIRUS.EXE, providing 2 minutes of Anti-Virus protection at the beginning of a run. Previously was providing Cardio Kick that did not stack with the Dexterity track perk. Combat Weapons KKV-9SD Fixed an issue where the KKV-9SD would cease firing while holding down the trigger on certain controllers. User Interface and Experience Fixed an issue where stickers were not correctly showing up on the Retro_Remix WSTR Shotgun style. Zones Perimeter Fixed an issue where Solo queue was selectable on Ranked. Developer Note: The intention for players queueing into Ranked is the same as Season 1, which is that crews of all sizes enter the same match. It was not intended that players could select Solo queue in Ranked, and this did not function as players expected. Dire Marsh (Night) Fixed an issue that was preventing Reverbs from spawning consistently on standard Night Marsh. Cryo Archive Fixed an issue where the Cryo Archive sponsored kit could not be taken into Cryo Archive. Stability Fixed a few server stability issues.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.1.0.3
zhChs.subtitle: 关于低温档案室赞助包。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
物品经济

  • 修复了编译者神经节的易物选项无法显示的问题。
  • 替换了阿拉克尼和关口VIP升级所需的资源，现可使用突触立方进行某些升级，而无需像以前使用尊享回收资源。
  • 调整了米达的最终巅峰，现可提供杀_毒.EXE，在疾行开始时提供2分钟的杀毒保护。之前提供的心肺复苏无法与灵巧特性叠加。

战斗

武器

KKV-9SD

  • 修复了在某些控制器上按住扳机时KKV-9SD会停止射击的问题。

用户界面和体验

  • 修复了复古混音WSTR霰弹枪风格的贴纸显示不正确的问题。

区域

外围区域

  • 修复了排名模式中可以选择单排的问题。
    • 开发者提示：玩家进入排名模式的初衷与第1赛季相同，即所有规模的团队都将进入同样的比赛。让玩家在排名模式中选择单排并非我们本意，而这一设定也未能达到玩家预期。

恐怖沼泽（夜间）

  • 修复了标准夜间沼泽无法稳定生成余响的问题。

低温档案室

  • 修复了低温档案室赞助包无法带入低温档案室的问题。

稳定性

  • 修复了一些服务器稳定性问题。
zhChs.bodyText: 物品经济 修复了编译者神经节的易物选项无法显示的问题。 替换了阿拉克尼和关口VIP升级所需的资源，现可使用突触立方进行某些升级，而无需像以前使用尊享回收资源。 调整了米达的最终巅峰，现可提供杀_毒.EXE，在疾行开始时提供2分钟的杀毒保护。之前提供的心肺复苏无法与灵巧特性叠加。 战斗 武器 KKV-9SD 修复了在某些控制器上按住扳机时KKV-9SD会停止射击的问题。 用户界面和体验 修复了复古混音WSTR霰弹枪风格的贴纸显示不正确的问题。 区域 外围区域 修复了排名模式中可以选择单排的问题。 开发者提示： 玩家进入排名模式的初衷与第1赛季相同，即所有规模的团队都将进入同样的比赛。让玩家在排名模式中选择单排并非我们本意，而这一设定也未能达到玩家预期。 恐怖沼泽（夜间） 修复了标准夜间沼泽无法稳定生成余响的问题。 低温档案室 修复了低温档案室赞助包无法带入低温档案室的问题。 稳定性 修复了一些服务器稳定性问题。

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.1.0.2
enUs.subtitle: The one about the C.A.R.R.I protocol returning.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
General

  • ONI is now announcing the return of C.A.R.R.I., the CyberAcme Runner Reinforcement Initiative. This Initiative returns with the following changes and additions:
    • CyberAcme Commendations: A new material that is awarded to Runners who promote C.A.R.R.I. values
      • For Crews: Earn commendations (+4) for each contract objective you assist your crewmate in completing
      • For Solos (Non-Rook): Earn commendations (+6) for each contract objective you complete. Bonus commendations (+5) can be earned if you exfil with other players.
      • For Rooks: Earn commendations (+5) for successful exfils. Bonus commendations (+5) can be earned if you exfil with other players.
      • All commendation rewards will be sent directly to your vault after completing any of the actions listed above
    • C.A.R.R.I. Armory: Exchange commendations for special offers in CyberAcme’s armory.
      • Weapon Showcase: Each week, C.A.R.R.I. will feature a new weapon. An enhanced weapon will be given for free, but runners will have the opportunity to kit up their own and even buy a unique, deluxe variant.
      • Reputation Packs: Can only be bought from the C.A.R.R.I. Armory. Purchasing one will automatically grant reputation for the associated faction.
      • Special Offers: In addition, C.A.R.R.I. will provide an assortment of useful items and equipment. Keep an eye on offers as the season progresses.
    • Fixed an issue where the previously selected zone would reset after each run.
    • Fixed an issue where your crew fill settings did not persist between runs.
    • Fixed an issue where Rooks were able to queue as a Duo.
    • Fixed an issue that prevented Crew members from readying up after swapping from Trios to Duos.
    • Fixed an issue where a Duo may be unable to matchmake if the leader changes the activity to a non-Duos zone.
    • Fixed an issue where a crew error would display if Crew-fill was enabled while on Duos.

Item Economy

  • Added weekly login rewards beneath the "today's sponsors” section in the Armory.
  • Slightly reduced loot quality and increased item pool in Cert containers in Night Marsh.
  • Slightly reduced Prestige drops from pinnacle containers found in Prestige locked rooms.
  • Fixed an issue where combatant reinforcements in Night Marsh were able to roll more loot than intended over the course of the run.
  • Minor rebalancing of Folio and Trunk rewards across item types.
  • Fixed an issue where UESC Sponsored Kits could spawn with Cryo keys.

Cradle

  • Reduced XP value of “Bluenique” (deluxe unique weapons) from 1,500 to 700.
  • Reduces XP value of Superior and Prestige weapon mods:
    • Superior: 2,500 to 1,000
    • Prestige: 7,500 to 3,750

Combat

Weapons

  • Fixed an issue where Folding Stocks stat bonuses were reversed based on their configuration.

Bully SMG

  • Fixed an issue with Bully Twitch sub drop style’s magazine not matching the promotional artwork.

BR33 Volley Rifle

  • Fixed an issue where the Lockout Muzzle Break Prestige mod was not suppressing the weapon audio for the user. (Audio was properly suppressed for other Runners.)

V22 Volt Thrower

  • Fixed an issue where firing the V22 Volt Thrower could be inaudible to crewmates and other Runners.

User Interface and Experience

  • Errors in the Ready Up screen will now more clearly display which crewmate has an error. Hovering over the error will display a tooltip explaining how to resolve it. Crew errors (such as too many/not enough Runners) will display only near the ready button.
  • Fixed an issue where some weapon mod tooltips would flash or not show when comparing with another compatible mod.

Runners

Thief

  • Fixed an issue where Thief could say the wrong voice lines in the Runner select or when damaged in-run while equipped with the Kasha Yokai shell style.

Contracts

  • Fixed an issue where the wrong art was being displayed on the “Story & Rewards” side of certain limited contracts.

CyberAcme

  • Fixed an issue that could prevent some limited Cryo contracts from appearing correctly after weekly reset.

NuCaloric

  • Fixed an issue with Capstone 2 where patch kits and shield charges were not being awarded upon completing standard contracts.
  • Fixed an issue that prevented anti-virus packs from being available in the Armory, even after unlocking them in the Faction upgrades.

Codex

  • Fixed an issue with entry “One man’s treasure” where it would complete without needing to convert a Prestige rarity item in the Cradle.
  • Updated tooltip description for Bungie Reward entries to indicate that rewards are available for purchase after claiming.
  • Fixed an issue where some “Early Bird VIP” entries from Season 1 were not unlocking correctly in Season 2.

Zones

Dire Marsh (Day and Night)

  • Fixed an issue that allowed Runners to loot certain containers in the Bioresearch locked room without the proper key.
  • Fixed an issue where a non-final exfil's timer could be extended beyond the final exfil's timer, resulting in Runners dying to the timer even while standing in an exfil.
  • Fixed an issue causing a few containers to float on top of Greenhouse.

Dire Marsh (Night)

  • Fixed an issue in Upper Complex where a door hack device was hidden behind a cabinet.
  • Fixed an issue where other Runners' flashlights wouldn't appear if they were turned on before entering your sight range.

Dire Marsh (Day)

  • Fixed an issue where the second wave of exfils was failing to spawn.
enUs.bodyText: General ONI is now announcing the return of C.A.R.R.I., the CyberAcme Runner Reinforcement Initiative. This Initiative returns with the following changes and additions: CyberAcme Commendations: A new material that is awarded to Runners who promote C.A.R.R.I. values For Crews: Earn commendations (+4) for each contract objective you assist your crewmate in completing For Solos (Non-Rook): Earn commendations (+6) for each contract objective you complete. Bonus commendations (+5) can be earned if you exfil with other players. For Rooks: Earn commendations (+5) for successful exfils. Bonus commendations (+5) can be earned if you exfil with other players. All commendation rewards will be sent directly to your vault after completing any of the actions listed above C.A.R.R.I. Armory: Exchange commendations for special offers in CyberAcme’s armory. Weapon Showcase: Each week, C.A.R.R.I. will feature a new weapon. An enhanced weapon will be given for free, but runners will have the opportunity to kit up their own and even buy a unique, deluxe variant. Reputation Packs: Can only be bought from the C.A.R.R.I. Armory. Purchasing one will automatically grant reputation for the associated faction. Special Offers: In addition, C.A.R.R.I. will provide an assortment of useful items and equipment. Keep an eye on offers as the season progresses. Fixed an issue where the previously selected zone would reset after each run. Fixed an issue where your crew fill settings did not persist between runs. Fixed an issue where Rooks were able to queue as a Duo. Fixed an issue that prevented Crew members from readying up after swapping from Trios to Duos. Fixed an issue where a Duo may be unable to matchmake if the leader changes the activity to a non-Duos zone. Fixed an issue where a crew error would display if Crew-fill was enabled while on Duos. Item Economy Added weekly login rewards beneath the "today's sponsors” section in the Armory. Slightly reduced loot quality and increased item pool in Cert containers in Night Marsh. Slightly reduced Prestige drops from pinnacle containers found in Prestige locked rooms. Fixed an issue where combatant reinforcements in Night Marsh were able to roll more loot than intended over the course of the run. Minor rebalancing of Folio and Trunk rewards across item types. Fixed an issue where UESC Sponsored Kits could spawn with Cryo keys. Cradle Reduced XP value of “Bluenique” (deluxe unique weapons) from 1,500 to 700. Reduces XP value of Superior and Prestige weapon mods: Superior: 2,500 to 1,000 Prestige: 7,500 to 3,750 Combat Weapons Fixed an issue where Folding Stocks stat bonuses were reversed based on their configuration. Bully SMG Fixed an issue with Bully Twitch sub drop style’s magazine not matching the promotional artwork. BR33 Volley Rifle Fixed an issue where the Lockout Muzzle Break Prestige mod was not suppressing the weapon audio for the user. (Audio was properly suppressed for other Runners.) V22 Volt Thrower Fixed an issue where firing the V22 Volt Thrower could be inaudible to crewmates and other Runners. User Interface and Experience Errors in the Ready Up screen will now more clearly display which crewmate has an error. Hovering over the error will display a tooltip explaining how to resolve it. Crew errors (such as too many/not enough Runners) will display only near the ready button. Fixed an issue where some weapon mod tooltips would flash or not show when comparing with another compatible mod. Runners Thief Fixed an issue where Thief could say the wrong voice lines in the Runner select or when damaged in-run while equipped with the Kasha Yokai shell style. Contracts Fixed an issue where the wrong art was being displayed on the “Story & Rewards” side of certain limited contracts. CyberAcme Fixed an issue that could prevent some limited Cryo contracts from appearing correctly after weekly reset. NuCaloric Fixed an issue with Capstone 2 where patch kits and shield charges were not being awarded upon completing standard contracts. Fixed an issue that prevented anti-virus packs from being available in the Armory, even after unlocking them in the Faction upgrades. Codex Fixed an issue with entry “One man’s treasure” where it would complete without needing to convert a Prestige rarity item in the Cradle. Updated tooltip description for Bungie Reward entries to indicate that rewards are available for purchase after claiming. Fixed an issue where some “Early Bird VIP” entries from Season 1 were not unlocking correctly in Season 2. Zones Dire Marsh (Day and Night) Fixed an issue that allowed Runners to loot certain containers in the Bioresearch locked room without the proper key. Fixed an issue where a non-final exfil's timer could be extended beyond the final exfil's timer, resulting in Runners dying to the timer even while standing in an exfil. Fixed an issue causing a few containers to float on top of Greenhouse. Dire Marsh (Night) Fixed an issue in Upper Complex where a door hack device was hidden behind a cabinet. Fixed an issue where other Runners' flashlights wouldn't appear if they were turned on before entering your sight range. Dire Marsh (Day) Fixed an issue where the second wave of exfils was failing to spawn.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.1.0.2
zhChs.subtitle: 关于C.A.R.R.I.协议回归。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
综合

  • ONI宣布赛博艾克米疾行者强化计划（C.A.R.R.I.）现已回归。此计划本次回归带来了改动和新增内容：
    • 赛博艾克米嘉奖：一种奖励给践行C.A.R.R.I.价值观的疾行者的全新材料
      • 对于团队：辅助队友完成每个合约目标，即可获得嘉奖(+4)
      • 对于单人（非鲁克）：完成每个合约目标，即可获得嘉奖(+6)。与其他玩家一同撤离可获得额外嘉奖(+5)。
      • 对于鲁克：成功撤离可获得嘉奖(+5)。与其他玩家一同撤离可获得额外嘉奖(+5)。
      • 完成上述任何操作后，所有嘉奖奖励将直接发送至你的保险库
    • C.A.R.R.I.军械库：在赛博艾克米军械库中兑换嘉奖，获取特殊优惠。
      • 武器展示：C.A.R.R.I.每周都会推出一种新武器。玩家将免费获得一件强化武器，但疾行者也有机会自行装备武器，甚至可以购买独特的豪华版本。
      • 声望包：只能在C.A.R.R.I.军械库购买。购买一个声望包即可自动提升对应阵营的声望。
      • 特别优惠：此外，C.A.R.R.I.还将提供各种有用物品和装备。随着赛季的进行，请密切关注优惠活动。
    • 修复了每次疾行结束后，之前选择的区域都会重置的问题。
    • 修复了团队补位设置无法在疾行之间保存的问题。
    • 修复了鲁克可以双人队列进行排队的问题。
    • 修复了从三人切换至双人后，队员无法准备就绪的问题。
    • 修复了如果队长将活动区域更改为非双人区域，则双人组可能无法匹配的问题。
    • 修复了在双人模式下启用团队补位时，会显示团队错误的问题。

物品经济

  • 在军械库的“今日赞助商”部分下方添加了每周登录奖励。
  • 小幅降低了夜间沼泽中认证容器的战利品品质，并增加了物品种类。
  • 小幅降低了尊享上锁房间中至臻容器的尊享掉落。
  • 修复了夜间沼泽中战斗人员增援在疾行过程中掉落的战利品数量超出预期的问题。
  • 对不同物品类型的收纳箱和杂物箱奖励进行了微调。
  • 修复了UESC赞助包可能生成低温钥匙的问题。

摇篮

  • 将豪华独特武器的经验值从1500降低至700。
  • 降低了卓越和尊享武器模组的经验值：
    • 卓越：2500至1000
    • 尊享：7500至3750

战斗

武器

  • 修复了折叠枪托的属性加成会根据其配置反转的问题。

恶霸冲锋枪

  • 修复了恶霸Twitch订阅掉落风格弹匣与宣传图不符的问题。

BR33连发步枪

  • 修复了锁定式枪口制退器尊享模组无法抑制使用者的武器音效的问题。（其他疾行者的音频已正确抑制。）

V22伏特放射器

  • 修复了V22伏特放射器射击时，队友和其他疾行者可能听不到声音的问题。

用户界面和体验

  • 准备界面中的错误现可更清晰地显示是哪位队员出现错误。将鼠标悬停在错误上会提示如何解决该错误。团队错误（例如疾行者过多/过少）只会显示在准备按钮附近。
  • 修复了某些武器模组提示在与其他兼容模组进行比较时会闪烁或不显示的问题。

疾行者

盗贼

  • 修复了在疾行者选择界面或装备火之车妖怪外壳风格时，盗贼在疾行中受到伤害可能会说出错误语音的问题。

合约

  • 修复了某些限定合约的“剧情和奖励”页面显示错误图片的问题。

赛博艾克米

  • 修复了每周重置后部分限定低温合约可能无法正确显示的问题。

纽卡洛里

  • 修复了巅峰2中完成标准合约后无法获得修补包和护盾电池的问题。
  • 修复了即使在阵营升级中解锁了杀毒包，也无法在军械库中找到的问题。

百科

  • 修复了“彼之蜜糖”条目无需在摇篮中转换尊享稀有度物品即可完成的问题。
  • 更新了Bungie奖励条目提示描述，说明奖励领取后即可购买。
  • 修复了第1赛季的部分“早鸟VIP”条目在第2赛季无法正确解锁的问题。

区域

恐怖沼泽（白天和夜间）

  • 修复了疾行者无需正确钥匙即可获取生物研究所上锁房间某些容器的问题。
  • 修复了非最终撤离点的计时器可能比最终撤离点的计时器更长，疾行者即使站在撤离点内，也会因计时器超时而死亡的问题。
  • 修复了温室上方部分容器漂浮的问题。

恐怖沼泽（夜间）

  • 修复了上层设施中门禁骇入装置隐藏在橱柜后面的问题。
  • 修复了其他疾行者在进入你的视野范围之前打开手电筒，而手电筒不会显示的问题。

恐怖沼泽（白天）

  • 修复了第二波撤离点无法生成的问题。

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.1.0.1
enUs.subtitle: The one about Sentinel Mastery Entries
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Item Economy

  • Slightly reduced the chance for Prestige Shield to appear in all sources.
  • Slightly reduced the chance for Prestige Weapon Mods to appear in all sources.
  • Fixed various issues where Schemas granted more or fewer Credits than their listed value upon exfil.

Combat

Weapons

  • Fixed an issue where dragging a weapon mod from one equipped weapon to another could incorrectly show the mod as incompatible, even when it was valid for both weapons.
  • Fixed an issue with the D54 Battle Pistol Prestige mod perk “Daredevil Stock” where spam clicking could extend the super burst for the full duration of the magazine.

Chips

  • Fixed an issue where the Aftershock perk was expiring too quickly after taking explosive damage.

User Interface and Experience

  • Fixed an issue where Push-to-Talk would fail while in the prepare screen.
  • Updated item tooltip to not include certain actions while the multi-select is active in lobby.
  • Added missing Zone Status Effect “it’s Dark” on the Night Marsh preview.
  • Fixed an issue with the Cryo Maintenance (Cryo Archive 01) key description incorrectly listing the unlock steps.
  • Fixed an issue that caused ghosting/artificating in the Lobby while using AMD FSR with the resolution scaling set to quality or lower.
  • Fixed an issue where turning on Streamer Mode mid-run would display inconsistent names on the HUD.
  • Fixed an issue where the Season 2 Premium Rewards Pass purchase screen would display a LUX icon instead of a Rewards Pass Voucher icon.
  • Fixed an issue where Rewards Pass items couldn’t be selected when navigating from the “Vox Nocturna” Knife Style to Rewards Pass using the source link.

Factions

Sekiguchi Genetics

  • Fixed an issue where Capstone 6 could not be claimed after unlocking all the required upgrades.

Contracts

  • Fixed an issue where claiming rewards from certain Contracts could cause a duplicate reward notification popup.

  • Fixed an issue where returning Runners, when unlocking Cryo Archive could experience a ‘Contracts Depleted’ error. 

CyberAcme

  • Fixed an issue where the Standard contract “CyAc Guidance: Complex Control” displayed an Enhanced (green) Hardline PR instead of a Deluxe (blue) version in the reward preview.

MIDA

  • Fixed an issue in Expose/Extinguish where the Gantry’s voice could fail to play after completing the terminal hacking step.

Codex

  • Fixed an issue with the “Nightstalker > Spacebucks” entry, only counting singular runs as progress instead of Certs spent.
  • Fixed an issue where the Anomalous Husk entry displayed placeholder text instead of its proper name.
  • Fixed an issue where backing out of the inspect screen for Bungie Rewards items would result in an empty menu.

Sentinel

  • Fixed an issue where “Information Economy” could not be completed after meeting the requirements.
  • Increased the time allowed to defeat a target after an interception for the “Riposte” challenge.

Armory

  • Fixed a tooltip that would advise purchasing ammo and healing items that weren’t present.
  • Fixed an issue where the Traxus Prestige mod “Triple Barrel” showed the wrong cost, requiring 3 Reflex Coils instead of 1 Synapse Cube.
  • Fixed an issue that prevented the Night Marsh Sponsored Kit from appearing in the Armory if under Runner Level 3.
  • Fixed an issue where the NuCaloric Armored Barter was showing the incorrect upgrade icon.
  • Fixed an issue where the Enhanced Duck and Cover Schema did not provide an Armory offer after exfil.

Zones

Dire Marsh (Night)

  • Fixed an issue that prevented some landmarks from showing up on the mini-map.
  • Fixed an issue in Maintenance where certain Cert containers could be opened without spending any Certs.

Stability

  • Fixed several stability issues that could occur when selecting nodes in the faction upgrades screens.

Localization

  • Fixed various spelling and grammar issues for the multi-select tooltips.
  • Fixed an issue where Thief’s voice over lines could duplicate while using the Russian language.

Fixed various issues where Schemas granted more or fewer Credits than their listed value upon exfil. Combat Weapons Fixed an issue where dragging a weapon mod from one equipped weapon to another could incorrectly show the mod as incompatible, even when it was valid for both weapons. Fixed an issue with the D54 Battle Pistol Prestige mod perk “Daredevil Stock” where spam clicking could extend the super burst for the full duration of the magazine. Chips Fixed an issue where the Aftershock perk was expiring too quickly after taking explosive damage. User Interface and Experience Fixed an issue where Push-to-Talk would fail while in the prepare screen. Updated item tooltip to not include certain actions while the multi-select is active in lobby. Added missing Zone Status Effect “it’s Dark” on the Night Marsh preview. Fixed an issue with the Cryo Maintenance (Cryo Archive 01) key description incorrectly listing the unlock steps. Fixed an issue that caused ghosting/artificating in the Lobby while using AMD FSR with the resolution scaling set to quality or lower. Fixed an issue where turning on Streamer Mode mid-run would display inconsistent names on the HUD. Fixed an issue where the Season 2 Premium Rewards Pass purchase screen would display a LUX icon instead of a Rewards Pass Voucher icon. Fixed an issue where Rewards Pass items couldn’t be selected when navigating from the “Vox Nocturna” Knife Style to Rewards Pass using the source link. Factions Sekiguchi Genetics Fixed an issue where Capstone 6 could not be claimed after unlocking all the required upgrades. Contracts Fixed an issue where claiming rewards from certain Contracts could cause a duplicate reward notification popup. Fixed an issue where returning Runners, when unlocking Cryo Archive could experience a ‘Contracts Depleted’ error. CyberAcme Fixed an issue where the Standard contract “CyAc Guidance: Complex Control” displayed an Enhanced (green) Hardline PR instead of a Deluxe (blue) version in the reward preview. MIDA Fixed an issue in Expose/Extinguish where the Gantry’s voice could fail to play after completing the terminal hacking step. Codex Fixed an issue with the “Nightstalker > Spacebucks” entry, only counting singular runs as progress instead of Certs spent. Fixed an issue where the Anomalous Husk entry displayed placeholder text instead of its proper name. Fixed an issue where backing out of the inspect screen for Bungie Rewards items would result in an empty menu. Sentinel Fixed an issue where “Information Economy” could not be completed after meeting the requirements. Increased the time allowed to defeat a target after an interception for the “Riposte” challenge. Armory Fixed a tooltip that would advise purchasing ammo and healing items that weren’t present. Fixed an issue where the Traxus Prestige mod “Triple Barrel” showed the wrong cost, requiring 3 Reflex Coils instead of 1 Synapse Cube. Fixed an issue that prevented the Night Marsh Sponsored Kit from appearing in the Armory if under Runner Level 3. Fixed an issue where the NuCaloric Armored Barter was showing the incorrect upgrade icon. Fixed an issue where the Enhanced Duck and Cover Schema did not provide an Armory offer after exfil. Zones Dire Marsh (Night) Fixed an issue that prevented some landmarks from showing up on the mini-map. Fixed an issue in Maintenance where certain Cert containers could be opened without spending any Certs. Stability Fixed several stability issues that could occur when selecting nodes in the faction upgrades screens. Localization Fixed various spelling and grammar issues for the multi-select tooltips. Fixed an issue where Thief’s voice over lines could duplicate while using the Russian language.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.1.0.1
zhChs.subtitle: 关于哨兵精通条目
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
物品经济

  • 小幅降低了尊享护盾在所有途径掉落的概率。
  • 小幅降低了尊享武器模组在所有途径掉落的概率。
  • 修复了在撤离时，方案奖励的信用点与标注数值不匹配的多个问题。

战斗

武器

  • 修复了在将武器模组从一件已装备武器拖拽到另一件时，即使两件武器都支持该模组，仍显示模组不兼容的问题。
  • 修复了D54战斗手枪尊享模组特性“亡命者枪托”中，通过频繁点击可使超级爆发持续到整个弹匣打空的问题。

芯片

  • 修复了余震特性在受到爆炸伤害后过快失效的问题。

用户界面和体验

  • 修复了准备界面中按键通话失效的问题。
  • 更新了物品提示，现在当大厅启用多选时，不再显示部分操作选项。
  • 为夜间沼泽预览新增了缺失的区域状态效果“黑暗降临”。
  • 修复了低温维护室（低温档案室1）钥匙描述中错误标注开锁步骤的问题。
  • 修复了在使用AMD FSR且分辨率缩放设为“质量”或更低时，大厅出现重影/视觉异常的问题。
  • 修复了在疾行中途开启主播模式时，HUD显示名称不一致的问题。
  • 修复了第2赛季高级奖励通票购买界面错误显示为奢享币图标，而非奖励通票兑换券图标的问题。
  • 修复了通过来源链接从“夜幕之声”匕首风格进入奖励通票时，无法选择奖励通票物品的问题。

阵营

关口基因

  • 修复了在解锁所有必要升级后仍无法领取巅峰6的问题。

合约

  • 修复了在领取部分合约奖励时弹出重复奖励通知的问题。

  • 修复了回归玩家解锁低温档案室后，可能出现“合约已耗尽”错误的问题。 

赛博艾克米

  • 修复了标准合约“赛博艾克米指引：综合设施控制区”中的奖励预览错误显示为强化（绿色）铁律精密步枪，而非豪华（蓝色）的问题。

米达

  • 修复了在“曝光/扑灭”中，完成终端骇入步骤后甘特里的语音可能无法播放的问题。

百科

  • 修复了“夜行猎手 > 太空币”条目仅按单次疾行，而未按消耗认证计算进度的问题。
  • 修复了“异常巨壳”条目错误显示为占位文本，而非正式名称的问题。
  • 修复了在查看Bungie奖励物品检视界面后返回时，菜单变为空白的问题。

哨兵

  • 修复了在满足条件后仍无法完成“信息经济”的问题。
  • 延长了“一弹还一弹”挑战中，拦截完成后击败目标的时间限制。

军械库

  • 修复了提示错误建议购买未提供的弹药和治疗物品的问题。
  • 修复了特莱克斯尊享模组“三联枪管”的费用错误显示为3个反射线圈，而非1个突触立方的问题。
  • 修复了疾行者等级低于3时，夜间沼泽赞助包无法在军械库显示的问题。
  • 修复了纽卡洛里护甲易物升级图标显示不正确的问题。
  • 修复了在撤离后，强化卧倒掩护方案未提供军械库物品的问题。

区域

恐怖沼泽（夜间）

  • 修复了部分地标无法在小地图上显示的问题。
  • 修复了维护部中部分认证容器无需消耗认证即可开启的问题。

稳定性

  • 修复了在阵营升级界面选择节点时可能出现的几个稳定性问题。

本地化

  • 修复了多选提示中的多处错别字和语法错误。
  • 修复了设置为俄语时，盗贼的语音台词可能出现重复的问题。

enUs.title: Season 2 is Now Live
enUs.subtitle: Prepare to go bump in the night.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
It’s time to turn out the lights.

Today marks the start of a brand new season for Marathon. Once you login, you’ll get fresh chance to prove your ability to survive Dire Marsh (Night), new threats to take down, new weapons to battle the aforementioned threats, and much more.

Want to try out the new changes with some friends? Curious about what Season 2 has to offer? Play the full game now until June 9 during our Open Play Week! You can try out Marathon without any purchase required* all week, and any progress you make will carry over to Season 2 if you purchase a copy of Marathon after.

Before you embark on your first runs, let’s make sure you’ve got all the details you might need to properly navigate Tau Ceti IV.

Here’s a handy list to get you started:

  • Hear from the dev team in our Season 2 Dev Insights

Get the full scoop in the reveal article

  • Brush up on seasonal resets
  • Enjoy the Season 2 Cinematic Trailer
  • Prepare for Season 2’s sandbox with our Combat Tuning Preview
  • Check out the fine details in the patch notes

 

Season 2, fresh for you

Season 2’s arrival brings with it some new ways for you to experience Tau Ceti IV:

  • Night Marsh: A pitch black version of Dire Marsh, with new threats lurking
  • Sentinel: Find new ways to control the battlefield with this defensive Runner shell
  • The Cradle: Invest in your Runner shell over the course of the season to customize your stats and perks for your playstyle
  • New weapons: Plow through your enemies with the new KKV-9SD and D54 Battle Pistol
  • New enemies: [REDACTED]

And in addition to the above, there’s a bevy of new combat sandbox updates, a bunch of quality-of-life changes, faster progression, and a new experimental mode to kick off the season. Check out the links above to learn more.

New experimental queue: Sponsored Survival

Season 2 brings a new experimental mode, which is planned to run from June 2 to June 9. We mentioned we’re exploring new survival experiences for different moods, like if you want to go full sweat or would rather lean back and chill. Sponsored Survival falls somewhere in between and is a more PVP-lite and low risk way to play Marathon.

In Sponsored Survival...

  • Only one team will infil onto Night Marsh—if that’s you, you know you’re the only crew on the map. But that doesn’t mean you’re alone...
  • After some period of time, solo Rook players will backfill onto the map.
  • Your only ticket out alive is from the final exfil, which spawns after 18 minutes.
  • Once you get to the final exfil, the decision is yours: Will you accept a truce and leave together, or turn your weapons on each other?

In Sponsored Survival, crews must bring Sponsored Kits to queue up—and Rooks come in naked—which makes this a low-stakes way to check out the new map, snag some loot, and try to survive the night.

You can check out the full details here.

Cryo, Ranked, and More Experimental Queues – oh my!

There’s still plenty more coming your way in Season 2. Ranked is getting ready to join the rotation once more, Cryo Archive is on deck, and at least one more experimental queue is coming this season.

Here are a few other things to keep on your radar in Season 2:

  • Cryo Archive returns on Thursday, June 11 with updated contracts. And remember, any Subroutines you collected in Season 1 carry forward into Season 2.
  • Ranked arrives on Sunday, June 14 with new rewards and progression changes to keep the climb moving. Read more here.
  • Another experimental queue is planned for the latter half of the season and will be an experimental PVE mode. You can expect more experiments later too, including perhaps a PVP focused mode. Learn more about our future plans here.

Announcing New Bungie Rewards

Season 2 also brings Bungie Rewards back into the mix, with the first rewards available now and more arriving a little later in Season 2.

Available Now:

  • Bungie Rewards [1.20] Felini Plush
    • Successfully exfil as all available Runner shells (Assassin, Destroyer, Recon, Sentinel, Thief, Triage, and Vandal) and claim the Renaissance Runner Codex Challenge in Marathon by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT.
  • Bungie Rewards [1.20] Notorious T-Shirt
    • Reach Season Level 100 and claim the Notorious Company Codex Challenge in Marathon by March 31, 2027 at 9:59AM PT.

Note that these challenges are retroactive—your accomplishments in Season 1 apply here—and to unlock access to Bungie Rewards offers, you must first claim the related Codex Challenge. For more, check out marathon.bungiestore.com. 

Carve a new path through Tau Ceti IV

The lights are down, the loot is fresh, the WEAVEworms are ready for action. See what’s waiting for you in the dark, chase down new rewards, and keep one eye on the horizon. We’re just getting started.

We’ll see you out there. (Just don’t expect a warning shot first.)

*Gameplay requires internet access (sold separately)

zhChs.title: 第2赛季现已上线
zhChs.subtitle: 准备好在黑夜中迎接未知的恐怖。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
是时候熄灯准备迎接黑暗了。

今天，《失落星船：马拉松》全新赛季正式开启。登录游戏后，新的赛季将带来新的机会，在恐怖沼泽（夜间）中存活下来，证明你的能力吧。用全新的武器迎接战斗，击败全新威胁，还有更多丰富内容正等待着你。

想和朋友一起体验这些全新改动吗？想知道第2赛季究竟会有什么新内容吗？在本次公开试玩周，你可以畅玩完整游戏内容，活动持续至6月10日！整个公开试玩周期间，你无需购买即可体验《失落星船：马拉松》*。如果后续购买了《失落星船：马拉松》，你在试玩周期间取得的游玩进度都将继承至第2赛季。

在你开启首次疾行之前，让我们先确保你已掌握在天仓五IV上顺利行动所需的一切信息。

以下是一份实用指南，帮助你快速上手：

  • 通过我们的第2赛季开发者见解，聆听开发团队的分享
  • 从揭晓博文中获得更多详情
  • 查看赛季重置说明
  • 欣赏第2赛季过场动画预告片
  • 通过我们的战斗调整预览提前了解第2赛季沙盒
  • 详细改动请参看更新文档

第2赛季，为你焕然一新

随着第2赛季到来，你可以用全新的方式探索天仓五IV：

  • 夜间沼泽：漆黑一片的恐怖沼泽，全新威胁暗藏其中
  • 哨兵：使用这款防御型疾行者外壳，以全新的方式掌控战场
  • 摇篮：在赛季进程中为你的疾行者外壳投入资源，根据你的玩法自定义属性和特性
  • 全新武器：使用全新的KKV-9SD与D54战斗手枪横扫敌人
  • 新敌人：【隐藏】

除上述内容外，第2赛季还带来了大量战斗沙盒更新、多项游玩体验优化、更快的成长进度，以及一个全新的实验模式，为赛季揭开序幕。点击上方链接了解更多详情。

全新实验队列：赞助生存

第2赛季带来了全新的实验模式，计划开放时间为6月3日至10日。正如我们在博文中提到的，无论你是想全力以赴，还是只想打把休闲局，我们希望进行探索，为不同的游玩心境提供更多样的生存体验。赞助生存模式正介于两者之间。它可以让你用PVP程度更轻、风险更低的玩法体验《失落星船：马拉松》。

在赞助生存中……

  • 只有一支团队会率先渗透进入夜间沼泽——也就是你的团队。在最开始的一段时间里，你的团队将是地图上唯一的玩家。但别因此放松警惕……
  • 经过一段时间后，单排鲁克玩家将补位进入地图。
  • 想活着离开这里，唯一的方法就是抵达18分钟后出现的最终撤离点。
  • 到达最终撤离点后，选择权也交到了你手中：你会接受休战、一起撤离，还是将枪口对准彼此？

在赞助生存中，团队必须携带赞助包进行匹配，而鲁克则会以“裸奔”状态进入。这使得损失风险大大降低，让你可以相对轻松地探索新地图、搜刮战利品，并尝试活过这个夜晚。

你可以在查看完整详情。

低温档案室、排名模式以及更多实验队列——精彩还远未结束！

第2赛季还有更多更新即将到来。排名模式即将重新轮换开放，低温档案室也已蓄势待发，本赛季还将推出至少一个新的实验队列。

以下是第2赛季中值得重点关注的内容：

  • 低温档案室将于6月12日（周五）回归，并带来更新后的合约。别忘了，你在第1赛季收集的所有子程序都将继承至第2赛季。
  • 排名模式将于6月15日（周一）上线，带来全新奖励与进度系统更新，让上分之路更加顺畅。查看此处继续阅读。
  • 本赛季后半段，我们还计划推出另一个实验队列，将会是一种实验性的PVE模式。未来还会推出更多实验玩法，包括更加偏向PVP的模式。了解未来计划的更多信息，请查看此处。

官宣全新BUNGIE奖励

第2赛季还将Bungie奖励带回游戏，首批奖励现已推出，更多奖励将在第2赛季晚些时候推出。

现已推出：

  • Bungie奖励[1.20]费利尼毛绒玩具
    • 在北京时间2027年4月1日凌晨0:59前，使用全部已上线疾行者外壳（刺客、毁灭者、侦察、哨兵、盗贼、救援与暴徒）成功撤离，并领取《失落星船：马拉松》百科挑战中的复兴疾行者。
  • Bungie奖励[1.20]恶名远扬T恤
    • 在北京时间2027年4月1日凌晨0:59前，达到赛季等级100，并领取《失落星船：马拉松》百科挑战中的恶名团伙。

请注意，这些挑战具有追溯力——你在第1赛季所达成的也适用于此——要解锁Bungie奖励优惠，你必须先领取相关的百科挑战。更多信息请查看marathon.bungiestore.com 

在天仓五IV开辟全新道路

灯光熄灭，战利品就位，织虫也准备好织造外壳。去看看黑暗中究竟有什么在等待着你吧。赢取全新的奖励，但也要时刻留意远处潜伏的危机。一切才刚刚开始。

我们会在战场上与你相见。（别指望我们会先鸣枪示警。）

*游戏需要联网（另行购买）
zhChs.bodyText: 是时候熄灯准备迎接黑暗了。 今天，《失落星船：马拉松》全新赛季正式开启。登录游戏后，新的赛季将带来新的机会，在恐怖沼泽（夜间）中存活下来，证明你的能力吧。用全新的武器迎接战斗，击败全新威胁，还有更多丰富内容正等待着你。 想和朋友一起体验这些全新改动吗？想知道第2赛季究竟会有什么新内容吗？ 在本次公开试玩周，你可以畅玩完整游戏内容，活动持续至6月10日！ 整个公开试玩周期间，你无需购买即可体验《失落星船：马拉松》*。如果后续购买了《失落星船：马拉松》，你在试玩周期间取得的游玩进度都将继承至第2赛季。 在你开启首次疾行之前，让我们先确保你已掌握在天仓五IV上顺利行动所需的一切信息。 以下是一份实用指南，帮助你快速上手： 通过我们的 第2赛季开发者见解 ，聆听开发团队的分享 从 揭晓博文 中获得更多详情 查看 赛季重置 说明 欣赏 第2赛季过场动画预告片 通过我们的 战斗调整预览 提前了解第2赛季沙盒 详细改动请参看 更新文档 第2赛季，为你焕然一新 随着第2赛季到来，你可以用全新的方式探索天仓五IV： 夜间沼泽： 漆黑一片的恐怖沼泽，全新威胁暗藏其中 哨兵： 使用这款防御型疾行者外壳，以全新的方式掌控战场 摇篮： 在赛季进程中为你的疾行者外壳投入资源，根据你的玩法自定义属性和特性 全新武器 ：使用全新的KKV-9SD与D54战斗手枪横扫敌人 新敌人： 【隐藏】 除上述内容外，第2赛季还带来了大量战斗沙盒更新、多项游玩体验优化、更快的成长进度，以及一个全新的实验模式，为赛季揭开序幕。点击上方链接了解更多详情。 全新实验队列：赞助生存 第2赛季带来了全新的实验模式，计划开放时间为 6月3日至10日 。正如我们在 博文中提到的 ，无论你是想全力以赴，还是只想打把休闲局，我们希望进行探索，为不同的游玩心境提供更多样的生存体验。 赞助生存 模式正介于两者之间。它可以让你用PVP程度更轻、风险更低的玩法体验《失落星船：马拉松》。 在赞助生存中…… 只有一支团队会率先渗透进入夜间沼泽——也就是你的团队。在最开始的一段时间里，你的团队将是地图上唯一的玩家。但别因此放松警惕…… 经过一段时间后，单排鲁克玩家将补位进入地图。 想活着离开这里，唯一的方法就是抵达18分钟后出现的最终撤离点。 到达最终撤离点后，选择权也交到了你手中：你会接受休战、一起撤离，还是将枪口对准彼此？ 在赞助生存中，团队必须携带赞助包进行匹配，而鲁克则会以“裸奔”状态进入。这使得损失风险大大降低，让你可以相对轻松地探索新地图、搜刮战利品，并尝试活过这个夜晚。 你可以在 查看完整详情 。 低温档案室、排名模式以及更多实验队列——精彩还远未结束！ 第2赛季还有更多更新即将到来。排名模式即将重新轮换开放，低温档案室也已蓄势待发，本赛季还将推出至少一个新的实验队列。 以下是第2赛季中值得重点关注的内容： 低温档案室 将于6月12日（周五）回归，并带来更新后的合约。别忘了，你在第1赛季收集的所有子程序都将继承至第2赛季。 排名模式 将于6月15日（周一）上线，带来全新奖励与进度系统更新，让上分之路更加顺畅。查看 此处 继续阅读。 本赛季后半段，我们还计划推出另一个 实验队列 ，将会是一种实验性的PVE模式。未来还会推出更多实验玩法，包括更加偏向PVP的模式。了解未来计划的更多信息，请查看 此处 。 官宣全新BUNGIE奖励 第2赛季还将 Bungie奖励 带回游戏，首批奖励现已推出，更多奖励将在第2赛季晚些时候推出。 现已推出： Bungie奖励[1.20]费利尼毛绒玩具 在北京时间2027年4月1日凌晨0:59前，使用全部已上线疾行者外壳（刺客、毁灭者、侦察、哨兵、盗贼、救援与暴徒）成功撤离，并领取《失落星船：马拉松》百科挑战中的 复兴疾行者 。 Bungie奖励[1.20]恶名远扬T恤 在北京时间2027年4月1日凌晨0:59前，达到赛季等级100，并领取《失落星船：马拉松》百科挑战中的 恶名团伙 。 请注意，这些挑战具有追溯力——你在第1赛季所达成的也适用于此——要解锁Bungie奖励优惠，你必须先领取相关的百科挑战。更多信息请查看 marathon.bungiestore.com 在天仓五IV开辟全新道路 灯光熄灭，战利品就位，织虫也准备好织造外壳。去看看黑暗中究竟有什么在等待着你吧。赢取全新的奖励，但也要时刻留意远处潜伏的危机。一切才刚刚开始。 我们会在战场上与你相见。（别指望我们会先鸣枪示警。） *游戏需要联网（另行购买）

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.1.0
enUs.subtitle: The one where the shadows move.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
General

  • Added Streamer Mode option in the Settings:
    • The ability to hide you and your Crew’s names on your screen.
    • The ability to replace your in-run name with a generic one across places like pings, kill feed, death recap, and spectate.
    • The ability to replace other players’ names on your screen with generic names.
    • A configurable matchmaking delay to help make stream sniping harder.
  • Added settings for controller cursor friction.
  • Fixed an issue where doors could sometimes become desynced from the server.
  • Setting your Steam online status to "invisible" no longer causes the in-game roster to be "invisible". Now you have to set that manually.

Matchmaking

  • Duos is now a regular option - each day a new location is chosen to have Duo queue active, indicated by a Duos marker on Zone Select.
  • Matchmaking now supports a countdown time before launching into a run.
  • Brand new players to Marathon are more likely to match with other new players during the opening of S2.
  • Players may now select between multiple matchmaking network preferences.

    • Developer Note: This experimental matchmaking preference allows players to choose whether they want to wait for longer to increase their chances of finding a group of players located near to them. We will also continue to monitor the performance of Matchmaking over time and adjust its configuration to provide a balanced experience that works for most players by default.

  • Added the zone name to the Matchmaking status screen.

  • Merged Ranked High Stakes and Low Stakes into a single mode. 

 

Item Economy

  • Faction reputation awarded by completing Standard contracts has been significantly improved.
  • Increased the amount of Credits gained when achieving early Season Level rank ups.
  • Premium Rewards Pass owners can now either claim individual rewards with SILK or purchase them for LUX if desired instead. The page will still need to be unlocked before the reward can be purchased.
  • Unclaimed cosmetic Codex rewards will be claimed automatically at the end of Season 1.
  • Increased the size of Overflow inventory to prevent accidental item loss.
  • Runners will now receive a small amount of Runner Level XP for time spent in a Run.
  • Key templates now have objective requirements Runners must fulfill in order to convert the template to a functional key.
  • The first 5 contracts completed each week will award a flat amount of bonus Faction rep. Unused bonuses roll over and stack.
    • Ex: If you join in week 3, the bonus will apply to your first 15 contracts (5 for week 3, plus 10 unused from weeks 1 and 2).
  • Weapon schemas in the Season 1 Rewards Pass have been replaced with Credits for Season 2.
    • At the start of each season, certain gameplay items or materials in older Rewards Passes may get replaced in this way to ensure they maintain value as our game economies change over time.
  • Increased the Credit cost for Shield Implants, Self Revives and Bubble Shields to better reflect their combat value.
  • Sponsored Kits:
    • Added Deluxe and Superior Sponsored Kits to all Factions
    • Enhanced Sponsored Kits unlock at Faction Level 10
    • Enhanced Sponsored Kits now cost 4,000
    • Deluxe Sponsored Kits now cost 12,000
    • Deluxe Sponsored Kits unlock at Faction Level 20
    • Superior Sponsored Kits cost 40,000
    • Superior Sponsored Kits unlock at Faction Level VIP
    • Upon unlock, players receive their first Kit for free. This is true for all rarities.
    • No more gear rarity blending. Enhanced Sponsored Kits means Enhanced Gear, etc.
    • Developer Note: Looking at feedback and data, we're making Sponsored Kits unlock sooner, and have gear to match their rarity. Allowing players to reach higher rarity floors sooner was a focus for Season 2 and these changes aim to address that.
  • Replaced Materialist item status effects with new Materialist lootable trinkets.
  • Ping+ V4 Schema is now Superior (purple), to match the rarity of the Ping+ V4 Implant.
  • Salvage is now found more reliably in its associated region. Removed the container-specific Salvage (e.g. Deimosite Rods in Arms Lockers).
  • Rebalanced Credit costs and Schema rarities for Weapons to better match their retuned combat potential.

Combat

  • UESC Turrets and Drones are now counted as combatants for purposes of the Run Report and other statistics.
  • Faction awards have been added when starting in-run activities like Supply Drop and Secured Resources, in addition to the faction rep granted when the activities are completed.
  • Some faction awards that were not shared by the crew, such as TAD activations, are now awarded to the whole crew.

Runner Shells

  • Adjusted ping to work more intuitively with the DBNO (down but not out) camera angle and to make it much easier to successfully ping enemies while downed.
  • Fixed an issue where the Heat bar would sometimes jump around when performing a heavy melee attack.
  • Fixed an issue where finishers could sometimes push Runners through geometry.
  • Fixed an issue where the crew feed death announcement could fail to appear when a Runner was killed by a non-Runner or non-combatant source like out-of-bounds volumes.
  • Fixed an issue where DBNO (down but not out) movement animations would not play if the player was holding ADS (aim down sights) when downed.

Movement

  • Mantle has been adjusted to make climbing up rough terrain more consistent.
  • Fixed an issue where players would bump up and down repeatedly when pushing up against railings.

Stats

  • The Prime Recovery and Tactical Recovery stats now increase the recharge rate of their respective abilities by a maximum of 70%, down from 100% in S1.
    • Developer Note: With the Cradle, players have far more direct access to increasing their baseline Runner stats without needing to collect materials and purchase faction upgrades. This is a significant increase in average power that we need to adjust for to maintain our intended balance tuning. Additionally, in the live game these stats are shaving off too much of the cooldown time for powerful abilities when maxed out, which when combined with Energy Amp is resulting in situations where it feels like certain abilities have no counterplay. We're taking a swing at the top end recharge rates to help manage this power increase and preserve opportunities for players to capitalize on the downtime between enemy abilities.

Smart Heal

  • Smart Heal will now recommend a Cardio Kick if a Runner is missing zero health and has one available.

New – Sentinel

  • Defender System (Prime Ability): Deploy a defensive platform that harmlessly neutralizes incoming explosives. You and your allies also gain increased weapon stability and reload speed when standing near the device. And as always, bear in mind that it’s got a limited number of projectiles to fire! Be sure to keep a steady eye out.
  • Snare Mine (Tactical Ability): Toss a proximity-triggered mine which detonates into several Immobilizing submunitions when enemies get too close.
  • Prey Tracker (Trait Ability): Activate motion tracking systems in your HUD that allow you to see moving enemies on radar within a conical zone in front of you.
  • Castle Doctrine (Passive): You ready and reload SMGs, Pistols, and Shotguns more quickly based on the number of nearby hostiles. When you take splash damage, your Hardware, Firewall, and Self-Repair Speed are increased for a short time.

Assassin

  • Fixed an issue where the Smoke Screen projectile could get stuck in tight corners and fail to detonate.

Destroyer

  • Fixed an issue where Riot Barricade could be activated while getting on a ladder.
  • Fixed an issue where switching weapons during a Thruster activation could fail to ready the weapon.

Recon

  • Fixed an issue where Shock Drone detonation VFX could appear far away from the actual detonation.

Triage

  • Added an inspect animation for Reboot+.
  • Updated Reboot+ targeting icons for a more consistent visual style.

Vandal

  • Reduced instances of desync when being hit by Knockback.

Thief

  • Fixed multiple Thief drone exploits where the drone could go out of bounds or into unplayable areas.

Cores

  • The Close and Personal shared Core has been removed. This benefit can now be obtained from the Cradle upgrade system instead.

New – Sentinel

  • Reversal (Enhanced): Defeating an Immobilized target heals you over time.
  • Wellness Beacon (Deluxe): While standing near your Defender System, you and your allies use medical items more quickly.
  • Eminent Domain (Prestige): Runner grenades neutralized by your Defender System fall to the floor and become lootable.
  • + 7 more!

Implants

  • Implants have been significantly reworked. Each implant now has a single, fixed perk and a fixed stat package.
  • Item rarity now determines the total amount of stats provided by an implant. The total amount of stats scales up with each rarity tier, from grey all the way up through gold.
    • Certain implants can only be found at higher rarity tiers.
  • Energy Harvester's perk now activates on tactical ability activation rather than deactivation. This means that state-based tactical abilities (like Assassin's Active Camo) gain the benefit while the ability is active, rather than needing to wait for the effects to end.

New implants

  • Head
    • Blindside - Performing a finisher on a downed Runner grants you the effects of Signal Jammer for a short time.
    • Immune Response - Cleansing an MCH status effect briefly increases your Melee Damage. Cleansing an OS status effect briefly increases your Self-Repair Speed
    • Dynamo - Gain increased Agility and Heat Capacity when your tactical or prime abilities are fully charged. Stacks twice.
  • Torso
    • Going Dark - While channeling a healing consumable, you become invisible.
    • Splash Guard - When you take splash damage, your Agility is briefly increased. You take less self-damage from your explosive equipment.
    • Inoculation Kit - While under the effects of an MCH or OS status effect, all of your non-resistance stats are increased.
  • Lower
    • Duck and Cover - After sliding, your Self-Repair Speed is briefly increased and you use healing consumables more quickly.
    • Trailblazer Kit - After defeating a hostile with a melee or knife attack, your next slide generates no heat.

Weapons

  • Weapon cosmetics can now be customized directly through an item's "Inspect" screen.
  • Weapons in the Overflow inventory can now be inspected, which allows their mods to be removed if there is Vault space available.
  • Fixed an issue where picking up loose loot while switching weapons could result in the player's equipped weapon being in a bad state.
  • Biotoxin Disinjector:

    • Fixed an issue where the Biotoxic Disinjector could start a new run with a full magazine even if it was empty or partially empty in the previous run.

Pistols

  • New – D54 Battle Pistol
    • Fully automatic, 3-round burst handgun.
  • CE Tactical Sidearm
    • Increased the speed at which the weapon's recoil settles when firing by 15%.
    • Reduced ADS accuracy error multiplier by ~50%.
    • Rebased aim assist and magnetism min and max falloff distances:
      • Aim Assist
        • Minimum distance increased from 11 meters to 14 meters at base range stat and from 14 meters to 22 meters at maximum range stat.
        • Maximum distance increased from 22 meters to 25 meters at base range stat and from 21 meters to 29 meters at maximum range stat.
      • Magnetism
        • Minimum distance increased from 15 meters to 18 meters at base range stat and from 18.6 meters to 29.6 meters at maximum range stat.
        • Maximum distance increased from 25 meters to 26.2 meters at base range stat and from 24.8 meters to 39 meters at maximum range stat.
      • Rebased aim assist cone size stats:
        • Increased aim assist cone size at base aim assist stat by 33%.
        • Increased aim assist cone size at max aim assist stat by 16%.
      • Rebased hip fire and ADS projectile accuracy stats to compensate.
      • In general, this means an increase in projectile error all up to account for the increased aim assist cone size.
      • Reduced crouch accuracy bonus at max crouch accuracy stat by 117%.
      • Reduced moving accuracy bonus at minimum moving accuracy stat by 22%.
      • Increased moving accuracy bonus at maximum moving accuracy stat by 50%.
  • Magnum MC
    • Decreased the rate of fire from 150rpm to 138rpm.
    • Damage per bullet increased from 33 to 41.
    • Precision multiplier decreased from 2.0 to 1.9.
    • Increased the aim assist fall off start distance by 20%.
    • Adjusted reticle recentering behavior for easier follow-up shots when firing rapidly.

Submachine Guns

  • New – KKV-9SD
    • Pistol frame SMG with an integrated suppressor.
  • BRRT
    • Increased magazine size from 35 to 45.
  • Copperhead RF
    • Converted base bullet and Prestige mod bullets from projectile to hit scan.
    • Rebased magazine stats to multiples of 3 to better support Prestige mod
      • Base magazine size goes from 28 to 30.
      • Max magazine size goes from 78 to 57.

Shotguns

  • Misriah 2442
    • Increased pellet spread in hip fire by 10%.
    • Increased pellet spread while aiming down sights by 5%.
    • Increased base rate of fire from 58RPM to 72RPM.
      • This is to compensate for the removal of increased fire rate stats previously granted by Slick Mag magazine mod family.
    • Rebased magazine stat so now every mag will result in at least +1 round in the magazine.
      • Base magazine size remains at 4 and max magazine size remains 10.
    • Reduced base damage falloff start from 11 meters to 10 meters.
    • Increased max damage falloff start from 15 meters to 16 meters.

Rifles

  • Overrun
    • Reduced horizontal and vertical recoil for base weapon, resulting in more control at lower rarity tiers:
      • Horizontal recoil reduced by ~50%.
      • Vertical recoil reduced by ~12%.
  • Twin Tap
    • Reduced this weapon’s horizontal recoil variance, resulting in ~75% less horizontal spread.
    • RPM changed from 420rpm to 600rpm
      • Increased the speed of rounds in a burst by ~30%.
      • Decreased actual rate of fire by ~20% to compensate.
    • Damage per bullet increased from 17 to 22.
    • Precision multiplier reduced from 1.7x to 1.3x.
    • Fixed an issue where this weapon was not benefitting from crouch accuracy stat bonuses.
    • Increased magazine capacity across all mags
    • Slightly increased the speed at which the accuracy cone returns to baseline when firing.
    • Q-Tap Regen Optic
      • Rate of fire decreased by ~12.5%.
      • Precision multipliers decrease from 1.7x to 1.4x.
      • Increased damage per bullet from 14 to 15.
  • V75 SCAR
    • Increased reload speed by ~18%
  • Impact HAR
    • Added more camera shake at high stability stat to feel more appropriate for a heavy ammo weapon.
    • Converted bullets fired from this weapon from projectile to hitscan.

Precision Rifles

  • V66 Lookout
    • Decreased charge shot charge time by 18%
    • Increased reload speed by ~18%
  • BR33 Volley Rifle
    • Fixed an issue with the BR33 Victory Lap “blunique” (Deluxe Unique) variant that was granting erroneous stats and updated it with the correct intended stats.
      • The erroneous stats weren't providing any bonuses or penalties, this is under the hood cleanup.
      • The correct intended stat bonuses are:
        • +10 Stability
        • +30 Range
        • +10 Accuracy
        • +30 Reload Speed
        • +30 Move Speed
        • +40 ADS Speed
        • +20 Equip Speed
        • +10 Aim Assist

Weapon Mods

  • Mods can now be dragged directly from one weapon to another in the Loadout UI screen.
  • Mods can now be dragged from an equipped weapon into a container while in-run.
  • Fixed an issue where dragging a mod to detach it failed to play a sound cue.
  • Removed sniper thermal optics.

Chips

  • Assault Shields (LMG Shield mods)

    • Assault Shield now passively recharges passively while the shield is activated but the player is not actively aiming down sights.
    • Reduced Assault Shield health from 50 to 25 to compensate.
    • Increased shield's resistance to PVE combatants from 75% to 80%.
  • Stack Overflow
    • Rotated all rarities out of the loot pool for Season 2.
  • Optimal Prime
    • Rotated all rarities out of the loot pool for Season 2.
  • Rorschach Test
    • Now adds a bonus to stability and aim assist for 10 seconds after activation.
    • Increased the overflow amount for ballistic weapons by roughly ~20%.
  • Insurance Plan
    • The MCH and OS cleanse from the Superior rarity tier is now part of the Deluxe and Enhanced rarity tiers as well.
  • Keyboard Warrior
    • Increased accuracy and range stat bonuses by 25%.
  • Chaos Theory
    • Added a passive boost to the reload stat for Enhanced, Deluxe, and Superior rarities.
  • See Ya
    • Increased the duration of invisibility from 3 seconds to 4 seconds.
  • Trigger Discipline
    • Fixed an issue where Trigger Discipline was always permanently active.
    • Reworked the perk under the hood to provide bonuses to the relevant accuracy stats instead of only just a flat bonus multiplier.
    • Reduced the flat bonus multiplier to a static value across all tiers
      • This should mean each tier of Trigger Discipline should feel as powerful as before but feels more predictable across different weapons.
    • Added perk feedback to the HUD tray to help communicate the active timer of the perk.
  • Background Process
    • Added a passive bonus to the equip speed stat across all tiers.
  • Mini Jammer
    • Fixed an issue where the Deluxe rarity tier could activate while the weapon is stowed.
    • Added passive stat penalties to the aim assist and ADS speed stats across all tiers.
    • Increased the time it takes to activate the perk effect on Enhanced, Deluxe, and Superior tiers.
      • Enhanced: was 2.5 seconds; is now 3 seconds.
      • Deluxe: was 1 seconds; is now 2 seconds.
      • Superior: was 0.5 seconds; is now 1 second.
  • Blue Blood
    • Now heals 25 health over 1 second. Previously was instant.
  • Reverse Card
    • Now heals 20 shield over 1 second. Previously was instant.
    • Removed the requirement of the player needing to be below half health in order to proc Reverse Card.
  • Eyes On Fire
    • Added a passive bonus to the aim assist stat across all tiers.
  • Bounty Hunter
    • Increased the amount of credits rewarded per UESC kill:
      • Standard: 10 credits increased to 25 credits.
      • Enhanced: 15 credits increased to 50 credits.
      • Deluxe: 20 credits increased to 75 credits.
      • Superior: 25 credits increased to 100 credits.
    • Fixed an issue where Bounty Hunter wasn't awarding credits upon killing UESC scan drones.
  • Cloudborn
    • Redesigned perk benefits entirely:
      • While in smoke, this weapon has increased stability, accuracy, handling, and movement speed.
        • Previously the benefit was overflowing the magazine on reloading while in smoke.
  • New – Ghillie Suit (all rarities)
    • After crouching for a short duration, this weapon has increased stability, range, and accuracy.
  • New – Buffer Overflow (all rarities)
    • Precision downs and kills with this weapon grants a stacking increase to reload speed.
  • New – Urgent Care (all rarities)
    • Kills or downs with this weapon while missing health grants a stacking bonus to your Self-Repair speed until you return to full health.
      • Developer Note: The number of stacks and benefits increases with each tier. Upon S2 launch, the chip mod description will not specify this and will be fixed in an upcoming release.
  • New – Alarmist (all rarities)
    • After aiming down sights for a brief duration, projectile impacts create a terrifying scan drone alert.
  • New – Refocuser (all rarities)
    • Taking explosive damage grants this weapon increased ADS speed and aim assist.
  • New – Scrapyard (all rarities)
    • Defeating hostiles with this weapon has a chance to spawn depleted health items or standard materials.
    • Developer Note: The chance increases with each tier. Upon S2 launch, the chip mod description will not specify this and will be fixed in an upcoming release.
  • New – Exterminator (all rarities)
    • This weapon deals increased damage against the terrors of [REDACTED].
  • New – Brain Freeze (Superior rarity only)
    • Precision downs and kills with this weapon create a small explosion that spreads Frost to nearby hostiles.
