zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.0.6
zhChs.subtitle: 赛季中期平衡更新
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
更新（截至北京时间2026/4/15凌晨1:55）

1.0.6更新文档补充内容：

  • 更新核心、植入物与芯片图标，以提升辨识清晰度。
  • 信号干扰器现在可于军械库购买。
  • 新增「切换开启」语音聊天选项，玩家可按一下开启近距离聊天或队伍语音，再按一次即可关闭。

综合

  • ONI已推出C.A.R.R.I.（赛博艾克米疾行者强化计划），这是一项全新协议，鼓励单人疾行者与协作团队共同完成合约目标并撤离以获取奖励。
    • 赛博艾克米嘉奖是一种全新资源，可通过协助队友完成合约目标、以单人疾行者身份完成合约目标或作为鲁克成功撤离来获得。与团队以外的其他玩家一同撤离可获得额外嘉奖。记得好好相处。
  • 新增了保持团结选项，这是疾行结束后的一个全新实验性功能，你可以用它来与刚刚一同成功撤离的其他疾行者组建新的团队，进而与他们继续合作。谁说在天仓五交不到新朋友？
    • 只需要与一名队友共同成功撤离即可使用保持团结选项——即使你在中途被消灭，也不要断开连接！
  • 新增了可从SILK界面左上角进入奖励通票的功能。
  • 我们计划提高奖励通票的整体价值，覆盖免费与高级线路。因此，我们将在第1赛季奖励通票中加入4款全新疾行者外壳风格，一款WSTR霰弹枪风格和一款档案徽标：
    • 高级线路：盗贼、刺客、毁灭者
    • 免费线路：侦察、WSTR霰弹枪、档案徽标
  • 修复了升级奖励教程顺序可能错乱的问题。
  • 阿拉克尼阵营外壳风格现已可在百科中获取。
  • 外围区域（初级）新玩家地图现已更新为仅限单人地图，并开放至赛季等级12。
    • 外围区域（初级）地图中遭遇其他疾行者的风险有所降低。
  • 为外围区域（初级）地图新增了五项新合约。
    • 赛季等级12以下的新老玩家将可接取全新的可选赛博艾克米合约，这些合约专为入门阶段打造，助力玩家在《失落星船：马拉松》中的初期发展。
    • 为帮助玩家理解外围区域（初级）合约的机制，这些新合约仅可在外围区域初级或外围区域单人疾行中推进。
    • 达到赛季等级12后将无法再接取和执行这些合约，已经解锁或正在进行中的合约也会被移除。
  • 当最终撤离点已激活且剩余时间少于10秒时，其他撤离点的计时将缩短至与当前对局剩余时间一致。放心，平局也算疾行者获胜。
    • 开发者提示：此前，非最终撤离点的10秒倒计时会被最终撤离点计时器覆盖。由于时间差只有几秒，玩家看到撤离动画后会误以为自己已成功撤离，直到看到疾行报告才发现并未完成。我们认为此项改动将使最后时刻的撤离体验更加“公平”。

进度

  • 提高单排玩家的疾行者等级与阵营声望收益。
  • 提高所有玩家从标准合约中获得的阵营声望奖励。

军械库

  • 你可以在C.A.R.R.I.军械库中使用赛博艾克米嘉奖购买可开出随机回收资源物品的回收资源箱或提供对应阵营声望的声望包。回收资源箱和赞助包库存会每天刷新，而其他C.A.R.R.I.商品不会刷新，且只能购买一次。

百科

  • 先行者百科挑战聚焦协作目标，完成后可获得全新先行者称号。这些挑战将永久保留，并可在未来的赛季中完成。
  • 修复了“看上面！”暴徒挑战在特定击杀距离下无法完成的问题。
  • 修复了“安全！”暴徒挑战在某些情况下无法完成的问题。
  • 修复了“夺命大师”盗贼挑战说明中未明确正确完成条件的问题。
  • 修复了“三连胜”侦察挑战无法正确统计同时击倒与消灭疾行者的问题。
  • 修复了“寻烟觅敌”毁灭者挑战在某些情况下无法完成的问题。
  • 修复了编译者传说图像无法显示的问题。
  • 修复了低温档案室收藏品传说图像无法显示的问题。
  • 修复了百科挑战名称错误显示为“半机械人安魂曲”，而非“编译者安魂曲”的问题。

合约

  • 修复了玩家选择鲁克后无法在大厅领取已完成合约的问题。
  • 修复了多个导致合约进度无法推进或未能在队员间正确同步的问题。

战斗

  • 小幅提升了近距离与中距离敌人脚步声的音频清晰度。
  • 提升了倒地玩家的坠落伤害抗性。
  • 修复了在终结技动画期间持续移动视角可能导致玩家准星在终结技结束后剧烈晃动的问题。

武器

武器奖励

  • 新增了11款全新豪华（蓝色稀有度）独特武器。
    • 这些武器可在外围区域与恐怖沼泽的展示遭遇战中掉落。你能全部收集齐吗？
    • 开发者提示：这些豪华独特武器遵循与低温档案室上锁房间中尊享独特武器相似的设计逻辑，但整体强度更符合豪华武器定位。这意味着每一款豪华独特武器都附带专门设计的加成，仅限该武器的独特版本拥有。狩猎愉快！
    • 举例来说：低温档案室中的DRRVISH尊享（金色）冲锋枪配备了专为BRRT冲锋枪打造的定制模组，可提升稳定性、操控性和腰射时的精准度。此外，它还拥有独特特性超时态射击，可一次性发射5发散布紧凑的子弹。

武器弹药

  • 修复了伏特电芯武器在命中敌人时不产生热量的问题。

电磁炮

  • 所有电磁炮在达到最大充能时间后将不再自动开火。同时，已充能的电磁炮现在可以无限期维持该状态。
    • 开发者提示：我们认为这一行为调整将提高所有电磁炮在中远距离武器定位中的竞争力。我们预计玩家在与更远距离武器交火时，可以更有效地进行探头射击，不再需要为了完成满充能射击而暴露在开阔地带。和以往一样，我们会持续关注反馈，并评估电磁炮是否需要进一步调整以适应其射程定位。
  • V00 ZEUS电磁炮
    • 最大瞄准辅助锥体大小增加约20%。此外，充能过程中，瞄准辅助锥体将从原来的缩小变为扩大。
    • 基础弹匣容量从2提升至5。
    • 最大弹匣容量从20减少至15。
    • 基础充能时间从1.1秒减少至1秒。
    • V00 ZEUS电磁炮尊享模组：超频发电机
      • 该尊享模组会将弹匣容量翻倍，因此双发射击不会减少每个弹匣的总触发次数。该调整修复了奇数弹匣容量导致的不完整射击问题。
  • ARES电磁炮
    • 基础充能时间从2秒减少至1.25秒。
    • 提升了所有属性阶段下的弹匣容量：
      • 基础弹匣容量从4提升至6。
      • 最大弹匣容量从10提升至12。
    • 过充期间，瞄准辅助锥体大小小幅提升约10%。

冲锋枪

  • 铜斑蛇速射
    • 基础弹匣容量从21提升至28。
      • 最大弹匣容量保持不变。
    • 小幅提升基础精准度和有效射程，从15米提升至16.2米。
    • 达到最大伤害衰减射程时的最小伤害从30%提升至50%。
    • 瞄准时的初始误差锥体大小小幅减少约8.5%。
  • BRRT冲锋枪
    • 达到最大伤害衰减射程时的最小伤害从30%提升至50%。
  • 恶霸冲锋枪
    • 降低了瞄准辅助与磁吸范围衰减：
      • 基础瞄准辅助衰减起始距离从13米降低至12米。 
      • 基础瞄准辅助衰减终止距离从24.2米降低至22.5米。
      • 基础磁吸衰减起始距离从30米降低至27.8米。 
      • 基础磁吸衰减终止距离从37.1米降低至34.5米。
      • 最大瞄准辅助衰减起始距离从40米降低至37.2米。 
      • 最大瞄准辅助衰减终止距离从80米降低至74.4米。
      • 最大磁吸衰减起始距离从93米降低至86.4米。 
      • 最大磁吸衰减终止距离从101米降低至93.9米。
    • 误差锥体大小提升7.5%。

狙击枪

  • 远征
    • 降低了快速射击时的精准度，以鼓励节奏更稳健的射击方式。
    • 射速从90rpm降低至60rpm。
    • 修复了拥王者弹匣尊享模组在射击队友时也会触发的问题。
  • 边界
    • 射速从43rpm降低至39rpm。

步枪

  • M77突击步枪
    • 修复了间隔弹匣尊享模组可能意外提升其他武器射速的问题。
  • V75 SCAR
    • 调整了弹匣完成装填的判定时间，以与其他伏特武器保持一致。该调整将打断填装动画，玩家可以更早进行冲刺或射击。

手枪

  • V11重拳
    • 修复了rpm显示数值错误的问题。

精密步枪

  • 风行者M1T
    • 修复了必要情报尊享模组在未装备的情况下仍会触发音效的问题。
    • 修复了必要情报尊享模组音效未正确反映尊享独特火卫一之拳变体的距离提升的问题。

生物毒素分离注射器

  • 修复了填装动画不触发控制器震动感的问题。
  • 修复了手雷无法触发毒性植物危险危害的问题。
  • 每道光束每周期的弹药消耗从6提升至8。
  • 每枚手雷的弹药消耗从33提升至37。
  • 手雷射速从0.76降低至0.52。
  • 手雷飞行速度从每秒42米降低至每秒34米。
  • 手雷最低伤害从5降低至3
  • 手雷黏附在敌人身上时的伤害从90降低至65。
  • 手雷最大伤害半径减少50%。
  • 提升了手雷爆炸伤害的衰减速度。
  • 手雷引信启动时间从0.9秒提升至1.3秒。
  • 手雷现在会对自身造成伤害。
    • 开发者提示：在外头注意安全。 

武器模组

  • 芯片
    • 在所有稀有度中新增了三种全新武器芯片类别：
      • 共同敌人：对敌方战斗人员造成伤害，会使其在短时间内受到来自友方或敌方疾行者的额外伤害。
      • 残弹回收：在一次击倒或击杀后快速填装，可掉落该武器类型的弹药。
      • 撤离伙伴：击倒或击杀一名敌人后，你和附近的盟友在使用已装备武器时在短时间内提升移动速度。
  • 电路追踪器
    • 冷却时间从0.5秒增加至1秒。
    • 标准阶段下的弹药返还减少5%，卓越阶段下最多减少40%。
  • 机会主义
    • 修复了该效果可通过友方射击触发的问题。
  • 交流电
    • 修复了该效果可通过友方射击触发的问题。
  • 迷你干扰器
    • 修复了迷你干扰器效果未能提供信号干扰器完整效果的问题。
  • 瞄准镜
    • 热成像
      • 已从所有武器类型的掉落池中移除豪华稀有度的热能瞄具，现已不再掉落。
      • 卓越狙击瞄准镜III现已在原有瞄准速度惩罚基础上，额外削弱了瞄准辅助与射程属性。
      • 卓越狙击瞄准镜III的热成像高亮范围从100米降低至80米。
    • 可变倍率瞄具
      • 修复了这些瞄准镜显示错误瞄准辅助锥体的问题。

装备

  • 新增了单人模式限定的耗尽的自我复活包。
    • 这些物品无法从单人疾行中携带撤离，会像其他在疾行中获得的已耗尽物品一样自动出售。
  • 新增了可用于复活倒地的敌对疾行者的仁心包。已被淘汰的敌方疾行者无法通过仁心包复活。
    • 所有鲁克现在在生成时会默认自带一个仁心包。
    • 开发者提示：我们设计仁心包的初衷，是让玩家无需消耗自我复活即可救回敌方玩家。有时候，双方要打过一轮之后才会冷静下来，这点我们完全理解。现在你有机会弥补自己一时冲动的开火行为了。
  • 阔刀地雷
    • 部署在高台或地面杂乱区域附近时，对敌探测能力提升。
    • 修复了位于门廊附近完整掩体后的玩家仍会受到阔刀地雷爆炸伤害的问题。
  • 自我复活
    • 稀有度从豪华提升至卓越。

植入物

  • 新增了五种可在多种活动中掉落的全新植入物特性：
    • 团体治疗：使用医疗物品后，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得的自我修复速度堆叠加成。
    • 群体免疫：击败敌对目标后，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得硬件和防火墙属性堆叠加成。
    • 搏击俱乐部：使用近战或匕首攻击敌对目标时，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得近战伤害堆叠加成。
    • 俯冲轰炸：使用爆炸物对敌人造成伤害时，你和附近的盟友临时获得大幅敏捷加成。
    • 机动规避：护盾被破坏时，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得冲刺速度和耐热性提升。
  • 救世情结现在在单人模式下也会提供较小幅度的复活速度加成。此前，该效果在团队之外不会提供任何加成。
  • 耐久型疾行者在标准/强化/豪华/卓越各稀有度下的耐热性属性加成分别从5/10/25/50提升至10/20/30/50。
  • 修复了在装备特定植入物组合时，配装界面中耐热性错误显示为0的问题。该问题仅为显示错误，实际属性加成正常。

核心

  • 刺客按兵不动核心现需在蹲伏时才会触发计时器暂停效果。该调整可降低意外触发导致的不必要热量积蓄。
  • 降低了盗贼的豪华配置核心为窃贼无人机提供的对敌方玩家伤害抗性。
  • 修复了暴徒的低调行事核心在装备酶抑制剂植入物特性时，会缩短已激活的信号干扰器的持续时间，并在滑行时异常延长其持续时间的问题。

外壳

侦察

回声脉冲

  • 降低了敌方侦察激活的回声脉冲波在扩散时的可见度。
  • 回声脉冲标记现已可以区分敌方疾行者与敌方UESC目标。
  • 信号干扰器不再完全屏蔽回声脉冲标记。被信号干扰器影响的玩家在被回声脉冲命中时，将显示UESC标记导航点而非疾行者导航点。

追踪无人机

  • 提升了追踪无人机的追踪能力与转向速度。
  • 降低了追踪无人机在无活跃目标时的移动速度，避免其在转弯时漏过可能藏有目标的狭窄拐角。
  • 追踪无人机现在会定期重新评估其追踪目标。如果无法接近原目标，它将尝试寻找新的目标。

毁灭者

推进器

  • 推进器热量消耗提升约9%，以更好平衡其强机动性与战斗能力。

防暴路障

  • 修复了防暴路障可以在不消耗技能能量的情况下快速反复开关，导致玩家利用这一点进行卡角探头的问题。

盗贼

窃贼无人机

  • 每架窃贼无人机现在最多只能装备一个阔刀地雷部件。
  • 增加了窃贼无人机推进器的音量，使其更容易被追踪。
  • 降低了窃贼无人机的下降加速度，使其更接近上升速度，从而提升其移动的可预测性。
  • 窃贼无人机的目标稀有度高亮范围由50米减少至35米。
  • 窃贼无人机的基础生命值从70降低至60。

救援

医疗无人机

  • 修复了医疗无人机会追踪并尝试连接友方窃贼无人机的问题，虽然这个行为很可爱就是了。
  • 修复了医疗无人机有时无法根据救援外壳装备的装饰来正确应用自身配色方案的问题。

暴徒

增幅

  • 增幅的基础冷却时间从180秒降低至150秒。

鲁克

信号遮蔽

  • 修复了切换护盾植入物时可能导致信号遮蔽闪烁的问题。

区域

恐怖沼泽

  • 当封锁启动并生成UESC安全储藏箱时，站在该位置的玩家现在会被推开，不会再卡入地面。
  • 修复了导致鲁克无法定位、稳定异常样本并携带其撤离的问题。

前哨

  • 新增了更多可能的生成位置，以满足通往无人机区电梯的运输请求。
  • 恢复了迎宾中心的展览音频。
  • 修复了玩家在宿舍中可能出界的问题。
  • 修复了无规冲突[4/5]合约施加的毒素减益无法清除的问题。
zhChs.bodyText: 更新（截至北京时间2026/4/15凌晨1:55） 1.0.6更新文档补充内容： 更新核心、植入物与芯片图标，以提升辨识清晰度。 信号干扰器现在可于军械库购买。 新增「切换开启」语音聊天选项，玩家可按一下开启近距离聊天或队伍语音，再按一次即可关闭。 综合 ONI已推出C.A.R.R.I.（赛博艾克米疾行者强化计划），这是一项全新协议，鼓励单人疾行者与协作团队共同完成合约目标并撤离以获取奖励。 赛博艾克米嘉奖是一种全新资源，可通过协助队友完成合约目标、以单人疾行者身份完成合约目标或作为鲁克成功撤离来获得。与团队以外的其他玩家一同撤离可获得额外嘉奖。记得好好相处。 新增了保持 团结 选项，这是疾行结束后的一个全新实验性功能，你可以用它来与刚刚一同成功撤离的其他疾行者组建新的团队，进而与他们继续合作。谁说在天仓五交不到新朋友？ 只需要与一名队友共同成功撤离即可使用保持团结选项——即使你在中途被消灭，也不要断开连接！ 新增了可从SILK界面左上角进入奖励通票的功能。 我们计划提高奖励通票的整体价值，覆盖免费与高级线路。因此，我们将在第1赛季奖励通票中加入4款全新疾行者外壳风格，一款WSTR霰弹枪风格和一款档案徽标： 高级线路：盗贼、刺客、毁灭者 免费线路：侦察、WSTR霰弹枪、档案徽标 修复了升级奖励教程顺序可能错乱的问题。 阿拉克尼阵营外壳风格现已可在百科中获取。 外围区域（初级）新玩家地图现已更新为仅限单人地图，并开放至赛季等级12。 外围区域（初级）地图中遭遇其他疾行者的风险有所降低。 为外围区域（初级）地图新增了五项新合约。 赛季等级12以下的新老玩家将可接取全新的可选赛博艾克米合约，这些合约专为入门阶段打造，助力玩家在《失落星船：马拉松》中的初期发展。 为帮助玩家理解外围区域（初级）合约的机制，这些新合约仅可在外围区域初级或外围区域单人疾行中推进。 达到赛季等级12后将无法再接取和执行这些合约，已经解锁或正在进行中的合约也会被移除。 当最终撤离点已激活且剩余时间少于10秒时，其他撤离点的计时将缩短至与当前对局剩余时间一致。放心，平局也算疾行者获胜。 开发者提示： 此前，非最终撤离点的10秒倒计时会被最终撤离点计时器覆盖。由于时间差只有几秒，玩家看到撤离动画后会误以为自己已成功撤离，直到看到疾行报告才发现并未完成。我们认为此项改动将使最后时刻的撤离体验更加“公平”。 进度 提高单排玩家的疾行者等级与阵营声望收益。 提高所有玩家从标准合约中获得的阵营声望奖励。 军械库 你可以在C.A.R.R.I.军械库中使用赛博艾克米嘉奖购买可开出随机回收资源物品的回收资源箱或提供对应阵营声望的声望包。回收资源箱和赞助包库存会每天刷新，而其他C.A.R.R.I.商品不会刷新，且只能购买一次。 百科 先行者百科挑战聚焦协作目标，完成后可获得全新先行者称号。这些挑战将永久保留，并可在未来的赛季中完成。 修复了“看上面！”暴徒挑战在特定击杀距离下无法完成的问题。 修复了“安全！”暴徒挑战在某些情况下无法完成的问题。 修复了“夺命大师”盗贼挑战说明中未明确正确完成条件的问题。 修复了“三连胜”侦察挑战无法正确统计同时击倒与消灭疾行者的问题。 修复了“寻烟觅敌”毁灭者挑战在某些情况下无法完成的问题。 修复了编译者传说图像无法显示的问题。 修复了低温档案室收藏品传说图像无法显示的问题。 修复了百科挑战名称错误显示为“半机械人安魂曲”，而非“编译者安魂曲”的问题。 合约 修复了玩家选择鲁克后无法在大厅领取已完成合约的问题。 修复了多个导致合约进度无法推进或未能在队员间正确同步的问题。 战斗 小幅提升了近距离与中距离敌人脚步声的音频清晰度。 提升了倒地玩家的坠落伤害抗性。 修复了在终结技动画期间持续移动视角可能导致玩家准星在终结技结束后剧烈晃动的问题。 武器 武器奖励 新增了11款全新豪华（蓝色稀有度）独特武器。 这些武器可在外围区域与恐怖沼泽的展示遭遇战中掉落。你能全部收集齐吗？ 开发者提示： 这些豪华独特武器遵循与低温档案室上锁房间中尊享独特武器相似的设计逻辑，但整体强度更符合豪华武器定位。这意味着每一款豪华独特武器都附带专门设计的加成，仅限该武器的独特版本拥有。狩猎愉快！ 举例来说：低温档案室中的DRRVISH尊享（金色）冲锋枪配备了专为BRRT冲锋枪打造的定制模组，可提升稳定性、操控性和腰射时的精准度。此外，它还拥有独特特性超时态射击，可一次性发射5发散布紧凑的子弹。 武器弹药 修复了伏特电芯武器在命中敌人时不产生热量的问题。 电磁炮 所有电磁炮在达到最大充能时间后将不再自动开火。同时，已充能的电磁炮现在可以无限期维持该状态。 开发者提示： 我们认为这一行为调整将提高所有电磁炮在中远距离武器定位中的竞争力。我们预计玩家在与更远距离武器交火时，可以更有效地进行探头射击，不再需要为了完成满充能射击而暴露在开阔地带。和以往一样，我们会持续关注反馈，并评估电磁炮是否需要进一步调整以适应其射程定位。 V00 ZEUS电磁炮 最大瞄准辅助锥体大小增加约20%。此外，充能过程中，瞄准辅助锥体将从原来的缩小变为扩大。 基础弹匣容量从2提升至5。 最大弹匣容量从20减少至15。 基础充能时间从1.1秒减少至1秒。 V00 ZEUS电磁炮尊享模组：超频发电机 该尊享模组会将弹匣容量翻倍，因此双发射击不会减少每个弹匣的总触发次数。该调整修复了奇数弹匣容量导致的不完整射击问题。 ARES电磁炮 基础充能时间从2秒减少至1.25秒。 提升了所有属性阶段下的弹匣容量： 基础弹匣容量从4提升至6。 最大弹匣容量从10提升至12。 过充期间，瞄准辅助锥体大小小幅提升约10%。 冲锋枪 铜斑蛇速射 基础弹匣容量从21提升至28。 最大弹匣容量保持不变。 小幅提升基础精准度和有效射程，从15米提升至16.2米。 达到最大伤害衰减射程时的最小伤害从30%提升至50%。 瞄准时的初始误差锥体大小小幅减少约8.5%。 BRRT冲锋枪 达到最大伤害衰减射程时的最小伤害从30%提升至50%。 恶霸冲锋枪 降低了瞄准辅助与磁吸范围衰减： 基础瞄准辅助衰减起始距离从13米降低至12米。 基础瞄准辅助衰减终止距离从24.2米降低至22.5米。 基础磁吸衰减起始距离从30米降低至27.8米。 基础磁吸衰减终止距离从37.1米降低至34.5米。 最大瞄准辅助衰减起始距离从40米降低至37.2米。 最大瞄准辅助衰减终止距离从80米降低至74.4米。 最大磁吸衰减起始距离从93米降低至86.4米。 最大磁吸衰减终止距离从101米降低至93.9米。 误差锥体大小提升7.5%。 狙击枪 远征 降低了快速射击时的精准度，以鼓励节奏更稳健的射击方式。 射速从90rpm降低至60rpm。 修复了拥王者弹匣尊享模组在射击队友时也会触发的问题。 边界 射速从43rpm降低至39rpm。 步枪 M77突击步枪 修复了间隔弹匣尊享模组可能意外提升其他武器射速的问题。 V75 SCAR 调整了弹匣完成装填的判定时间，以与其他伏特武器保持一致。该调整将打断填装动画，玩家可以更早进行冲刺或射击。 手枪 V11重拳 修复了rpm显示数值错误的问题。 精密步枪 风行者M1T 修复了必要情报尊享模组在未装备的情况下仍会触发音效的问题。 修复了必要情报尊享模组音效未正确反映尊享独特火卫一之拳变体的距离提升的问题。 生物毒素分离注射器 修复了填装动画不触发控制器震动感的问题。 修复了手雷无法触发毒性植物危险危害的问题。 每道光束每周期的弹药消耗从6提升至8。 每枚手雷的弹药消耗从33提升至37。 手雷射速从0.76降低至0.52。 手雷飞行速度从每秒42米降低至每秒34米。 手雷最低伤害从5降低至3 手雷黏附在敌人身上时的伤害从90降低至65。 手雷最大伤害半径减少50%。 提升了手雷爆炸伤害的衰减速度。 手雷引信启动时间从0.9秒提升至1.3秒。 手雷现在会对自身造成伤害。 开发者提示：在外头注意安全。 武器模组 芯片 在所有稀有度中新增了三种全新武器芯片类别： 共同敌人： 对敌方战斗人员造成伤害，会使其在短时间内受到来自友方或敌方疾行者的额外伤害。 残弹回收： 在一次击倒或击杀后快速填装，可掉落该武器类型的弹药。 撤离伙伴： 击倒或击杀一名敌人后，你和附近的盟友在使用已装备武器时在短时间内提升移动速度。 电路追踪器 冷却时间从0.5秒增加至1秒。 标准阶段下的弹药返还减少5%，卓越阶段下最多减少40%。 机会主义 修复了该效果可通过友方射击触发的问题。 交流电 修复了该效果可通过友方射击触发的问题。 迷你干扰器 修复了迷你干扰器效果未能提供信号干扰器完整效果的问题。 瞄准镜 热成像 已从所有武器类型的掉落池中移除豪华稀有度的热能瞄具，现已不再掉落。 卓越狙击瞄准镜III现已在原有瞄准速度惩罚基础上，额外削弱了瞄准辅助与射程属性。 卓越狙击瞄准镜III的热成像高亮范围从100米降低至80米。 可变倍率瞄具 修复了这些瞄准镜显示错误瞄准辅助锥体的问题。 装备 新增了 单人模式限定 的耗尽的自我复活包。 这些物品 无法 从单人疾行中携带撤离，会像其他在疾行中获得的已耗尽物品一样自动出售。 新增了可用于复活倒地的敌对疾行者的仁心包。已被淘汰的敌方疾行者无法通过仁心包复活。 所有鲁克现在在生成时会默认自带一个仁心包。 开发者提示： 我们设计仁心包的初衷，是让玩家无需消耗自我复活即可救回敌方玩家。有时候，双方要打过一轮之后才会冷静下来，这点我们完全理解。现在你有机会弥补自己一时冲动的开火行为了。 阔刀地雷 部署在高台或地面杂乱区域附近时，对敌探测能力提升。 修复了位于门廊附近完整掩体后的玩家仍会受到阔刀地雷爆炸伤害的问题。 自我复活 稀有度从豪华提升至卓越。 植入物 新增了五种可在多种活动中掉落的全新植入物特性： 团体治疗： 使用医疗物品后，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得的自我修复速度堆叠加成。 群体免疫： 击败敌对目标后，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得硬件和防火墙属性堆叠加成。 搏击俱乐部： 使用近战或匕首攻击敌对目标时，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得近战伤害堆叠加成。 俯冲轰炸： 使用爆炸物对敌人造成伤害时，你和附近的盟友临时获得大幅敏捷加成。 机动规避： 护盾被破坏时，你和附近的盟友在短时间内获得冲刺速度和耐热性提升。 救世情结现在在单人模式下也会提供较小幅度的复活速度加成。此前，该效果在团队之外不会提供任何加成。 耐久型疾行者在标准/强化/豪华/卓越各稀有度下的耐热性属性加成分别从5/10/25/50提升至10/20/30/50。 修复了在装备特定植入物组合时，配装界面中耐热性错误显示为0的问题。该问题仅为显示错误，实际属性加成正常。 核心 刺客 按兵不动核心现需在蹲伏时才会触发计时器暂停效果。该调整可降低意外触发导致的不必要热量积蓄。 降低了盗贼的豪华配置核心为窃贼无人机提供的对敌方玩家伤害抗性。 修复了 暴徒 的低调行事核心在装备酶抑制剂植入物特性时，会缩短已激活的信号干扰器的持续时间，并在滑行时异常延长其持续时间的问题。 外壳 侦察 回声脉冲 降低了敌方侦察激活的回声脉冲波在扩散时的可见度。 回声脉冲标记现已可以区分敌方疾行者与敌方UESC目标。 信号干扰器不再完全屏蔽回声脉冲标记。被信号干扰器影响的玩家在被回声脉冲命中时，将显示UESC标记导航点而非疾行者导航点。 追踪无人机 提升了追踪无人机的追踪能力与转向速度。 降低了追踪无人机在无活跃目标时的移动速度，避免其在转弯时漏过可能藏有目标的狭窄拐角。 追踪无人机现在会定期重新评估其追踪目标。如果无法接近原目标，它将尝试寻找新的目标。 毁灭者 推进器 推进器热量消耗提升约9%，以更好平衡其强机动性与战斗能力。 防暴路障 修复了防暴路障可以在不消耗技能能量的情况下快速反复开关，导致玩家利用这一点进行卡角探头的问题。 盗贼 窃贼无人机 每架窃贼无人机现在最多只能装备一个阔刀地雷部件。 增加了窃贼无人机推进器的音量，使其更容易被追踪。 降低了窃贼无人机的下降加速度，使其更接近上升速度，从而提升其移动的可预测性。 窃贼无人机的目标稀有度高亮范围由50米减少至35米。 窃贼无人机的基础生命值从70降低至60。 救援 医疗无人机 修复了医疗无人机会追踪并尝试连接友方窃贼无人机的问题，虽然这个行为很可爱就是了。 修复了医疗无人机有时无法根据救援外壳装备的装饰来正确应用自身配色方案的问题。 暴徒 增幅 增幅的基础冷却时间从180秒降低至150秒。 鲁克 信号遮蔽 修复了切换护盾植入物时可能导致信号遮蔽闪烁的问题。 区域 恐怖沼泽 当封锁启动并生成UESC安全储藏箱时，站在该位置的玩家现在会被推开，不会再卡入地面。 修复了导致鲁克无法定位、稳定异常样本并携带其撤离的问题。 前哨 新增了更多可能的生成位置，以满足通往无人机区电梯的运输请求。 恢复了迎宾中心的展览音频。 修复了玩家在宿舍中可能出界的问题。 修复了无规冲突[4/5]合约施加的毒素减益无法清除的问题。

enUs.title: Introducing C.A.R.R.I. - CyberAcme’s New Protocol
enUs.subtitle: Learn more about ONI’s latest protocol for tracking who survives Tau Ceti… and who thrives, together.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Marathon’s mid-season update is coming out today, which includes weapon adjustments, new Reward Pass additions, Runner shell tuning (Recon, we’ve got you), earnable Arachne shell styles, new equipment, and other updates. Read the full details in today’s patch notes.

As part of this update, we’re also introducing the CyberAcme Runner Reinforcement Initiative (C.A.R.R.I.), a new protocol from ONI that rewards solo Runners and coordinated crews for completing contract objectives and exfiling together, with rewards tuned to help newer and mid-progression players while still offering benefits to the Cryo Archive-veterans that walk among us.

Earn CyberAcme Commendations for your successes, then spend this new material at the C.A.R.R.I. Armory to unlock weapons, Reputation Packs which grant reputation for their associated faction, and more.

The C.A.R.R.I Protocol will run from the launch of the mid-season patch 1.0.6 through the end of Season 1.

Commendations and Rewards

Runners who work together to survive will be rewarded CyberAcme Commendations, a new currency to spend in C.A.R.R.I. Armory.

How to earn Commendations

  • When playing in a crew with other players, whether premade or filled, you’ll get CyberAcme Commendations for each contract objective you help them complete.
  • If you’re a solo Runner or a Rook, you’ll have some notable opportunities to get CyberAcme Commendations to call your own:
    • Solo Runners can earn Commendations by completing any individual contract objective. 
    • Solo Runners and Rooks will both earn Commendations upon a successful solo exfil. .
    • Want to risk some on-the-fly diplomacy for CyberAcme Commendations? As a solo player or a Rook, you’ll earn extra Commendations when you exfil with other players – regardless if they’re a Rook, Runner, or a full crew.
  • Additionally, there’s a new trinket of Enhanced rarity that can drop in all zones, which rewards CyberAcme Commendations every time you exfil with it.

CyberAcme Commendations will be sent directly to your Vault upon extraction and can stack up to 100.

Spend in the C.A.R.R.I. Armory

The new C.A.R.R.I. Armory available in the CyAc tab allows players to exchange CyberAcme Commendations for rewards, like a rotating selection of weapons, Salvage Crates that grant a random stack of Salvage, or Reputation Packs that grant reputation for their associated faction, among other rewards.

Salvage Crates and Sponsored Kit stock refreshes daily while other C.A.R.R.I. offers do not refresh, so keep an eye out for them every day!

New Tools for Collaboration

We’re introducing some new things to support you working with your crew, forming uneasy alliances, and bonus experience for new Runners.

New Feature: Stay Together

Stay Together is an end-of-run option that allows you to stay with the Runners you just successfully exfilled with by creating a new crew with them. Only one crewmate needs to successfully exfil for Stay Together to be available.

New Consumable: Mercy Kit

Sometimes you shoot first and ask questions later. If you down an enemy but think there’s potential to turn them into an ally, you can now use a Mercy Kit to revive them.

  • Only Runners who have been downed can be revived with a Mercy Kit.
    • Once they’ve been fully eliminated, you can't help them.
  • Mercy Kits cannot be used on your allies or yourself.
  • All Rooks now spawn with a Mercy Kit by default.

Proximity Chat Toggle

There’s a new “toggle to open” proximity chat option, so it’s easier to speak and agree to terms with other players.

Codex Challenges

Complete a new set of collaborative objectives to unlock a new Pacesetter Title. These challenges are a permanent addition and can be completed in future seasons.

Catch-Up Bonuses for New Players

Until Season 1 ends, new players will get a 15% boost to reputation earned for CyberAcme and NuCaloric for their first five ranks.

Additionally, Perimeter (Beginner) has been adjusted to better accommodate newer players. The map will be available as a solos-only map up to Runner Level 12 for those who prefer a bit more safety as they initially navigate Tau Ceti. Just don’t let your guard down; the UESC have no mercy. 

Update 1.0.6 is Live

Our mid-season update has much more to offer, like a new Depleted Self-Revive kit for solo Runners, new weapon chips and shell implants to support collaboration, and more. If you want to know all about what's coming today, you can read the full mid-season patch notes here. Good luck out there!

Read the full details in today’s patch notes. As part of this update, we’re also introducing the C yber A cme R unner R einforcement I nitiative (C.A.R.R.I.), a new protocol from ONI that rewards solo Runners and coordinated crews for completing contract objectives and exfiling together, with rewards tuned to help newer and mid-progression players while still offering benefits to the Cryo Archive-veterans that walk among us. zhChs.title: 隆重推出赛博艾克米新协议——C.A.R.R.I.
zhChs.subtitle: 快来了解一下ONI的最新协议，用它来追踪谁能够在天仓五生存，谁又能如鱼得水。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
《失落星船：马拉松》的赛季中期更新将于今日发布，内容包括武器调整、奖励通票新增内容、疾行者外壳优化（侦察这次翻身了）、可获得的阿拉克尼外壳风格、新装备以及其他更新。你可以在今天的更新文档中阅读完整内容！

在本次更新中，我们还会推出C.A.R.R.I.（CyberAcme Runner Reinforcement Initiative，即“赛博艾克米疾行者强化计划”），这是ONI的一项全新协议，鼓励单人疾行者与协作团队共同完成合约目标并撤离以获取奖励，整体奖励机制更偏向帮助新玩家与中期进度玩家，同时也为已进入低温档案室的资深玩家提供相应回报。

成功后即可获得赛博艾克米嘉奖，该资源可在C.A.R.R.I.军械库中解锁武器和提供对应阵营声望的声望包等多种奖励。

C.A.R.R.I.协议将会随赛季中期的更新1.0.6发布，持续到第1赛季结束。

嘉奖和奖励

通过密切合作幸存的疾行者们将获得赛博艾克米嘉奖，并可在C.A.R.R.I.军械库中使用这种新的货币。

如何赢得嘉奖

  • 与其他玩家组队游戏时，不论是预先组队还是补位，帮助团队完成合约目标即可获得赛博艾克米嘉奖。
  • 如果你是单人疾行者或鲁克，那么你也将有一些特别的机会可以独力赢得赛博艾克米嘉奖：
    • 单人疾行者可以通过完成任意独立合约目标赢得嘉奖。 
    • 单人疾行者和鲁克可以在成功完成单人撤离时赢得嘉奖。
    • 为了获得赛博艾克米嘉奖，你是否愿意冒险进行临时交涉？单人疾行者或鲁克在与其他玩家一同撤离时，不论对方是鲁克、疾行者还是完整团队，都可以赢得额外的嘉奖。
  • 此外，游戏中还加入了一个新的强化稀有度饰品，此饰品会在所有区域掉落，当你携带它撤离时，也可以获得赛博艾克米嘉奖。

赛博艾克米嘉奖将会在你撤离时自动发放到你的保险库，最多可获得100点。

在C.A.R.R.I.军械库中使用

赛博艾克米选项卡中新增了一个C.A.R.R.I.军械库，玩家可以在这里使用赛博艾克米嘉奖换取各种奖励，如轮换奖励武器、可开出随机回收资源的回收资源箱、提供对应阵营声望的声望包等。

回收资源箱和赞助包库存会每天刷新，而其他C.A.R.R.I.商品不会刷新，请务必每天关注！

新的协作工具

我们决定加入一些新的机制，帮助你与你的队友更好地配合，建立临时联盟，并为新疾行者们提供更好的体验。

全新特色：保持团结

保持团结是一个疾行结束后的选项，你可以用它来与刚刚一同成功撤离的其他疾行者组建新的团队，进而与他们继续合作。只需要与一名队友共同成功撤离即可使用保持团结选项。

新消耗品:仁心包

有的时候你可能会在欠缺考虑的情况下选择先斩后奏。如果你击倒了一名敌人，但又觉得有可能将其招揽为盟友，那么你可以使用仁心包来将其复活。

  • 只有被击倒的疾行者才能使用仁心包复活。
    • 若对方已被彻底消灭，那么你将无法将其复活。
  • 仁心包无法对你的盟友或你自己使用。
  • 所有鲁克现在在生成时会默认自带一个仁心包。

近距离聊天切换

游戏中新加入了一个“切换打开”近距离聊天的选项，这样玩家就能更容易地与其他玩家沟通并达成协议。

百科挑战

完成一组全新的协作目标即可解锁一个全新的先行者称号。这些挑战将永久保留，并可在未来的赛季中完成。

给新玩家的追赶福利

在第1赛季结束之前，新玩家将会在升到五级之前获得15%的赛博艾克米和纽卡洛里声望加成。

另外，我们对外围区域（初级）进行了调整，让新玩家更容易上手。这张地图将对低于疾行者等级12的玩家以仅限单人形式开放，让在天仓五初来乍到的玩家更安全地适应环境。但是也千万不要放松警惕——UESC可不会手下留情。 

更新1.0.6已上线

我们的赛季中期更新还将推出更多内容，例如供单人疾行者使用的耗尽的自我复活包，提升合作体验的新武器芯片和外壳植入物等等。要了解今天上线的全部内容，你可以在这里阅读完整的赛季中期更新文档。祝你好运！

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.0.5.3
enUs.subtitle: The one about knives and bubble shields
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Combat

Knife

  • Reduced the maximum lunge distance by ~10% and trimmed down the targeting angle by ~20%.

Bubble Shield

  • Increased rarity from Deluxe (blue) to Superior (purple)
  • Reduced bubble HP by 33%
  • Removed vulnerability to Volt Weapon damage
  • Increased resistance to UESC damage by 17%

Runners

Stats

  • Melee Damage
    • Reduced bonus damage provided by the Melee Damage stat from a maximum of 100% to a maximum of 50% against enemy Runners. Damage against non-Runner targets is unchanged.
    • DEVELOPER NOTE: Melee in Marathon is intended to be a high-risk but potent method to contest close-quarters weapons like shotguns and submachine guns. However, the breakpoints for quick melee kills show up too early in the Melee Damage stat progression, which means additional investment into a build isn't required to get the maximum effective output. We don't want to compromise on having melee feel powerful, but believe that getting to that maximum output should be the result of meaningful buildcrafting and upgrade progression. Our goal for this change and the knife lunge changes above are that the knife remains a powerful backup tool, but requires more thoughtful play - both in and out of run - to be most effective.

Thief

  • Fixed additional Grapple-related slide cancel movement exploits.

Vault and Armory

  • Fixed an issue causing the Vault and Armory to sometimes appear to be empty.
  • Fixed an issue causing the Armory item refreshes and free daily items to not appear consistently.

Contracts

Traxus

  • Removed “in a single run” condition from Traxus Return On Investment 4/5.

Zones

Cryo Archive

  • Fixed an issue that would cause an exfil countdown to reset if the 1st crew member to enter left the circle, even if the other crew members were in the circle.

Bubble Shield Increased rarity from Deluxe (blue) to Superior (purple) Reduced bubble HP by 33% Removed vulnerability to Volt Weapon damage Increased resistance to UESC damage by 17% Runners Stats Melee Damage Reduced bonus damage provided by the Melee Damage stat from a maximum of 100% to a maximum of 50% against enemy Runners. Damage against non-Runner targets is unchanged. DEVELOPER NOTE: Melee in Marathon is intended to be a high-risk but potent method to contest close-quarters weapons like shotguns and submachine guns. However, the breakpoints for quick melee kills show up too early in the Melee Damage stat progression, which means additional investment into a build isn't required to get the maximum effective output. We don't want to compromise on having melee feel powerful, but believe that getting to that maximum output should be the result of meaningful buildcrafting and upgrade progression. Our goal for this change and the knife lunge changes above are that the knife remains a powerful backup tool, but requires more thoughtful play - both in and out of run - to be most effective. zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.0.5.3
zhChs.subtitle: 关于匕首和气泡护盾
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
战斗

匕首

  • 最大前冲距离降低约10%，瞄准角度缩小约20%。

气泡护盾

  • 稀有度从豪华（蓝色）提升至卓越（紫色）
  • 气泡生命值降低33%
  • 移除了对伏特武器伤害的易伤效果
  • 对UESC伤害的抗性提升17%

疾行者

属性

  • 近战伤害
    • 近战伤害属性提供的对敌方疾行者的额外伤害加成从最高100%降低至最高50%。对非疾行者目标的伤害不变。
    • 开发者提示：《失落星船：马拉松》中的近战旨在成为一种高风险但有效的手段，用来对抗霰弹枪和冲锋枪等近距离武器。然而，快速近战击杀的临界点在近战伤害属性推进中出现得太早，因此无需额外投入配装就能获得最大有效输出。我们不想在近战威力上做出妥协，但我们认为，获得最大输出应该通过打造装备和进行升级。此项改动及上面匕首前冲改动的目的是，让匕首继续成为一种强大的辅助工具，但需要玩家在疾行期间和非疾行期间进行更周密的安排才能发挥其最大效用。

盗贼

  • 修复了与抓钩相关的滑行取消移动漏洞。

保险库和军械库

  • 修复了保险库和军械库有时显示为空的问题。
  • 修复了军械库物品刷新和每日免费物品显示不一致的问题。

合约

特莱克斯

  • 移除了特莱克斯投资回报率4/5的“在一次疾行中”条件。

区域

低温档案室

  • 修复了即使其他队员都在圈内，如果第一个进入圈内的队员离开圈外，撤离倒计时也会重置的问题。
zhChs.bodyText: 战斗 匕首 最大前冲距离降低约10%，瞄准角度缩小约20%。 气泡护盾 稀有度从豪华（蓝色）提升至卓越（紫色） 气泡生命值降低33% 移除了对伏特武器伤害的易伤效果 对UESC伤害的抗性提升17% 疾行者 属性 近战伤害 近战伤害属性提供的对敌方疾行者的额外伤害加成从最高100%降低至最高50%。对非疾行者目标的伤害不变。 开发者提示： 《失落星船：马拉松》中的近战旨在成为一种高风险但有效的手段，用来对抗霰弹枪和冲锋枪等近距离武器。然而，快速近战击杀的临界点在近战伤害属性推进中出现得太早，因此无需额外投入配装就能获得最大有效输出。我们不想在近战威力上做出妥协，但我们认为，获得最大输出应该通过打造装备和进行升级。此项改动及上面匕首前冲改动的目的是，让匕首继续成为一种强大的辅助工具，但需要玩家在疾行期间和非疾行期间进行更周密的安排才能发挥其最大效用。 盗贼 修复了与抓钩相关的滑行取消移动漏洞。 保险库和军械库 修复了保险库和军械库有时显示为空的问题。 修复了军械库物品刷新和每日免费物品显示不一致的问题。 合约 特莱克斯 移除了特莱克斯投资回报率4/5的“在一次疾行中”条件。 区域 低温档案室 修复了即使其他队员都在圈内，如果第一个进入圈内的队员离开圈外，撤离倒计时也会重置的问题。

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.0.5.2
enUs.subtitle: The one about slide canceling
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Combat

Runner Shells

  • Fixed an issue allowing slide cancel animations to keep momentum when either pulling out equipment or Thief's Grapple Device ability.

Developer Note: One of our core philosophies for Marathon is that rapid repositioning and aggression must always have a meaningful cost. That cost can be an ability charge, heat buildup, or increased risk but it must exist and be understandable to an observer. Unbounded movement, while expressive and clip-worthy, is ultimately unhealthy for the pace of play we want to maintain for Marathon. To set expectations early, we will be looking at any future movement exploits through the same lens.

Contracts

  • Fixed an issue where players could end up locked in a room during the Introducing: NuCaloric
  • Fixed an issue where disabled contracts could not be rerolled for free.
  • Fixed an issue making the objective points visible for all Runners on the map when one Runner is on RUN/HIDE [Part 1/6].

Zones

Dire Marsh

  • Fixed an issue where the Anomalous waypoint activity was appearing below the map even when the event was inactive.

Outpost

  • Adjusted the combat area for the Tox Warden:
    • Tuned the layout to reduce the number of hiding spots.
    • Tox plants now react correctly to player presence.
  • Fixed an issue where the final exfil would spawn in the same spot every time.

Pinwheel

  • Destroyed Wing entrance has been re-opened.
  • Improved overall loot rewards.
    • This includes the quality of loose loot and small containers.
  • Updated encounters to match reward quality.
  • Changed the security credentials needed to access the locked room in the Hub.
  • Added bulletproof glass to the Hub room.

Cryo Archive

  • Fixed geometry in Vault 6 that allowed Runners to fall to their death.

Armory

  • Fixed a crash that could occur when opening the Armory.
  • Fixed a bug that was causing low framerate on Armory tabs with many items.
    • Developer Note: Traxus operates beyond scale.

Codex

  • Fixed an issue in the Ranked Challenges section causing Diamond to show before Platinum.
  • Fixed an issue with the Requiem for a Cyborg challenge so that it progresses for all players in a crew after a successful Compiler kill.

  • Fixed an issue where the shared Compiler Trace valuable was not awarding Codex progress to the other players in the crew. *Updated 4/1/26 10AM PT

UI & UX

Keybinds

  • The ESC key will now exit the keybinding menu instead of exiting settings.
  • Added an option to clear keybinds in the settings menu.
    • NOTE: Non-English languages will show this setting as blank. This will be fixed in a future patch.

Text Chat

  • Fixed an issue causing loss of control for a few seconds after using an IME keyboard in text chat while in a run.

Localization

  • Fixed an issue causing certain Codex entries to appear blank when viewing in Chinese.

Unbounded movement, while expressive and clip-worthy, is ultimately unhealthy for the pace of play we want to maintain for Marathon. zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.0.5.2
zhChs.subtitle: 关于滑行取消
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
战斗

疾行者外壳

  • 修复了在取出装备或使用盗贼的抓钩装置技能时，滑行取消动画仍能延续的问题。

开发者提示：《失落星船：马拉松》的核心理念之一是，每一次的快速位移与进攻都必须付出明确的成本。这种成本可以体现为技能充能、热量积蓄或风险提升，但必须明确存在且易于理解。虽然不受限制的移动富有表现力且容易成为高光片段，但最终不符合我们希望在《失落星船：马拉松》中维持的游戏节奏。为了尽早明确后续的游戏改进方向，我们今后将以同样的标准来审视所有移动相关的漏洞。

合约

  • 修复了玩家可能在介绍：纽卡洛里期间被锁在房间里的问题。
  • 修复了已禁用合约无法免费刷新的问题。
  • 修复了当一名疾行者在完成疾行/藏身[1/6]时，所有疾行者都会在地图上看到目标点的问题。

区域

恐怖沼泽

  • 修复了异常路径点活动在事件未激活时仍显示在地图下方的问题。

前哨

  • 调整了剧毒看守者的战斗区域：
    • 对布局进行了微调，减少了藏身点。
    • 有毒植物现在会对玩家的存在作出正确反应。
  • 修复了最终撤离每次都会生成在同一位置的问题，

风轮

  • 损毁区入口已重新开放。
  • 提升了整体战利品奖励。
    • 其中包括散落战利品和小型容器的品质。
  • 对遭遇战进行了更新，使其与奖励水平相匹配。
  • 更改了进入中心上锁房间所需的安全凭证。
  • 在中心房间中新增了防弹玻璃。

低温档案室

  • 修复了保险库6中会导致疾行者坠亡的几何结构问题。

军械库

  • 修复了开启军械库时可能发生崩溃的问题。
  • 修复了军械库选项卡在物品较多时帧率变低的问题。
    • 开发者提示：特莱克斯的规模化运作已突破限制。

百科

  • 修复了排名模式挑战中钻石会在白金之前显示的问题。
  • 修复了半机械人安魂曲挑战中的问题，使得在成功击杀编译者后，全队成员均可获得进度更新。

UI和UX

按键绑定

  • ESC键功能已调整为退出按键绑定菜单，而非退出设置界面。
  • 在设置菜单中新增了清除所有按键绑定的选项。
    • 注意：除英语外的其他语言此设置显示为空白。这将在后续补丁中修复。

文本聊天

  • 修复了玩家在疾行过程中用输入法键盘进行文本聊天后会在数秒内无法操控的问题。

本地化

  • 修复了以中文查看时，部分百科条目会显示为空白的问题。

enUs.title: Marathon Community Comms: Where To Find Us
enUs.subtitle: We’re bringing the latest and greatest, straight to you
enUs.author: Marathon Community Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
We have a soft spot for a good blog. Over the years at Bungie, they’ve been a place to gather news, share stories, and point you toward what's coming next. With Marathon, you'll see us talking in more places than ever – so we wanted to take a moment to let you know where you can find us.

Think of this blog as your one-stop shop for all things Marathon comms. If you want quick service updates, deeper context around changes, or a place to talk with other Runners, you should always know where to go and what to expect when you get there.

When we sat down to map out how we talk about Marathon with our community, three values kept rising to the top. They shape how often you hear from us, what we say, and where you will find it, whether we are walking through a small hotfix or a major update.

Think of them as the ground rules for how we show up in your feeds.

  • Low latency: When something happens, we talk about it quickly. If an issue pops up in the middle of your evening, you shouldn’t have to wait until next week to know what’s going on.
  • High accuracy: We keep updates smaller and more focused so the information you see is clear, current, and easy to trust.
  • Close to you: We share news in the places you already check. That means Discord, in-game notices, and social channels you use every day.

Everything that follows in this post ties back to these three values, and how they show up across each of our channels.

Here’s a quick rundown on how we plan to share info on other platforms.

Service and Status

If something might change your night, start on Discord. The #marathon-news and #server-status channels are where we post first. You can also find the latest server updates from BungieServerStatus on Twitter and Bluesky. (And for major events, you’ll also see an in-game message.)

Maintenance gets the full set, both on Discord and BungieServerStatus. Heads up the day before, a reminder an hour out, a start post with the expected end time, then a done post that includes a link to any relevant patch notes.

Depth and Context

When you want the “why” behind the “what,” make sure to point yourself here to Bungie.net for any lengthier blog updates. These will be on less of a specific cadence, so keep your eyes on our MarathonTheGame social media channels to ensure you don’t miss them when they arrive.

Discord is the Hub

We are standing up clear, focused channels so you can choose your own signal to receive.

  • #marathon-news: Where you’ll find all of our latest updates as they happen – and thankfully, it’s also a Discord Announcements channel so you can import it directly to your own server.
  • #server-status: Any updates that are relevant to your gameplay experience will land here.
  • #dev-updates: Patch notes, feature updates, and known issue lists will all land in here. Follow here to make sure you get the nitty gritty details.
  • #marathon-community-art-chat: A great place to drop by to find out some of the latest and greatest creators and artists in the Marathon community.

In-Game Notices

When something is critical, we will use in-game messages to reach everyone. That includes incidents, maintenance windows, updates, system changes, and known severe issue disclaimers.

We may also use this space to raise awareness for community events and special opportunities from time to time, but won’t be delivering every single piece of info here to avoid overwhelming your in-game mailboxes.

Social Media

We know a great many of you spend your time out in the wild world of social media. It just so happens, we do too.

  • On @MarathonTheGame, you’ll see the big picture. That’s where we will share trailers, major announcements, events, and community highlights, the kinds of updates you’ll want to share with your crew.
  • On @MarathonDevTeam, we will go deeper into the details. Expect links to patch notes, system updates, developer insights, and more of the nuts and bolts from the team building the game.

We’ll keep our posts clear and direct. If you have thoughts, questions, or longer feedback, Reddit, Steam, and Discord will be great places for us to dig in with you. We have accounts across the board, so keep an eye out for us!

Behind the Curtain

Together with our colleagues here at Bungie, we run a bevy of cross-functional syncs with teams across Design, Engineering, Support, Live Ops, Comms, and more. These teams will also work with us to make sure that we’re erring on the side of accuracy - and, from time to time, you might see a post directly from one of them as well.

All in all though, our goal as the Marathon Community Team remains abundantly clear - to make sure that you always have the latest and most accurate information possible.

Where to Follow

For big moments, trailers, and highlights you’ll want to share with your Crew, be sure to follow our official Marathon social channels:

  • Official Discord
  • Twitter
  • YouTube
  • Bluesky
  • TikTok
  • Instagram
  • Twitch

For information and insights from the Marathon Development Team itself, be sure to follow us on your social channels of choice:

  • Twitter
  • Bluesky
  • Reddit
  • Steam Forums
  • Steam Blog

And of course, for live service updates, maintenance timing, and anything that might affect your ability to play, be sure to follow our BungieServerStatus social media channels:

  • Twitter
  • Bluesky

What to do Today

Join the Discord and follow a Discord Announcement channel or two. 

Follow the accounts above. 

If you spot an issue, don’t hesitate to shout it out and let us know. 

We will keep tuning it with you.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》社区通讯：官方渠道
zhChs.subtitle: 第一时间为你呈现最新、最优质的内容
zhChs.author: Marathon Community Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
我们始终欣赏用心撰写的优质博客。多年来，Bungie的博客一直是汇集资讯、分享故事，并带你了解未来动态的重要平台。围绕《失落星船：马拉松》，我们的沟通平台将比过去更加多元，因此我们想借此机会介绍这些信息发布渠道。

你可以把这篇博客看作获取《失落星船：马拉松》通讯的一站式服务点。无论你是想获取快速的服务更新、深入了解改动背景，还是与其他疾行者交流，都应该明确知道该前往何处、以及能在那里获得哪些信息。

在我们思考与社区探讨与交流《失落星船：马拉松》的方式时，有三项理念被反复强调并成为重中之重。无论是进行小型热修复还是大型更新，这些理念都会影响我们的沟通频率、内容以及发布渠道。

你可以将它们理解为我们在发布动态时所遵循的基本准则。

  • 快速响应：一旦出现任何情况，我们会尽快进行说明。即便你在夜间游戏时发现问题，也无需等上一周才能了解情况。
  • 高度准确：我们会将更新内容控制得更加精简明确，确保信息的清晰度、即时性和可靠性。
  • 触手可及：我们会在你平时关注的平台上发布消息。其中包括Discord、游戏内通知，以及你每天使用的各类社交渠道。

本文接下来的所有内容都将基于这三项理念，并说明它们在不同渠道中的落实方式。

下面简单介绍一下我们将如何在其他平台上发布信息。

服务与状态

如有任何可能影响你当晚游戏的改动，我们会首先发布于Discord。最新消息通常会第一时间发布在#marathon-news和#server-status频道。你还可以在Twitter和Bluesky的BungieServerStatus账号查看最新的服务器更新。（如遇重大活动，会通过游戏内消息同步发布。）

维护相关信息会完整发布在Discord和BungieServerStatus上。我们会提前一天发布预告、提前一小时提醒、在维护开始时公布预计结束时间，并在结束后发布完成通知并附上相关更新文档链接。

背景与详解

如果你想了解“改动”背后的“原因”，可以前往Bungie.net查看更详细的博客更新。此类内容不会按固定频率发布，因此请关注《失落星船：马拉松》社交媒体渠道，以免错过更新资讯。

枢纽平台Discord

我们正在打造结构清晰的频道体系，方便你按需选择想要接收的资讯。

  • #marathon-news：所有最新消息都会在此处实时发布，同时它也是Discord的公告频道，你可以直接将其导入到自己的服务器。
  • #server-status：所有与游戏体验相关的更新会集中在此处发布。
  • #dev-updates：更新文档、功能更新和已知问题列表会集中在此处发布。关注该频道，确保自己不会错过任何细节信息。
  • #marathon-community-art-chat：这里也是发现《失落星船：马拉松》社区中优秀新人创作者与艺术家的好去处。

游戏内通知

出现重要情况时，我们会通过游戏内通知向所有玩家传达信息。这其中包括各类事件、维护安排、更新、系统变更，以及已知重大问题的声明。

我们也会不时利用这个渠道宣传社区活动或特殊机会，但不会把所有内容都放在这里，以免淹没你的游戏内邮箱。

社交媒体

我们知道很多玩家经常活跃在社交媒体上。恰好，我们也一样在5G冲浪。

  • 在@MarathonTheGame，你能够掌握整体情况与全局信息。我们将在此处发布预告片、重大公告、活动信息以及社区精选内容，这些都是值得和队友一起分享的内容。
  • @MarathonDevTeam将带你了解更详细、更深入的信息。你可以在这里查看更新文档、系统更新、开发者见解以及更多游戏开发背后的具体信息。

我们的发布内容将尽量清晰明了、直奔重点。如果你想分享自己的想法、问题或详细反馈，Reddit、Steam和Discord都是我们可以共同深入探讨的平台。我们的社交账号遍布多个平台，记得关注我们！

幕后揭秘

在Bungie同事们的协作下，我们会与设计、工程、客户支持、实时运营、沟通等多团队保持跨职能同步。这些团队也会与我们合作，优先保证信息准确性——有时你可能会看到由其中某个团队直接发布的博客内容。

总而言之，《失落星船：马拉松》社区团队的目标始终明确，那就是持续为你提供最及时、最可靠的资讯。

关注渠道

想第一时间掌握重要动态、预告片以及值得与队友分享的精彩内容，请关注官方《失落星船：马拉松》社交渠道：

  • 官方Discord
  • Twitter
  • YouTube
  • Bluesky
  • TikTok
  • Instagram
  • Twitch

想了解《失落星船：马拉松》开发团队的最新信息和深度解析，请通过你常用的社交渠道关注我们：

  • Twitter
  • Bluesky
  • Reddit
  • Steam论坛
  • Steam博客

此外，如需获取有关实时服务更新、维护时间及其他可能影响游戏体验的事项信息，请关注我们的BungieServerStatus社交媒体渠道：

  • Twitter
  • Bluesky

今日行动指南

加入Discord，选择一两个公告频道进行关注。 

关注上文提到的各个账号。 

遇到任何问题，请随时向我们反馈。 

我们会与大家一起持续优化游戏。

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.0.5.1
enUs.subtitle: The one about Cryo Archive (Cont.)
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Item Economy

  • Unowned Cryo Archive shell styles are now visible within the Customization menu to mirror Codex visibility.

Runner Shells

Thief

  • Fixed an issue that allowed the Pickpocket Drone’s cooldown to be refreshed by pressing the Prime Ability button as it times out.

Zones

Outpost

  • Fixed out of bounds geometry that would allow unintended entry into the Pinwheel.
  • Fixed geometry that would allow out of bounds access near Dormitories.

Cryo Archive

  • Fixed some environmental security door wall art render distance.
  • Fixed some geometry that would allow loose items to fall through the environment.

User Interface and Experience

Pings

  • Fixed an issue causing exfils on overhead map to disappear when pinging and unpinging repeatedly.

Codex

  • Fixed and updated localization for Ranked cosmetic challenges for Gold and Diamond.

Contracts

  • Fixed an issue causing the contract reroll refresh timer to show as +1 week.

CyberAcme

  • Fixed an issue that was blocking contracts and showing as “Contract Disabled.”

Stability

  • Fixed a variety of issues that were causing crashing, kicked to lobby errors, and general stability.

Localization

  • Fixed various errors in localization for Cryo Archive Codex entries.
enUs.bodyText: Item Economy Unowned Cryo Archive shell styles are now visible within the Customization menu to mirror Codex visibility. Runner Shells Thief Fixed an issue that allowed the Pickpocket Drone’s cooldown to be refreshed by pressing the Prime Ability button as it times out. Zones Outpost Fixed out of bounds geometry that would allow unintended entry into the Pinwheel. Fixed geometry that would allow out of bounds access near Dormitories. Cryo Archive Fixed some environmental security door wall art render distance. Fixed some geometry that would allow loose items to fall through the environment. User Interface and Experience Pings Fixed an issue causing exfils on overhead map to disappear when pinging and unpinging repeatedly. Codex Fixed and updated localization for Ranked cosmetic challenges for Gold and Diamond. Contracts Fixed an issue causing the contract reroll refresh timer to show as +1 week. CyberAcme Fixed an issue that was blocking contracts and showing as “Contract Disabled.” Stability Fixed a variety of issues that were causing crashing, kicked to lobby errors, and general stability. Localization Fixed various errors in localization for Cryo Archive Codex entries.

zhChs.title: 更新1.0.5.1
zhChs.subtitle: 关于低温档案室（续）
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
物品经济

  • 现在，未拥有的低温档案室外壳风格会在自定义菜单中显示，使其与百科中的显示一致。

疾行者外壳

盗贼

  • 修复了窃贼无人机冷却时间即将结束时，按下主要技能按钮即可刷新冷却时间的问题。

区域

前哨

  • 修复了超出边界的几何体会导致玩家意外进入风轮的问题。
  • 修复了宿舍附近超出边界几何体的访问权限问题。

低温档案室

  • 修复了部分环境安全门墙饰的渲染距离。
  • 修复了部分几何体可能导致散落物品穿过环境的问题。

用户界面和体验

标记

  • 修复了在俯视地图上反复标记和取消标记会导致撤离点消失的问题。

百科

  • 修复并更新了黄金和钻石排名装饰挑战的本地化内容。

合约

  • 修复了合约刷新计时器显示+1周的问题。

赛博艾克米

  • 修复了合约被阻止并显示“合约已禁用”的问题。

稳定性

  • 修复了导致游戏崩溃、被踢回大厅错误以及整体稳定性的各种问题。

本地化

  • 修复了低温档案室百科条目的本地化错误。
zhChs.bodyText: 物品经济 现在，未拥有的低温档案室外壳风格会在自定义菜单中显示，使其与百科中的显示一致。 疾行者外壳 盗贼 修复了窃贼无人机冷却时间即将结束时，按下主要技能按钮即可刷新冷却时间的问题。 区域 前哨 修复了超出边界的几何体会导致玩家意外进入风轮的问题。 修复了宿舍附近超出边界几何体的访问权限问题。 低温档案室 修复了部分环境安全门墙饰的渲染距离。 修复了部分几何体可能导致散落物品穿过环境的问题。 用户界面和体验 标记 修复了在俯视地图上反复标记和取消标记会导致撤离点消失的问题。 百科 修复并更新了黄金和钻石排名装饰挑战的本地化内容。 合约 修复了合约刷新计时器显示+1周的问题。 赛博艾克米 修复了合约被阻止并显示“合约已禁用”的问题。 稳定性 修复了导致游戏崩溃、被踢回大厅错误以及整体稳定性的各种问题。 本地化 修复了低温档案室百科条目的本地化错误。

enUs.title: Welcome to Cryo Archive
enUs.subtitle: Gear up, grab your crew, and fight your way through the UESC Marathon.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
After poring over terminals, chasing coordinates, and collectively galaxy-braining your way through our latest ARG, you've made your way to the doorstep of the UESC Marathon. Before you step aboard the derelict vessel, an unknown AI reaches out to all Runners who believe they can survive the journey.

Drop by our official Discord and Twitter to correspond with NULL//TRANSMIT.ERR, a signal from far across the stars.

But don't let this presence distract you from the task at hand: The countdown to Cryo Archive has begun. You've got less than a day to prepare yourself to take on the end-game zone aboard the UESC Marathon, which opens for the first time tomorrow, March 20.

Godspeed.

Welcome to Cryo Archive

The UESC Marathon ship left Mars for the Tau Ceti solar system in 2472. It arrived 300 years later. Then… silence. Contact with the 30,000 colonists who set out to make a new home on an alien world was lost.

Decades later, the Marathon ship still hangs abandoned in orbit, a frozen snapshot of the past promising valuable resources and information for anyone brave enough to make the trek and survive.

Cryo Archive is the first deck of the UESC Marathon, where you'll find a labyrinth of cryopods, medical bays, and storage wings where colonists once eased into and out of deep sleep on their journey across the stars.

In game, Cryo Archive takes you through six interconnected wings with a central hub. Traverse from wing-to-hub and back again in search of frozen Vaults containing powerful loot and dark secrets. Battle your way through intense UESC security, decked out Runner crews, and a ship that seems hellbent on keeping you out.

Here's a few quick notes before you dive in:

  • Intensity: Cranked to the top. Cryo Archive is a pinnacle challenge and will take many runs to learn and master.
  • Playstyle: Think raid-style puzzle solving and layered mechanics wrapped around brutal extraction stakes.
  • Design: A labyrinthian layout where tight corridors give way to massive open spaces, pitting enemy crews against each other to unseal frozen Vaults.

Getting on the Ship

Cryo Archive opens up for play on the weekends, starting this Friday, March 20.

It's designed to be taken on by a team of Runners, so you'll need a crew of three. Grab some friends, find allies in our community Discord, or queue up solo with fill to be matched with a Cryo-ready team.

To queue for Cryo Archive, you'll need:

  • Minimum Runner Level: 25
  • All six factions unlocked (liaison contracts completed)
  • Minimum Loadout Value: 5,000 credits
    • This is the value of your equipped gear, not an additional cost

If you meet these requirements, you'll also be eligible for a one-time Cryo Archive Sponsored Kit from the Armory. This is a bundle of blue-tier gear specifically tuned to get you through an early Cryo Archive run without having to risk your favorite items on attempt number one.

Security Clearance: Earn Your Way Through

Cryo Archive runs on Security Clearance, a progression you build up over the course of a single run by interacting with the ship's systems and surviving long enough to leverage them.

Systems in Cryo Archive, including doors, supply rooms, and exfils, are locked behind specific Security Clearance levels. The more important the system, the higher the clearance you'll need to use it.

Vaults of the Marathon

Cryo Archive is threaded with seven Vaults. These heavily-secured rooms have some of the most lucrative loot in the game, some of which you can't find anywhere else.

To access each Vault, you'll need to complete its unique entry challenge or access requirements. Each Vault also requires a specific Vault Key for entry.

You can find Vault Keys on the planet-side zones, with higher-risk and investment activities being more likely to yield Vault Keys. You can also find Vault Keys on the ship itself, both within locked Vaults and by downing enemy Runner crews and stealing their goods for yourself.

Once you're inside a Vault, you'll work through tense puzzle interactions and race against other crews who know exactly how valuable these rooms are.

Across the set of Vaults, you will chase:

  • High-tier containers loaded with valuables, materials, and top-end equipment

  • Unique gold weapons stored in special weapon lockers

  • A path toward assembling a DN~~~%^&*()8167f48f-e253-4e2f-be4c-2077b646d531+{}:"<>?~~ that leads deeper into the Marathon's secrets and towa~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"<>?~~~~~~~

Getting Off the Ship

Exfils on Cryo Archive are less reliable and follow different rules than the planet-side zones. You'll need to learn how exfils work to secure your way off the ship.

Contracts in the Cold... Plus Rewards

If you like structure with your suffering, Cryo Archive contracts are there for you.

Here's how they work:

  • When Cryo Archive is available, a pool of seven unique Cryo contracts appears in CyberAcme.

  • You and your crew can re-roll which contract is active so you're all working toward the same objective during a run.
  • Completing a contract removes it from your pool for that week.
  • When Cryo Archive returns the next weekend, progress resets and the full slate returns.

Each contract you complete provides you with a random high-rarity item, which could be a locked room key, Vault key, material, or piece of gear.

There are also unique Codex rewards you can earn for you Cryo Archive progress, including a style (skin) for all six Runner shells and more. Your Codex progression carries over from week-to-week and does not reset.

When the Timer Hits Zero

A few reminders before you embark on your next great journey in the stars:

  • Prepare your shells — Cryo Archive unlocks when the timer hits zero tomorrow.

  • It's Marathon's first end-game zone, a high intensity, raid-style PvPvE activity built around security systems, Vault chases, and contested exfils.

  • You will need Runner Level 25, all six factions unlocked, and a 5,000 credit loadout to queue up.

  • Security Clearance, Vault Keys, and Cryo contracts are your main avenues for exceptional loot once you're inside.

  • Cryo Archive is open on the weekends starting this Friday, March 20.

There are more secrets waiting for you in the frozen halls of the Marathon.

You have not seen every locked room, hacked every terminal, or met every presence that is watching from somewhere deep in the ship's Panopticon.

Best of luck.

Welcome to Cryo Archive The UESC Marathon ship left Mars for the Tau Ceti solar system in 2472. It arrived 300 years later. Then… silence. Contact with the 30,000 colonists who set out to make a new home on an alien world was lost. Decades later, the Marathon ship still hangs abandoned in orbit, a frozen snapshot of the past promising valuable resources and information for anyone brave enough to make the trek and survive. Cryo Archive is the first deck of the UESC Marathon, where you'll find a labyrinth of cryopods, medical bays, and storage wings where colonists once eased into and out of deep sleep on their journey across the stars. In game, Cryo Archive takes you through six interconnected wings with a central hub. Traverse from wing-to-hub and back again in search of frozen Vaults containing powerful loot and dark secrets. Battle your way through intense UESC security, decked out Runner crews, and a ship that seems hellbent on keeping you out. Here's a few quick notes before you dive in: Intensity: Cranked to the top. Cryo Archive is a pinnacle challenge and will take many runs to learn and master. Playstyle: Think raid-style puzzle solving and layered mechanics wrapped around brutal extraction stakes. Design: A labyrinthian layout where tight corridors give way to massive open spaces, pitting enemy crews against each other to unseal frozen Vaults. Getting on the Ship Cryo Archive opens up for play on the weekends, starting this Friday, March 20. It's designed to be taken on by a team of Runners, so you'll need a crew of three. Grab some friends, find allies in our community Discord , or queue up solo with fill to be matched with a Cryo-ready team. To queue for Cryo Archive, you'll need: Minimum Runner Level: 25 All six factions unlocked (liaison contracts completed) Minimum Loadout Value: 5,000 credits This is the value of your equipped gear, not an additional cost If you meet these requirements, you'll also be eligible for a one-time Cryo Archive Sponsored Kit from the Armory. This is a bundle of blue-tier gear specifically tuned to get you through an early Cryo Archive run without having to risk your favorite items on attempt number one. Security Clearance: Earn Your Way Through Cryo Archive runs on Security Clearance, a progression you build up over the course of a single run by interacting with the ship's systems and surviving long enough to leverage them. Systems in Cryo Archive, including doors, supply rooms, and exfils, are locked behind specific Security Clearance levels. The more important the system, the higher the clearance you'll need to use it. Vaults of the Marathon Cryo Archive is threaded with seven Vaults. These heavily-secured rooms have some of the most lucrative loot in the game, some of which you can't find anywhere else. To access each Vault, you'll need to complete its unique entry challenge or access requirements. Each Vault also requires a specific Vault Key for entry. You can find Vault Keys on the planet-side zones, with higher-risk and investment activities being more likely to yield Vault Keys. You can also find Vault Keys on the ship itself, both within locked Vaults and by downing enemy Runner crews and stealing their goods for yourself. Once you're inside a Vault, you'll work through tense puzzle interactions and race against other crews who know exactly how valuable these rooms are. Across the set of Vaults, you will chase: High-tier containers loaded with valuables, materials, and top-end equipment Unique gold weapons stored in special weapon lockers A path toward assembling a DN~~~%^&*()8167f48f-e253-4e2f-be4c-2077b646d531+{}:"<>?~~ that leads deeper into the Marathon's secrets and towa~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"<>?~~~~~~~ Getting Off the Ship Exfils on Cryo Archive are less reliable and follow different rules than the planet-side zones. You'll need to learn how exfils work to secure your way off the ship. Contracts in the Cold... Plus Rewards If you like structure with your suffering, Cryo Archive contracts are there for you. Here's how they work: When Cryo Archive is available, a pool of seven unique Cryo contracts appears in CyberAcme. You and your crew can re-roll which contract is active so you're all working toward the same objective during a run. Completing a contract removes it from your pool for that week. When Cryo Archive returns the next weekend, progress resets and the full slate returns. Each contract you complete provides you with a random high-rarity item, which could be a locked room key, Vault key, material, or piece of gear. There are also unique Codex rewards you can earn for you Cryo Archive progress, including a style (skin) for all six Runner shells and more. Your Codex progression carries over from week-to-week and does not reset. When the Timer Hits Zero A few reminders before you embark on your next great journey in the stars: Prepare your shells — Cryo Archive unlocks when the timer hits zero tomorrow. It's Marathon's first end-game zone, a high intensity, raid-style PvPvE activity built around security systems, Vault chases, and contested exfils. You will need Runner Level 25, all six factions unlocked, and a 5,000 credit loadout to queue up. Security Clearance, Vault Keys, and Cryo contracts are your main avenues for exceptional loot once you're inside. Cryo Archive is open on the weekends starting this Friday, March 20. There are more secrets waiting for you in the frozen halls of the Marathon. You have not seen every locked room, hacked every terminal, or met every presence that is watching from somewhere deep in the ship's Panopticon. Best of luck.

zhChs.title: 欢迎来到低温档案室
zhChs.subtitle: 整装待发，召集队伍，在UESC马拉松号中杀出重围。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
在《失落星船：马拉松》的最新ARG中，玩家们通过仔细研究终端、追踪坐标和集思广益，终于打开了通往UESC马拉松号的道路。在登上这艘废弃飞船之前，一个未知的人工智能会联系所有相信自己能活着完成旅程的疾行者。

请通过我们的官方Discord和Twitter，与来自遥远星空的无效//传输.错误信号进行交流。

但不要让这个信号分散你的注意力：低温档案室倒计时已经开始。UESC马拉松号的终局区域将于3月21日首次开放，你只有不到一天的时间准备迎接挑战。

祝你好运。

欢迎来到低温档案室

UESC马拉松号飞船于2472年离开了火星，前往天仓五星系。300年后抵达。随后…一切归于沉寂。3万名前往异星建立新家园的殖民者们失去了音讯。

数十年后，马拉松号飞船仍然废弃在轨道上，过去在此定格，珍贵的资源和信息正等待着踏上征程并顺利存活的勇士。

低温档案室是UESC马拉松号的第一层甲板，这里有迷宫般的低温舱、医疗舱和储物舱，曾经是殖民者在星际旅程中休眠和苏醒的地方。

在游戏中，低温档案室将带你穿过六个相互连接的区域，并且有一个中心枢纽。穿越各个区域和枢纽，寻找包含强力战利品和黑暗秘密的冰冻保险库。突破UESC的严密安保，对抗全副武装的疾行者，抵挡飞船的层层阻挠，奋力杀出重围。

开始前请注意以下几点：

  • 难度：难度极高。低温档案室挑战难度很高，需要多次尝试疾行才能掌握。
  • 游戏风格：残酷的撤离行动融合了突袭式的解谜和层层递进的机制。
  • 设计：迷宫般的布局，狭窄的走廊与广阔的开放空间交错，与敌队相互厮杀，解封冰冻保险库。

登上飞船

低温档案室将于本周六（3月21日）起在周末开放。

它须以团队形式参加，因此你需要组建三人队伍。邀请好友、在社区Discord寻找盟友，或者单人排队，让系统匹配好一支队伍前去挑战低温档案室。

若要排队进入低温档案室，你需要满足以下条件：

  • 最低疾行者等级：25
  • 解锁全部六个阵营（完成联络人合约）
  • 最低装备价值：5000信用点
    • 这是你已装备的装备价值，并非额外费用

如果你满足以上要求，还将能从军械库获得一次低温档案室赞助包。这是一套蓝色级别的装备组合包，能帮助你完成早期的低温档案室疾行，这样你无需在首次尝试时就冒险使用心仪的物品。

安全权限：沿途斩获

低温档案室的运行依赖于安全权限，你可以通过与飞船系统互动并存活足够长的时间，逐步提升安全权限等级并加以利用。

低温档案室的系统，包括门、补给室和撤离点，都需要特定的安全权限等级才能解锁。系统越重要，需要的权限等级就越高。

马拉松号保险库

低温档案室有七个保险库。这些戒备森严的房间藏有一些超丰厚的游戏战利品，其中一些是其他地方无法找到的。

若要进入每个保险库，你需要完成相应的独特挑战或满足其权限要求。每个保险库需要特定的保险库钥匙才能进入。

你可以在星球表面区域找到保险库钥匙，高风险和高投资活动更容易获得保险库钥匙。你也可以在飞船上找到保险库钥匙，包括上锁的保险库内以及击倒敌方疾行者团队并窃取其物品。

进入保险库后，你将面临紧张刺激的解谜互动，并与其他了解其价值的团队展开竞赛。

在各个保险库中，你将追寻：

  • 装满货品、材料和顶级装备的高级容器

  • 存放在特殊武器柜中的独特黄金武器

  • 一条通往组成DN~~~%^&*()8167f48f-e253-4e2f-be4c-2077b646d531+\{}:"<>?~~的道路，带你深入马拉松号的秘密并通往~~~~%^&*()_+\{}:"<>?~~~~~~~

离开飞船

低温档案室的撤离不如星球表面区域可靠，且遵循不同的规则。你需要了解撤离运作方式，才能确保安全离开飞船。

寒冷合约…还有奖励

如果你喜欢在痛苦中寻求秩序，低温档案室的合约正适合你。

运作方式如下：

  • 低温档案室开放期间，赛博艾克米会出现七个独特的低温合约。

  • 你和队友可以刷新当前激活的合约，使大家在每次疾行中朝着同一个目标努力。
  • 合约完成后，它将从你当周的合约池中移除。
  • 当低温档案室在下周末再次开放时，进度将重置，所有合约将重新出现。

你完成的每个合约都会获得一件随机的高稀有度物品，可能是上锁房间钥匙、保险库钥匙、材料或装备。

你还可以通过完成低温档案室进度来获得独特的百科奖励，包括所有六种疾行者外壳的样式（皮肤）等。你的百科进度每周会保留，不会重置。

倒计时归零

在你踏上星际旅程之前，请注意以下几点：

  • 准备好外壳——低温档案室将于明天倒计时归零时解锁。

  • 这是《失落星船：马拉松》的第一个终局区域，是一项围绕安全系统、保险库追寻和撤离竞赛展开的高强度、突袭风格的PvPvE活动。

  • 你需要达到25级疾行者等级，解锁全部六个阵营，并拥有5000信用点的装备才能排队。

  • 进入后，安全权限、保险库钥匙和低温合约是你获取顶级战利品的主要途径。

  • 低温档案室将于本周六（3月21日）起在周末开放。

马拉松号的冰封大厅里还有更多秘密等待着你。

你还没看过每一间上锁房间，没破解每一台终端，也没遇到从飞船的圆形监狱深处监视你的存在。

祝你好运。

enUs.title: Ranked in Marathon
enUs.subtitle: Gear up for glory.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Put your survival skills to the test, climb the competitive ladder, and prove you’re a top Runner on Tau Ceti in Ranked mode.

Your first chance to play Ranked is this weekend, March 21 at 10:00 AM PT – March 24 at 10:00 AM PT.

Ranked mode is in beta for Season 1, and as a feature that’s still in development, we’re looking for substantial feedback from you all to continue shaping Ranked mode into the best version it can be.

Overview

Ranked is designed to test everything you’ve learned in Marathon, including looting, PvP success, and strategic risk taking. You’ll earn score based on your performance on a run, with your score target determined by a new item: the Holotag (more on that below).

You’ll earn Ranked Points (RP) by meeting your score target in a run. Over time, you can climb through six ranks (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, and Pinnacle) with three tiers each (Bronze 3, Bronze 2, Bronze 1, etc.).

At the end of the season, you’ll secure rewards based on the highest rank you earned during the season, even if your final standing is lower — we don’t want the fear of losing rewards to stop you from playing.

Each season will bring a unique set of rewards you can only earn from playing Ranked.

Season 1's rewards will include:

  • A Ranked emblem for the highest rank you achieved that season, plus...
  • Pinnacle
    • Gun Style
    • Title
  • Diamond
    • Gun Style
  • Platinum
    • Gun Style
  • Gold
    • Runner Shell Style (Destroyer)
    • Title
  • Silver
    • Player Background

We’ll share the full details on these rewards and how to secure them as the season progresses.

Additionally, each time you earn a new rank each season, you’ll get a loot package, which contains gear and room keys to randomly-selected zones.

Ranked Availability

You must be Runner Level 25 to queue for Ranked.

Ranked opens up for play on the weekends, with each weekend featuring a different planet-side zone: Perimeter, Dire Marsh, or Outpost. The first weekend will be on Perimeter.

All crew sizes will be matched together for Ranked — so bring friends to help or go as a lone wolf to test your skills against opposing crews.

Bet on Yourself: Choose Your Stakes

When you queue for Ranked, you have two options: Low Stakes and High Stakes. These are separate Matchmaking pools, with different requirements for entry.

  • Low Stakes Queue (Ranked)
    • Minimum gear ante: 3,000
    • Minimum Holotag tier: Bronze
  • High Stakes Queue (Ranked+)
    • Minimum gear ante: 10,000
    • Minimum Holotag tier: Platinum

Note that the first weekend of Ranked will only have Low Stakes queue available to give people a chance to start climbing the ladder and prepare for High Stakes.

Let’s breakdown gear ante and Holotags.

Gear Ante

The gear ante is the minimum requirement on your equipped gear’s value in credits.

For reference, the 3,000 gear ante is about the equivalent of a set of Enhanced (green) gear with a few Deluxe (blue) pieces. The 10,000 gear ante is about the equivalent of a set of Deluxe gear with a few Superior (purple) pieces.

Having a gear ante ensures everyone in your match is putting a minimum amount on the line to compete—no being matched with a teammate going on a naked knife run, or downing enemy Runners with just Sponsored Kits.

Holotags

In addition to the gear ante, you must bring one Holotag in your backpack to queue for Ranked. You can purchase Holotags using credits in the Armory, or if you defeat an enemy Runner and exfil with their Holotag, you can use it for your future runs.

There are six tiers of holotags: Bronze, Silver, and Gold (Low Stakes) and Platinum, Diamond, and Pinnacle (High Stakes). You can purchase up to your current rank of Holotag tier in the Armory. So if you’re Gold, you can purchase Gold, Silver, and Bronze Holotags; if you’re Platinum, you can unlock Platinum, Gold, Silver, and Bronze, etc.

How Does Scoring Work?

tl;dr:

  • You have a score target set by your team’s Holotag values
  • Loot valuable items to get score
  • Once you reach your score target, exfil to get Rated Points
  • If you exfil before you hit your target, you don't get Rated Points
  • If you die, you lose Rated Points based on your team's Holotag values
  • You can get bonus Rated Points, aka overperformance capacity, by looting enemy player’s Holotags or collecting Tag Chips from UESC and map events

At the highest level, the Ranked Points you earn are based on the value of loot your crew collects and exfils with on your run. When your loot meter fills up, it's time to exfil.

Want to go deeper? Buckle up.

The Holotag you bring into the match sets two important values for your run: a score target and a loss penalty.

The credit value of loot you find counts towards your crew’s score, excluding certain items like ammo and consumables. When your crew reaches its score target, any additional loot does not count, unless you loot enemy Holotags that grant you overperformance capacity and allow you to earn over your initial score target.

Here’s the complete breakdown:

  • Score target = minimum total loot value your team needs to exfil with to earn Ranked Points
    • Your score target is decided by your team’s combined Holotag value
    • Starting loadouts don’t count towards your score target
    • Exfil at your score target to earn RP
    • Exfil with less than your score target, and your Rank has no change
  • Overperformance capacity = how much loot over that score target you can earn bonus points for
    • This number starts at zero
    • You can gain overperformance capacity by looting enemy Runner Holotags or Tag Chips, which drop from high-value UESC and in-run activities
  • Loss penalty = how much you lose by failing to exfil
    • This number is decided by you team’s combined Holotag value
    • You only lose RP if you fail to exfil

Note that Holotags persist after exfil so you can use them on your next run. You can sell Holotags for full value after exfil.

Want to do the math? Here are the numbers:

TierCostScore TargetLoss PenaltyOverperformance Capacity
Bronze Holotag5003,000600600
Silver Holotag7505,0002,0001,000
Gold Holotag10007,0004,2001,500
Platinum Holotag150010,0008,0002,250
Diamond Holotag200015,00015,0003,250
Pinnacle Holotag350020,00020,0005,000

You can also find lootable Tag Chips during a Ranked match by defeating UESC and engaging with map events. Tag Chips count as valuable loot towards your score target, and they also grant overperformance capacity. Tag Chips auto-sell on exfil.

TierValueOverperformance CapacityMax Stack Size
Tag Chip2504005
Polished Tag Chip70010003

This is a lot to take in, so to summarize:

The better you and your team’s Holotags, the more Ranked Points you can earn from a run. Higher-tier Holotags require you to exfil with more loot to reap the benefits, and they bring a higher loss penalty if you die. But if you only bring in lower-tier Holotags, you’ll hit your score cap more quickly and have less potential upside per run.

Or in professional terms... you need to risk it for the biscuit.

Up Next...

Your first chance to play Ranked starts on Saturday, March 21 at 10:00 AM PT until Tuesday, March 24 at 10:00 AM PT on Perimeter. This will be Low Stakes queue only to give people time to gear up and prep for High Stakes runs.

Ranked mode is in beta for Season 1, and we’ll be watching closely for your feedback. Send us your thoughts in our official Discord, and keep an eye on our Marathon Development Team accounts on Twitter, Bluesky, and Discord. We’ll keep you posted on what we’re hearing and adjustments we’re making, both for Ranked and all things Marathon.

Good luck in your first Ranked runs!
enUs.bodyText: Put your survival skills to the test, climb the competitive ladder, and prove you’re a top Runner on Tau Ceti in Ranked mode . Your first chance to play Ranked is this weekend, March 21 at 10:00 AM PT – March 24 at 10:00 AM PT . Ranked mode is in beta for Season 1, and as a feature that’s still in development, we’re looking for substantial feedback from you all to continue shaping Ranked mode into the best version it can be. Overview Ranked is designed to test everything you’ve learned in Marathon, including looting, PvP success, and strategic risk taking. You’ll earn score based on your performance on a run, with your score target determined by a new item: the Holotag (more on that below). You’ll earn Ranked Points (RP) by meeting your score target in a run. Over time, you can climb through six ranks (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, and Pinnacle) with three tiers each (Bronze 3, Bronze 2, Bronze 1, etc.). At the end of the season, you’ll secure rewards based on the highest rank you earned during the season , even if your final standing is lower — we don’t want the fear of losing rewards to stop you from playing. Each season will bring a unique set of rewards you can only earn from playing Ranked. Season 1's rewards will include: A Ranked emblem for the highest rank you achieved that season, plus... Pinnacle Gun Style Title Diamond Gun Style Platinum Gun Style Gold Runner Shell Style (Destroyer) Title Silver Player Background We’ll share the full details on these rewards and how to secure them as the season progresses. Additionally, each time you earn a new rank each season, you’ll get a loot package, which contains gear and room keys to randomly-selected zones. Ranked Availability You must be Runner Level 25 to queue for Ranked. Ranked opens up for play on the weekends , with each weekend featuring a different planet-side zone : Perimeter, Dire Marsh, or Outpost. The first weekend will be on Perimeter. All crew sizes will be matched together for Ranked — so bring friends to help or go as a lone wolf to test your skills against opposing crews. Bet on Yourself: Choose Your Stakes When you queue for Ranked, you have two options: Low Stakes and High Stakes . These are separate Matchmaking pools, with different requirements for entry. Low Stakes Queue (Ranked) Minimum gear ante: 3,000 Minimum Holotag tier: Bronze High Stakes Queue (Ranked+) Minimum gear ante: 10,000 Minimum Holotag tier: Platinum Note that the first weekend of Ranked will only have Low Stakes queue available to give people a chance to start climbing the ladder and prepare for High Stakes. The credit value of loot you find counts towards your crew’s score, excluding certain items like ammo and consumables. When your crew reaches its score target, any additional loot does not count, unless you loot enemy Holotags that grant you overperformance capacity and allow you to earn over your initial score target. Here’s the complete breakdown: Score target = minimum total loot value your team needs to exfil with to earn Ranked Points Your score target is decided by your team’s combined Holotag value Starting loadouts don’t count towards your score target Exfil at your score target to earn RP Exfil with less than your score target, and your Rank has no change Overperformance capacity = how much loot over that score target you can earn bonus points for This number starts at zero You can gain overperformance capacity by looting enemy Runner Holotags or Tag Chips, which drop from high-value UESC and in-run activities Loss penalty = how much you lose by failing to exfil This number is decided by you team’s combined Holotag value You only lose RP if you fail to exfil Note that Holotags persist after exfil so you can use them on your next run. You can sell Holotags for full value after exfil. Want to do the math? Here are the numbers: Tier Cost Score Target Loss Penalty Overperformance Capacity Bronze Holotag 500 3,000 600 600 Silver Holotag 750 5,000 2,000 1,000 Gold Holotag 1000 7,000 4,200 1,500 Platinum Holotag 1500 10,000 8,000 2,250 Diamond Holotag 2000 15,000 15,000 3,250 Pinnacle Holotag 3500 20,000 20,000 5,000 You can also find lootable Tag Chips during a Ranked match by defeating UESC and engaging with map events. Tag Chips count as valuable loot towards your score target, and they also grant overperformance capacity. Tag Chips auto-sell on exfil. enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.0.5
enUs.subtitle: The one about Cryo Archive.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Item Economy

  • Added three new random-rolled implant perks that can only be found on implants looted from Cryo Archive:
    • Covert Recovery: While in smoke, your self-repair speed is increased and you use healing consumables faster.
    • Freeloader: Defeating an enemy with a knife attack grants a small amount of tactical and prime ability energy.
    • Panic Response: While at low health, using a healing consumable grants the effects of Cardio Kick for a short duration.
  • Added three new mods that can only be looted from Cryo Archive:
    • Punishment
      • This weapon deals significantly increased damage against [REDACTED] combatants.
    • Testament
      • Aiming down sights for a short duration increases this weapon's range and aim assist by a massive amount.
    • Hurricane
      • While airborne, this weapon has increased stability and greatly reduced accuracy penalties.
    • Sponsored Kits
      • Rook no longer gets a surplus Sponsored Kit upon death.

Combat

  • Players can now activate exfil beacons while downed. Good luck.
  • Decreased camera shake intensity from incoming melee and knife attacks.
  • Increased post-run spectator camera timeout from 30 seconds to 120 seconds.
  • Fixed an issue where a player could have a finisher used on them right as they were completing a self-revive or being revived, immediately downing them again.
  • Fixed instances of revive timer lockout shaders appearing on enemy Runner’s body bags.
  • Fixed instances where ability activations could become desynced with the server.
  • Adjusted the Hacked status screen effect to be lower intensity and have slower glitch crawl effect.

Runners

  • Assassin
    • Fixed an issue where Assassin’s smoke puck would not change appearance based on the equipped Runner shell style while activating Shadow Dive.
  • Thief
    • Pickpocket Drone can no longer loot players who are in the active exfil animation.
    • Fixed an issue where Pickpocket Drone’s on-screen button prompt wouldn’t update to match a player’s changed keybind or controller button mapping.
    • Fixed an issue where high-speed grapples could affect network stability.
  • Triage
    • Fixed an issue where being close to max heat could prevent players from using the Battery Overcharge ability.
  • Rook
    • Removed Rook’s Runner Level requirement. Rook can now be used at Runner Level 0.
  • Implants
    • Fixed an issue where Graceful Landing V5’s unique trait could be activated by Vandal’s Microjets from flat ground.
    • Fixed an issue where Graceful Landing V5’s unique trait was not scaling detonation damage correctly for longer falls.

UESC

  • Fixed an issue where UESC would repeatedly use the same ladder.
  • Fixed a number of issues that could cause AI to freeze in place or become unresponsive.

Contracts and Events

  • Improved the visual clarity of contract and activity waypoint icons.
  • Crews carrying both Coordinate Datapads must now bring both of them to the location of the cache before the loot is revealed. Previously, any crew member being present at the location would reveal the loot.
  • Fixed some scenarios where the MIDA Order/Chaos 1/1, Traxus Return on Investment 3/5, and Traxus Liaison could prevent players from completing the contract.
  • Fixed an issue where the UI could become out of sync between crew members on the same contract during a run.
    • Perimeter Intercept dropships should no longer clip through the environment in South Relay.
    • Tripwires places in Overflow hallways should no longer be floating in mid-air.
    • Fixed an issue where DCON would not show up on the overhead map when on a contract that requires it.
  • Dire Marsh
    • UESC dropships that arrive during the Lockdown event in the northeast corner of Algae Ponds will no longer fly in through player space, killing players in their path.
    • Pinging the Stabilization Device and Anomalous Matter on the overhead map will now show a string in the crew feed, notifying your crewmates.
    • Fixed an issue for the Traxus Liaison Contract where the Commander would despawn if a crew didn’t engage and kill it in time.
  • Outpost
    • Encounters spawning on the roof of Flight Control have been improved and should now correctly engage players.

User Interface and Experience

  • Achievements
    • Fixed an issue where players would not get the “Welcome to Tau Ceti” achievement.
  • Armory
    • Item tooltips in the Armory now primarily show the purchase cost instead of the value the item sells for.
  • Codex
    • New Codex challenges added for Ranked and Cryo Archive. A “NEW” indicator will appear on Codex categories containing challenges added in Patch 1.0.5.
    • Fixed an issue where inspecting an item in the Codex could display flickering text.
    • Fixed an issue where “Acquired Items” challenges in the Codex indicated that the challenge could be completed by simply picking up the item. Challenges now accurately state that successful exfil with the item(s) is required.
    • Fixed an issue where the WSTR Shotgun Codex challenge incorrectly noted that it could be completed by downing a Runner. Updated the text to indicate that a full elimination is required.
    • Fixed an issue where the Thief Codex challenge “Shattered Hopes” incorrectly tracked combatants. This challenge has been updated to track Runners only.
    • Fixed an issue where the Thief Master Codex challenge “No Target too Great” was only tracking Wardens. This challenge will now track Wardens and Commanders.
    • Fixed an issue where the Destroyer Codex challenge “Close the Gap” would not complete when downing a Runner too close to the initial Thruster activation.
    • Fixed an issue where claiming Seasonal Level rewards from the Codex could displace items in the overflow, causing them to be lost. Challenges granting gear rewards will now check for items in overflow and prevent claiming until the overflow has been emptied.
    • Fixed an issue where inspecting non-weapon items in the Codex would display a “Compatible Weapons” string.
  • In-Run
    • Improved the overall legibility of the Revive prompt.
    • Some waypoints will now fade when aiming down-sights (ADS).
  • Items
    • Exfilling with a Temporal Fragment will produce variable rewards depending on your seasonal Runner Level.
  • Lobby
    • Loadout will now show a banner warning you that you have overflow items.
    • Added a shortcut for “i” or “start” to open the Loadout menu.
    • Added a shortcut for “tab” or “options” to open the Loadout menu while preparing for a run.
    • Updated Missing Equipment warning to clarify that players are missing Health or Shield consumables.
    • Fixed an issue preventing commonly found items from being shown when selecting map regions.
  • Ping System
    • Activity icons pinged from the overhead map will more reliably show their waypoints.
  • Rewards Pass
    • Premium Rewards Pass Voucher items should no longer appear in your inventory.
  • Run Report
    • Fixed an issue where the Runner Level Up rewards screen was sometimes blank.
  • Social
    • Added the Ranked tab into the Runner Connections panel so that you can see how you stack up against your connections.
    • Fixed an issue where Runner Connections were not showing properly when scrolling if players had a large number of friends.*
  • Store
    • Updated incorrect item rarity for the Luxe Palace, Overdrive-TSL, and Cyber Red Runner Shells from Deluxe to Superior.
  • Vault
    • Consumables, Ammo, Salvage, and Grenades now have larger stack sizes in the Vault.
    • Added filter tabs for keys and backpacks.
  • Voice Chat
    • Added an option for consoles and gamepads to support Crew Voice Push-To-Talk while in a run. This only applies to runs; the lobby will still utilize an open mic.
    • Adding an additional Push-To-Talk option, “Tap”. When set, tapping the Proximity or Crew Chat button(s) will open the mic until you’re done speaking or tap the button(s) again.
    • Fixed a number of issues causing voice chat interruptions and inconsistencies.
  • Weapon Customization
    • Optimized sticker and charm placement on a handful of weapons.

Stability

  • Fixed an issue causing crashes when opening up the map while on Perimeter.

  • Added AMD Anti-Lag 2 Low Latency to Video Settings.

Weapons and Equipment

  • Ammo Crate
    • Fixed an issue where Ammo Crates could not be interacted with when placed close to walls or terrain.
  • Cardio Kick
    • Fixed an issue where normal and depleted versions of Cardio Kick’s status icon appeared separately in the HUD.
  • Claymore Mine
    • Fixed an issue that prevented Claymores from taking splash damage when attached to other objects.
  • Knife
    • Knife cosmetics will no longer unequip after failing to exfil.
  • V75 Scar
    • Fixed an issue with the Ram-Page Mag that was causing bullets to ricochet off turrets, despite dealing damage.
  • WSTR Combat Shotgun
    • Reduced leftward motion in firing recoil.
    • Increased duration of spin ready required before it can be interrupted by weapon fire.
    • Redistributed damage falloff. It now retains near-max damage at point-blank range but falls off much more quickly.
    • Reduced aim assist cone size and reduced the influence of aim assist on pellet spread as they travel.
  • Misriah 2442
    • Reduced leftward motion in firing recoil.

  • BR33 Volley Rifle

    • Lockout Muzzle Brake Prestige mod now also suppresses weapon fire in addition previous effects.
  • Longshot
    • Fixed an issue with the gold mod resetting its counter incorrectly and disappearing from the buff tray display.

Mods

  • Drag & Drop can now be used to remove weapon mods from weapons. 
    • Dragging a mod attached to a weapon into the backpack or Vault will now remove the mod and place it into that inventory rather than moving the entire weapon 
  • Chips
    • Endless Runner
      • Fixed an issue with the Superior rarity version having an incorrect string.
    • Opportunist*
      • Added a 3.5 second cooldown to the perk activation.
      • DEVELOPERS NOTE: The WSTR videos were indeed funny. 
  • Optics
    • Thermals
      • Fixed an issue where thermals were not highlighting invisible UESC combatants, ticks, and tick nests.
  • Generators
    • Fixed a tooltip display issue that incorrectly labeled the decreased charge time as increased charge time.
  • Magazines
    • Cloudfeather Chamber was missing its Weight Reduction stat bonus, making it too similar to Turbo Chamber. It now correctly grants a bonus to Weight Reduction.
  • Barrels
    • Suppressors
      • Removed the health display scramble and the 2D damage indicator effects that happened to victims shot by a weapon with a suppressor attachment.
    • DEVELOPERS NOTE: We may revisit this in the future but for now we believe this muddied the gameplay language too much and the benefit of a quieter weapon is attractive enough for these mods.

Zones

  • Cryo Archive
    • Cryo Archive has been added to the game. Good luck getting there.

Audio

  • UESC spawn-in animation will now play all of the associated audio.
  • Lowered the range that you can hear other players in combat.

Additional notes added after publish on 3/17/26*
