Dragging a mod attached to a weapon into the backpack or Vault will now remove the mod and place it into that inventory rather than moving the entire weapon Chips Endless Runner Fixed an issue with the Superior rarity version having an incorrect string. Opportunist* Added a 3.5 second cooldown to the perk activation. DEVELOPERS NOTE: The WSTR videos were indeed funny. Optics Thermals Fixed an issue where thermals were not highlighting invisible UESC combatants, ticks, and tick nests. Generators Fixed a tooltip display issue that incorrectly labeled the decreased charge time as increased charge time. Magazines Cloudfeather Chamber was missing its Weight Reduction stat bonus, making it too similar to Turbo Chamber. It now correctly grants a bonus to Weight Reduction. Barrels Suppressors Removed the health display scramble and the 2D damage indicator effects that happened to victims shot by a weapon with a suppressor attachment. DEVELOPERS NOTE: We may revisit this in the future but for now we believe this muddied the gameplay language too much and the benefit of a quieter weapon is attractive enough for these mods. Zones Cryo Archive Cryo Archive has been added to the game. Good luck getting there. Audio UESC spawn-in animation will now play all of the associated audio. Lowered the range that you can hear other players in combat. Additional notes added after publish on 3/17/26*

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.0.5
zhChs.subtitle: 关于低温档案室。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
物品经济

  • 新增了三款全新的随机属性植入物特性，这些特性仅出现在掠夺自低温档案室的植入物上：
    • 隐秘恢复：当位于烟雾中时，你的自我修复速度提升，使用治疗消耗品的速度提升。
    • 能量转移：用匕首击败敌人可以获得少量战术技能和主要技能能量。
    • 恐慌反应：生命值低时使用治疗消耗品，可获得短时间的心肺复苏效果。
  • 新增了三款全新的模组，这些模组仅能在低温档案室中掠夺：
    • 惩戒
      • 此武器对【隐藏】战斗人员造成的伤害显著提升。
    • 圣约
      • 短暂瞄准一段时间可以极大幅提升这件武器的射程和瞄准辅助。
    • 飓风
      • 在空中使用该武器可提升稳定性，且精准度惩罚大幅降低。
    • 赞助包
      • 鲁克在死亡时不会再获得额外赞助包。

战斗

  • 玩家现在可以在被击倒的情况下激活撤离信标。祝你好运。
  • 受到近战和匕首攻击时，镜头摇晃强度降低。
  • 疾行后的观战镜头超时从30秒增加到120秒。
  • 修复了当玩家完成自我复活或被复活时，可能会立刻再次遭到终结技攻击，导致再次被击倒的问题。
  • 修复了复活倒计时停止着色器会显示在敌方疾行者装尸袋上的问题。
  • 修复了技能激活过程可能会与服务器失去同步的问题。
  • 调整了被骇入状态界面，降低了效果强度，减缓了故障蔓延效果的速度。

疾行者

  • 刺客
    • 修复了刺客在使用暗影俯冲时，烟雾弹不会根据所装备的疾行者外壳而改变外形的问题。
  • 盗贼
    • 窃贼无人机无法再掠夺处于激活撤离动画中的玩家。
    • 修复了窃贼无人机的屏幕按键提示不会随着玩家对键位设置或控制器按键映射的更改而更新的问题。
    • 修复了快速使用抓钩会影响网络稳定性的问题。
  • 救援
    • 修复了接近最大热量会导致玩家无法使用电池过充技能的问题。
  • 鲁克
    • 移除了鲁克的疾行者等级需求。现在可以在疾行者等级0时使用鲁克。
  • 植入物
    • 修复了优雅着陆V5的独特特性可以在平地上通过暴徒的微型喷射器激活的问题。
    • 修复了优雅着陆V5的独特特性提供的引爆伤害不会随着坠落高度调整的问题。

UESC

  • 修复了UESC单位会不断重复攀爬同一架梯子的问题。
  • 修复了人工智能可能卡住或无响应的多个问题。

合约和活动

  • 优化了合约和活动路径点图标的视觉清晰度。
  • 同时携带两种坐标数据板的团队现在必须同时将两块数据板带去储藏箱的位置才能够显示战利品。之前，任何队员出现在相应位置即可显示战利品。
  • 修复了在一些情况下，米达秩序/混乱[1/1]、特莱克斯投资回报率[3/5]和特莱克斯联络人会导致玩家无法完成合约的问题。
  • 修复了同一次疾行中，执行同一个合约的多名队员之间可能会出现界面不同步的问题。
    • 外围区域拦截运输舰不再会穿过南中继站的地形。
    • 水源淡化厂走廊的拌索不再漂浮于半空中。
    • 修复了当存在需要DCON的合约时，DCON不会显示在俯视地图中的问题。
  • 恐怖沼泽
    • 在封锁活动中抵达藻池东北角的UESC运输舰不再会穿过玩家空间，杀死飞行路径上的玩家。
    • 在俯视地图中标记稳定装置和异常物质时，会在团队频道中显示消息，通知你的队友。
    • 修复了在执行特莱克斯联络人合约时，若团队未能及时攻击并杀死指挥官，会导致指挥官消失的问题。
  • 前哨
    • 优化了在飞控设施屋顶上刷新的敌人，现在敌人应该会正常攻击玩家。

用户界面和体验

  • 成就
    • 修复了玩家无法解锁“欢迎来到天仓五”成就的问题。
  • 军械库
    • 军械库的物品提示现在会主要显示物品的购买费用，而不是出售价值。
  • 百科
    • 为排名模式和低温档案室添加了新的百科挑战。包含1.0.5更新新增挑战的百科目录上会显示一个“新”标志。
    • 修复了在百科中查看物品时会显示闪烁文字的问题。
    • 修复了百科中的“已获取的物品”挑战会显示该挑战只需要拾取物品即可完成的问题。现在挑战会被正确描述为携带所需物品成功撤离才能完成。
    • 修复了WSTR霰弹枪百科挑战被错误地描述为可以通过击倒疾行者完成的问题。更新了文本，现在会说明必须要完全消灭。
    • 修复了盗贼百科挑战“破碎希望”错误地追踪战斗人员的问题。此挑战现已更新为仅追踪疾行者。
    • 修复了盗贼大师百科挑战“无孔不入”仅追踪看守者的问题。此挑战现在会追踪看守者和指挥官。
    • 修复了在距离初始推进器启动位置过近时击倒疾行者会导致毁灭者百科挑战“拉近距离”无法完成的问题。
    • 修复了在百科中领取赛季等级奖励时会替换溢出物品，导致这些物品丢失的问题。发放装备奖励的挑战任务现在会检查物品溢出情况，在清空溢出物品前将无法领取奖励。
    • 修复了在百科中查看非武器道具会显示“适配武器”文本的问题。
  • 疾行中
    • 优化了复活提示的整体易读性。
    • 现在部分路径点在瞄准（ADS）时会隐去。
  • 物品
    • 带着时间碎片撤离会根据你的赛季疾行者等级产出不同的奖励。
  • 大厅
    • 配装现在会显示一个横幅，警告你目前拥有溢出物品。
    • 新增了按“i”或“开始键”打开配装菜单的快捷键。
    • 新增了在准备疾行期间按“tab”或“选项键”打开配装菜单的快捷键。
    • 更新了缺少装备警告，明确提示玩家缺少的是生命值消耗品还是护盾消耗品。
    • 修复了选择地图区域时常见物品不会显示的问题。
  • 标记系统
    • 从俯视地图标记的活动图标会更稳定地显示对应的路标。
  • 奖励通票
    • 高级奖励通票兑换券类物品将不再出现在你的物品栏中。
  • 疾行报告
    • 修复了疾行者升级奖励界面偶尔显示空白的问题。
  • 社交
    • 在疾行者连接面板中新增评值选项卡，你可以查看自己与同伴的对比情况。
    • 修复了当玩家好友数量较多时，滚动浏览时疾行者连接显示不正确的问题。*
  • 商店
    • 修正了豪华宫殿、超速-TSL以及赛博红刃疾行者外壳的错误稀有度，将其从“豪华”调整为“卓越”。
  • 保险库
    • 现在消耗品、弹药、回收资源与手雷在保险库中拥有更高的收纳层数。
    • 新增钥匙和背包的筛选选项卡。
  • 语音聊天
    • 为主机和手柄新增选项，支持在疾行中使用团队语音按键通话功能。该功能仅适用于疾行，大厅仍将使用打开麦克风模式。
    • 新增额外的按键通话（点击）选项。启用该选项后，点击近距离聊天或团队聊天按钮即可开启麦克风，直至发言完毕或再次点击按钮后关闭。
    • 修复了多个导致语音聊天中断及不稳定的问题。
  • 武器自定义
    • 优化了部分武器的贴纸和挂件摆放位置。

稳定性

  • 修复了在外围区域打开地图时导致崩溃的问题。

  • 在视频设置中新增了AMD Anti-Lag 2低延迟选项。

武器和装备

  • 弹药箱
    • 修复了当弹药箱被放在靠近墙壁或地形的位置时无法互动的问题。
  • 心肺复苏
    • 修复了心肺复苏的普通和已耗尽版本状态图标在HUD中会分开显示的问题。
  • 阔刀地雷
    • 修复了附着在物体上的阔刀地雷不会受到溅射伤害的问题。
  • 匕首
    • 匕首装饰不再会在撤离失败后被卸下。
  • V75 SCAR
    • 修复了暴转弹匣会导致子弹在击中炮台时弹跳（尽管仍能造成伤害）的问题。
  • WSTR战斗霰弹枪
    • 削弱了射击后坐力的左向运动。
    • 增加了旋转就绪持续时间，在此期间内不会被武器射击打断。
    • 重新分配了伤害衰减。现在在抵近射击时会保留几乎最大伤害，但会更快地衰减。
    • 减小了瞄准辅助椎体大小，并削弱了瞄准辅助对弹丸飞行过程中的弹道散布范围的影响。
  • 米斯利亚2442
    • 削弱了射击后坐力的左向运动。
  • 远征
    • 修复了黄金模组会错误地重置计数以及从增益栏中消失的问题。

模组

  • 现在可以使用拖放功能从武器上移除武器模组。 
    • 将武器上的模组拖入背包或保险库时，现将移除该模组并放入物品栏，而非移动整件武器。 
  • 芯片
    • 无尽疾行者
      • 修复了卓越稀有度版本文字描述不正确的问题。
    • 机会主义者*
      • 该特性激活时增加了3.5秒的冷却时间。
      • 开发者提示：WSTR视频确实很有趣。 
  • 瞄准镜
    • 热成像
      • 修复了热成像不会高亮显示隐身的UESC战斗人员、虱虫以及虱虫巢穴的问题。
  • 发电机
    • 修复了将缩短充能时间错误地描述为增加充能时间的提示文本显示问题。
  • 弹匣
    • 云羽弹膛缺失了重量减少属性加成，变得过于类似涡轮弹膛。现在它会正确地提供重量减少加成。
  • 枪管
    • 消音器
      • 移除了受害者被带有消音器部件的武器击中时出现的生命值显示打乱效果和2D伤害指示器效果。
    • 开发者提示：我们可能会在未来再次审视这项更新，但目前来说，我们觉得这些效果会使得游戏信息变得比较混乱，而更加静音的武器已经足够吸引人了。

区域

  • 低温档案室
    • 低温档案室已加入到游戏中。祝大家能顺利进入。

音频

  • UESC刷新动画现在会播放所有相关的音频。
  • 缩小了你能听到的其他玩家战斗声音的范围。

2026年3月18日发布后添加的补充说明*

军械库 军械库的物品提示现在会主要显示物品的购买费用，而不是出售价值。 百科 为排名模式和低温档案室添加了新的百科挑战。包含1.0.5更新新增挑战的百科目录上会显示一个“新”标志。 修复了在百科中查看物品时会显示闪烁文字的问题。 修复了百科中的“已获取的物品”挑战会显示该挑战只需要拾取物品即可完成的问题。现在挑战会被正确描述为携带所需物品成功撤离才能完成。 修复了WSTR霰弹枪百科挑战被错误地描述为可以通过击倒疾行者完成的问题。更新了文本，现在会说明必须要完全消灭。 修复了盗贼百科挑战“破碎希望”错误地追踪战斗人员的问题。此挑战现已更新为仅追踪疾行者。 修复了盗贼大师百科挑战“无孔不入”仅追踪看守者的问题。此挑战现在会追踪看守者和指挥官。 修复了在距离初始推进器启动位置过近时击倒疾行者会导致毁灭者百科挑战“拉近距离”无法完成的问题。 修复了在百科中领取赛季等级奖励时会替换溢出物品，导致这些物品丢失的问题。发放装备奖励的挑战任务现在会检查物品溢出情况，在清空溢出物品前将无法领取奖励。 修复了在百科中查看非武器道具会显示“适配武器”文本的问题。 疾行中 优化了复活提示的整体易读性。 现在部分路径点在瞄准（ADS）时会隐去。 物品 带着时间碎片撤离会根据你的赛季疾行者等级产出不同的奖励。 大厅 配装现在会显示一个横幅，警告你目前拥有溢出物品。 新增了按“i”或“开始键”打开配装菜单的快捷键。 新增了在准备疾行期间按“tab”或“选项键”打开配装菜单的快捷键。 更新了缺少装备警告，明确提示玩家缺少的是生命值消耗品还是护盾消耗品。 修复了选择地图区域时常见物品不会显示的问题。 标记系统 从俯视地图标记的活动图标会更稳定地显示对应的路标。 奖励通票 高级奖励通票兑换券类物品将不再出现在你的物品栏中。 疾行报告 修复了疾行者升级奖励界面偶尔显示空白的问题。 社交 在疾行者连接面板中新增评值选项卡，你可以查看自己与同伴的对比情况。 修复了当玩家好友数量较多时，滚动浏览时疾行者连接显示不正确的问题。* 商店 修正了豪华宫殿、超速-TSL以及赛博红刃疾行者外壳的错误稀有度，将其从“豪华”调整为“卓越”。 保险库 现在消耗品、弹药、回收资源与手雷在保险库中拥有更高的收纳层数。 新增钥匙和背包的筛选选项卡。 语音聊天 为主机和手柄新增选项，支持在疾行中使用团队语音按键通话功能。该功能仅适用于疾行，大厅仍将使用打开麦克风模式。 新增额外的按键通话（点击）选项。启用该选项后，点击近距离聊天或团队聊天按钮即可开启麦克风，直至发言完毕或再次点击按钮后关闭。 修复了多个导致语音聊天中断及不稳定的问题。 武器自定义 优化了部分武器的贴纸和挂件摆放位置。 稳定性 修复了在外围区域打开地图时导致崩溃的问题。 在视频设置中新增了AMD Anti-Lag 2低延迟选项。 武器和装备 弹药箱 修复了当弹药箱被放在靠近墙壁或地形的位置时无法互动的问题。 心肺复苏 修复了心肺复苏的普通和已耗尽版本状态图标在HUD中会分开显示的问题。 阔刀地雷 修复了附着在物体上的阔刀地雷不会受到溅射伤害的问题。 匕首 匕首装饰不再会在撤离失败后被卸下。 V75 SCAR 修复了暴转弹匣会导致子弹在击中炮台时弹跳（尽管仍能造成伤害）的问题。 WSTR战斗霰弹枪 削弱了射击后坐力的左向运动。 增加了旋转就绪持续时间，在此期间内不会被武器射击打断。 重新分配了伤害衰减。现在在抵近射击时会保留几乎最大伤害，但会更快地衰减。 减小了瞄准辅助椎体大小，并削弱了瞄准辅助对弹丸飞行过程中的弹道散布范围的影响。 米斯利亚2442 削弱了射击后坐力的左向运动。 远征 修复了黄金模组会错误地重置计数以及从增益栏中消失的问题。 模组 现在可以使用拖放功能从武器上移除武器模组。 将武器上的模组拖入背包或保险库时，现将移除该模组并放入物品栏，而非移动整件武器。 芯片 无尽疾行者 修复了卓越稀有度版本文字描述不正确的问题。 机会主义者* 该特性激活时增加了3.5秒的冷却时间。 开发者提示：WSTR视频确实很有趣。 瞄准镜 热成像 修复了热成像不会高亮显示隐身的UESC战斗人员、虱虫以及虱虫巢穴的问题。 发电机 修复了将缩短充能时间错误地描述为增加充能时间的提示文本显示问题。 弹匣 云羽弹膛缺失了重量减少属性加成，变得过于类似涡轮弹膛。现在它会正确地提供重量减少加成。 枪管 消音器 移除了受害者被带有消音器部件的武器击中时出现的生命值显示打乱效果和2D伤害指示器效果。 开发者提示： 我们可能会在未来再次审视这项更新，但目前来说，我们觉得这些效果会使得游戏信息变得比较混乱，而更加静音的武器已经足够吸引人了。 区域 低温档案室 低温档案室已加入到游戏中。祝大家能顺利进入。 音频 UESC刷新动画现在会播放所有相关的音频。 缩小了你能听到的其他玩家战斗声音的范围。 2026年3月18日发布后添加的补充说明*

enUs.title: Tune into the Tau Ceti Cup on March 14
enUs.subtitle: Secure unique Twitch Drops and watch six teams compete to be the best on Tau Ceti
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Welcome to the Tau Ceti Cup, a deadly competition where six teams take on Tau Ceti and compete for the title of the first ever Tau Ceti Cup Champions.

The tournament will go live on Saturday, March 14 at 11 AM PT featuring IceManIsaac and Activee to cast all of the action. Over the course of the tournament, teams are tasked with earning favor for each faction, eliminating high-value targets, and clearing the competition from Tau Ceti.

The winning team will take home exclusive prizing, with each member receiving a custom Marathon jacket created by Australian cosplayer Vamprea, alongside rewards for their community.

Teams

Team BurntPeanut

  • TheBurntPeanut
  • Gingy
  • HutchMF

Team Aztecross

  • Aztecross
  • Symfuhny
  • Trey24k

Team Shroud

  • Shroud
  • LVNDMARK
  • Just9n

Team Bearki

  • Bearki
  • DeadlySlob
  • Aspen

Team Joueur_du_Grenier

  • Joueur_du_Grenier
  • Tonton
  • Shisheyu

Team Rubius

  • Rubius
  • IlloJuan
  • TheGrefg

Scoring and Contracts

Runs will be scored based on kills and extracted loot value. Runs will be counted only if at least one team member successfully exfils. Contract completion will be counted even if a team gets wiped.

Each team’s total point score will be calculated by the following:

  • Scoring format: (Loadout value) + [AI kills + player kills] x extraction multiplier (+5% per person) = total score for the run
  • Kills
    • 1000 - AI kill
    • 5000 - Player finished kill
  • Extraction Multiplier
    • +5% per team member extracted
    • Max possible modifier: +15%

Priority Contracts are map-specific objectives that will earn participants the most amount of points and may be redeemed once.

  • Perimeter
    • 50,000 - Eliminate the UESC Wraith Warden in Overflow
  • Dire Marsh
    • 100,000 - Eliminate the UESC Flame Warden in Algae Pond
  • Outpost
    • 10,000 - Enter the Pinwheel Ship
    • 50,000 - Complete a Profit Opportunity in the Pinwheel Ship

Profit Opportunities

  • Faction-specific contracts - Each Worth 50,000 points (redeemable once per team for the duration of the event)
    • Traxus: Have one team member extract with at least 20,000 loot value in their backpack
    • Sekiguchi: Have one team member extract with a Purple implant in every slot
      • Purple implants brought into runs (from any player) are not counted
    • Arachne: As a team, kill 9 Runners or Rooks in a single run
    • MIDA: As a team, get 3 Runner Eliminations with Explosives or Throwables in a single run
    • NuCal: 20,000 for each NuCal 2X Drinkable Cheeseburger extracted on Perimeter
      • Note: NuCal can be redeemed multiple times across multiple runs
    • CyberAcme
      • Have one teammate enter a run with a free sponsored kit and extract with:
        • 2 weapons
        • 1 core
        • 1 implant for each slot (max 3)

Twitch Drops

There are three rewards up for grabs during the Tau Ceti Cup. Tune in to any of the competitors Twitch streams on Saturday, March 14 from 11 AM PT to 4 PM PT to secure:

  • Profile Emblem: Angry Bunny (Watch for 1 hour)
  • Profile Background: Angry Bunny (Watch for 2 hours)
  • Weapon Sticker: Angry Bunny (Watch for 3 hours)

To earn Twitch Drops, make sure you...

  • Link your Bungie.net account to your Twitch account
  • Watch a Marathon stream of one of the competitors in the Twitch Directory with Drops enabled during the launch window
  • Claim each reward from your Twitch Inventory, then log in to Marathon to receive them

Marathon Australia Invitational

PlayStation Australia and Bungie invite players to tune in for the Marathon Australia Invitational, going live Thursday, March 12 at 7 PM AEDT.

This invite-only tournament brings together some of Australia’s most recognisable creators to compete live in Marathon, celebrating competitive play and community ahead of launch. The tournament will be hosted live on the REKT Twitch channel, with each team also streaming their own perspectives.

The winning team will take home exclusive prizing, with each member receiving a custom Marathon jacket created by Australian cosplayer Vamprea, alongside a Marathon Collector’s Edition.

Best of luck to every competitor dropping into Tau Ceti—whether you’re fighting for the Cup or tuning in for the carnage, we’ll see you planet side.

zhChs.title: 敬请关注3月15日的天仓五杯
zhChs.subtitle: 赢取独特Twitch掉落奖励，观看六个团队在天仓五展开巅峰对决
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
欢迎来到天仓五杯。这是一场致命竞赛，六个团队将挑战天仓五，争夺首届天仓五杯的冠军头衔。

比赛将于北京时间3月15日（周日）凌晨2点上线，由IceManIsaac和Activee带来精彩解说。比赛期间，团队需要努力赢得每个阵营的支持，消灭高价值目标，并在天仓五战胜对手。

获胜团队将获得专属奖品，每位成员都将获得一件由澳大利亚角色扮演者Vamprea设计的定制《失落星船：马拉松》夹克，社区也将获得奖励。

团队

Team BurntPeanut

  • TheBurntPeanut
  • Gingy
  • HutchMF

Team Aztecross

  • Aztecross
  • Symfuhny
  • Trey24k

Team Shroud

  • Shroud
  • LVNDMARK
  • Just9n

Team Bearki

  • Bearki
  • DeadlySlob
  • Aspen

Team Jour_du_Grenier

  • Jour_du_Grenier
  • Tonto
  • Shisheyu

Team Rubius

  • Rubius
  • IloJuan
  • TheGrefg

Twitch掉落

天仓五杯期间共有三项奖励可供争夺。北京时间3月15日（周日）凌晨2点至早上7点，观看任意参赛选手的Twitch直播，即可获得以下奖励：

  • 档案徽标：愤怒兔子（观看1小时）
  • 档案背景：愤怒兔子（观看2小时）
  • 武器贴纸：愤怒兔子（观看3小时）

为获得Twitch掉落，请确保完成以下步骤：

  • 将你的Bungie.net账号与你的Twitch账号绑定
  • 在游戏首发窗口期间，前往Twitch分类观看任意一位已开启掉落选手的《失落星船：马拉松》直播
  • 在Twitch物品栏领取每一项奖励，然后登录《失落星船：马拉松》查收

《失落星船：马拉松》澳大利亚邀请赛

PlayStation澳大利亚和Bungie邀请玩家关注《失落星船：马拉松》澳大利亚邀请赛，它将于北京时间3月12日周四下午4点上线。

这场仅限受邀者参加的锦标赛将汇聚澳大利亚一些最具知名度的创作者，他们将在《失落星船：马拉松》中展开现场角逐，在天仓五杯上线前共同庆祝竞技与社区精神。比赛将在REKT Twitch频道进行直播，每个团队也会各自进行直播。

获胜团队将获得专属奖品，每位成员都将获得一件由澳大利亚角色扮演者Vamprea设计的定制《失落星船：马拉松》夹克，以及《失落星船：马拉松》典藏版。

祝所有前往天仓五的参赛者好运——无论你是为冠军而战，还是只想观看精彩角逐，我们天仓五见。

enUs.title: Marathon Update 1.0.0.4
enUs.subtitle: The one about Rook.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Item Economy

  • Increased the number of Med Cabinets and Munitions Crates that can spawn on Perimeter
  • Increased the amount of starting ammo in MIDA, CyberAcme, and Arachne free Sponsored Kits
  • Reduced the frequency UESC Grenadiers drop EMP grenades

Combat

  • Fixed an issue where players could sometimes die instantly when stepping on certain world geometry*
  • Fixed an issue where the shield break screen effects could constantly play when you had a heal over time effect and a damage over time effect on you at the same time
  • Increased the range gunfire and explosions can be heard from

Weapons

Thermal Scopes

  • Reduced visual clarity on targets with thermal scopes
  • Adjusted max distances for thermal highlight:
    • Pistols: 40 meters (down from 55)
    • Rifles/LMGs/SMGs: 60 meters (down from 65)
    • Precision Rifles: 80 meters (down from 100)
    • Snipers: 100 meters (down from 180)

Overrun

  • Increased default ammo capacity by 5

Runners

Rook

  • Fixed an issue where backpacks could be deleted when exfiling with Rook
  • Fixed an issue where Rook’s position was not being displayed on the map screen.
  • Increased CyAc reputation gain from exfilling with Rook

  • Rook will now receive the same Faction reputation bonus from all sources that solo players receive*

  • Rook’s WSTR shotgun will now spawn as Compromised
    • Compromised items require use of a Matter Fixative during the run to exfil with the item

UESC

  • Reduced health of most UESC enemies by ~10-15% and shield hp of UESC bosses by 25%*

DEVELOPER NOTE: With this change we hope to alleviate some of the resource burden in both Solos and Crews when it comes to engaging UESC in combat. The goal here is to allow your bullets and meds to go further without reducing too much of the UESCs bite. We see the feedback loud and clear that players appreciate the friction that our UESC combatants provide and we have no plans to change that direction.

Contracts

  • Increased default distance objective nav points appear from 10m to 20m

Introducing NuCaloric Contract

  • Fixed an issue where enemy Crews could receive NuCal contract VO audio and subtitles from a long distance away

Introducing Traxus Contract

  • Reduced the difficulty of the UESC Commander encounter

Zones

Outpost

  • Temporarily disabled switches access route to the Broken Wing on Outpost

DEVELOPER NOTE: We are temporarily disabling the "Broken Wing" entrance into the Pinwheel while we make some tuning changes to it. In its current state it trivializes entrance into the Pinwheel. We are making some tweaks to maintain the spirit of the "silent" entrance while better matching the risk / reward of the Pinwheel. Runners can continue to take advantage of all other ways into the Pinwheel (including the additional silent method) in the meantime.

Rewards Pass and Store

  • Fixed an issue where bundle prices could be displayed incorrectly
  • Fixed an issue where individual items in the Store were incorrectly showing "Savings" on preview screens when no discount was active*
  • Increased the LUX bundle from (1000 + 100) to (1000 + 120)

Stability

  • Fixed a rare issue that could cause dedicated server crashes
  • Fixed several issues that could cause client crashes

General

  • Fixed an issue where doors would lock preventing players from finishing the new player intro mission
  • Updated the description of Perimeter (Beginner) on the Zone Select screen
  • Fixed a bug where the Text Chat window could get stuck open

  • Fixed a crash that sometimes occurred when attempting to use an IME Keyboard

    • Fixed a crash that sometimes occurred when typing quickly with an IME Keyboard

    • DEVELOPER NOTE: Some issues may still remain with third-party IME software and we are continuing to investigate. Windows built-in IME may be a temporary workaround for users who are experiencing issues while we work on a permanent fix.

  • Adjusted the location of the IME keyboard to be closer to the Text Chat window
  • Players will no longer see an extended black screen during the map load sequence

*Minor updates to these notes were made after publish on 3/11/26
enUs.bodyText: Item Economy Increased the number of Med Cabinets and Munitions Crates that can spawn on Perimeter Increased the amount of starting ammo in MIDA, CyberAcme, and Arachne free Sponsored Kits Reduced the frequency UESC Grenadiers drop EMP grenades Combat Fixed an issue where players could sometimes die instantly when stepping on certain world geometry* Fixed an issue where the shield break screen effects could constantly play when you had a heal over time effect and a damage over time effect on you at the same time Increased the range gunfire and explosions can be heard from Weapons Thermal Scopes Reduced visual clarity on targets with thermal scopes Adjusted max distances for thermal highlight: Pistols: 40 meters (down from 55) Rifles/LMGs/SMGs: 60 meters (down from 65) Precision Rifles: 80 meters (down from 100) Snipers: 100 meters (down from 180) Overrun Increased default ammo capacity by 5 Runners Rook Fixed an issue where backpacks could be deleted when exfiling with Rook Fixed an issue where Rook’s position was not being displayed on the map screen. Increased CyAc reputation gain from exfilling with Rook Rook will now receive the same Faction reputation bonus from all sources that solo players receive* Rook’s WSTR shotgun will now spawn as Compromised Compromised items require use of a Matter Fixative during the run to exfil with the item UESC Reduced health of most UESC enemies by ~10-15% and shield hp of UESC bosses by 25%* DEVELOPER NOTE: With this change we hope to alleviate some of the resource burden in both Solos and Crews when it comes to engaging UESC in combat. The goal here is to allow your bullets and meds to go further without reducing too much of the UESCs bite. We see the feedback loud and clear that players appreciate the friction that our UESC combatants provide and we have no plans to change that direction. Contracts Increased default distance objective nav points appear from 10m to 20m Introducing NuCaloric Contract Fixed an issue where enemy Crews could receive NuCal contract VO audio and subtitles from a long distance away Introducing Traxus Contract Reduced the difficulty of the UESC Commander encounter Zones Outpost Temporarily disabled switches access route to the Broken Wing on Outpost DEVELOPER NOTE : We are temporarily disabling the "Broken Wing" entrance into the Pinwheel while we make some tuning changes to it. In its current state it trivializes entrance into the Pinwheel. We are making some tweaks to maintain the spirit of the "silent" entrance while better matching the risk / reward of the Pinwheel. Runners can continue to take advantage of all other ways into the Pinwheel (including the additional silent method) in the meantime. Rewards Pass and Store Fixed an issue where bundle prices could be displayed incorrectly Fixed an issue where individual items in the Store were incorrectly showing "Savings" on preview screens when no discount was active* Increased the LUX bundle from (1000 + 100) to (1000 + 120) Stability Fixed a rare issue that could cause dedicated server crashes Fixed several issues that could cause client crashes General Fixed an issue where doors would lock preventing players from finishing the new player intro mission Updated the description of Perimeter (Beginner) on the Zone Select screen Fixed a bug where the Text Chat window could get stuck open Fixed a crash that sometimes occurred when attempting to use an IME Keyboard Fixed a crash that sometimes occurred when typing quickly with an IME Keyboard DEVELOPER NOTE : Some issues may still remain with third-party IME software and we are continuing to investigate. Windows built-in IME may be a temporary workaround for users who are experiencing issues while we work on a permanent fix. zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》更新1.0.0.4
zhChs.subtitle: 关于鲁克。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
物品经济

  • 增加了外围区域中医疗柜和弹药箱的生成数量
  • 增加了米达、赛博艾克米和阿拉克尼免费赞助包中的初始弹药数量
  • 降低了UESC掷雷手掉落电磁脉冲手雷的频率

战斗

  • 修复了玩家在封锁活动中有时瞬间死亡的问题
  • 修复了当玩家同时拥有持续治疗效果和持续伤害效果时，持续播放护盾破碎屏幕效果的问题
  • 增加了枪声和爆炸声的可听范围

武器

热成像瞄准镜

  • 降低了热成像瞄准镜下目标的可视清晰度
  • 调整了热成像高亮的最大距离：
    • 手枪：40米（从55米下调）
    • 步枪/轻机枪/冲锋枪：60米（从65米下调）
    • 精密步枪：80米（从100米下调）
    • 狙击步枪：100米（从180米下调）

奔袭

  • 默认弹药容量增加5

疾行者

鲁克

  • 修复了使用鲁克撤离时背包可能被删除的问题
  • 修复了鲁克位置未显示在地图界面的问题
  • 提升了使用鲁克撤离时获得的赛博艾克米声望
  • 鲁克现在将获得与单人玩家相同的阵营声望加成
  • 鲁克的WSTR霰弹枪现在会以受损状态生成
    • 受损物品需要在疾行期间使用物质固定剂后才能携带撤离

UESC

  • 小幅降低大多数UESC敌人的生命值和UESC首领的护盾生命值

开发者提示：我们希望通过这项改动，减轻单人玩家和团队玩家在与UESC战斗时的资源负担。这里的目标是在不削弱UESC力量的前提下，让子弹和药物发挥更大的作用。我们清楚地看到玩家们的反馈，他们很喜欢UESC战斗带来的挑战，我们也没有改变这一方向的计划。

合约

  • 默认目标导航点的显示距离从10米提升至20米

介绍纽卡洛里合约

  • 修复了敌方团队可以从很远的地方接收到纽卡洛里合约配音和字幕的问题

介绍特莱克斯合约

  • 降低了UESC指挥官遭遇战的难度

区域

前哨

  • 暂时禁用了前哨损毁区入口的开关

开发者提示：我们正在对损毁区入口进行一些调整，因此它将暂时禁用。由于它目前的情况，玩家能轻而易举地进入风轮。我们正在进行一些调整，在保持无声进入的玩法理念的同时，使其更符合风轮的风险回报平衡。在此期间，疾行者可以继续使用所有其他方式进入风轮（包括新增的无声方式）。

奖励通票和商店

  • 修复了若不重启游戏，SILK余额就无法正确更新的问题
  • 修复了组合包价格可能显示错误的问题
  • 修复了全价装饰物品可能错误显示“优惠”的问题
  • 奢享币组合包从(1000 + 100)增加到(1000 + 120)

稳定性

  • 修复了一个可能导致专用服务器崩溃的罕见问题
  • 修复了多个可能导致客户端崩溃的问题

综合

  • 修复了锁门导致玩家无法完成新手入门任务的问题
  • 更新了区域选择界面上“外围区域（初级）”的描述
  • 修复了文本聊天窗口可能卡住无法关闭的错误

  • 修复了尝试使用输入法键盘时有时会发生的崩溃问题

    • 修复了使用输入法键盘快速输入时偶尔发生的崩溃问题

    • 开发者提示：第三方输入法软件可能仍存在一些问题，我们正在继续调查。在找到彻底解决的方法之前，遇到问题的用户可暂时使用Windows内置输入法。

  • 调整了输入法键盘的位置，使其更靠近文本聊天窗口
  • 玩家在地图加载过程中将不再看到长时间的黑屏
zhChs.bodyText: 物品经济 增加了外围区域中医疗柜和弹药箱的生成数量 增加了米达、赛博艾克米和阿拉克尼免费赞助包中的初始弹药数量 降低了UESC掷雷手掉落电磁脉冲手雷的频率 战斗 修复了玩家在封锁活动中有时瞬间死亡的问题 修复了当玩家同时拥有持续治疗效果和持续伤害效果时，持续播放护盾破碎屏幕效果的问题 增加了枪声和爆炸声的可听范围 武器 热成像瞄准镜 降低了热成像瞄准镜下目标的可视清晰度 调整了热成像高亮的最大距离： 手枪：40米（从55米下调） 步枪/轻机枪/冲锋枪：60米（从65米下调） 精密步枪：80米（从100米下调） 狙击步枪：100米（从180米下调） 奔袭 默认弹药容量增加5 疾行者 鲁克 修复了使用鲁克撤离时背包可能被删除的问题 修复了鲁克位置未显示在地图界面的问题 提升了使用鲁克撤离时获得的赛博艾克米声望 鲁克现在将获得与单人玩家相同的阵营声望加成 鲁克的WSTR霰弹枪现在会以受损状态生成 受损物品需要在疾行期间使用物质固定剂后才能携带撤离 UESC 小幅降低大多数UESC敌人的生命值和UESC首领的护盾生命值 开发者提示： 我们希望通过这项改动，减轻单人玩家和团队玩家在与UESC战斗时的资源负担。这里的目标是在不削弱UESC力量的前提下，让子弹和药物发挥更大的作用。我们清楚地看到玩家们的反馈，他们很喜欢UESC战斗带来的挑战，我们也没有改变这一方向的计划。 合约 默认目标导航点的显示距离从10米提升至20米 介绍纽卡洛里合约 修复了敌方团队可以从很远的地方接收到纽卡洛里合约配音和字幕的问题 介绍特莱克斯合约 降低了UESC指挥官遭遇战的难度 区域 前哨 暂时禁用了前哨损毁区入口的开关 开发者提示 ： 我们正在对损毁区入口进行一些调整，因此它将暂时禁用。由于它目前的情况，玩家能轻而易举地进入风轮。我们正在进行一些调整，在保持无声进入的玩法理念的同时，使其更符合风轮的风险回报平衡。在此期间，疾行者可以继续使用所有其他方式进入风轮（包括新增的无声方式）。 奖励通票和商店 修复了若不重启游戏，SILK余额就无法正确更新的问题 修复了组合包价格可能显示错误的问题 修复了全价装饰物品可能错误显示“优惠”的问题 奢享币组合包从(1000 + 100)增加到(1000 + 120) 稳定性 修复了一个可能导致专用服务器崩溃的罕见问题 修复了多个可能导致客户端崩溃的问题 综合 修复了锁门导致玩家无法完成新手入门任务的问题 更新了区域选择界面上“外围区域（初级）”的描述 修复了文本聊天窗口可能卡住无法关闭的错误 修复了尝试使用输入法键盘时有时会发生的崩溃问题 修复了使用输入法键盘快速输入时偶尔发生的崩溃问题 开发者提示 ：第三方输入法软件可能仍存在一些问题，我们正在继续调查。在找到彻底解决的方法之前，遇到问题的用户可暂时使用Windows内置输入法。 调整了输入法键盘的位置，使其更靠近文本聊天窗口 玩家在地图加载过程中将不再看到长时间的黑屏

enUs.title: Marathon OST is Streaming Now
enUs.subtitle: Two volumes, 42 tracks, all vibes: available now
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
The Marathon Original Soundtrack, Volume I and Volume II are now available for streaming on all major music platforms.

  • Marathon OST, Vol. I: https://soundtracks.lnk.to/marathonvol1
  • Marathon OST, Vol. 2: https://soundtracks.lnk.to/marathonvol2

Volume I takes the score from Marathon and reimagines it into a linear journey through the world of Tau Ceti, complete with bonus tracks, remixes, and the Son Lux and Poppy collaboration "In Death We’ve Just Begun". Volume II features the full 90+ minutes of in-game score you hear when playing Marathon.

Both volumes of the OST are cleared for use on Twitch—feel free to play them on stream!

Marathon, Vol. I: Somewhere in the Heavens (Original Game Soundtrack)

  • Code Race (2:02)
  • Rhythm of Writhing Constellations (2:25)
  • A New Home for Humanity (1:37)
  • Discontent (2:22)
  • Planetary Relocation Psychosis (1:51)
  • New Behavioral Norms (1:18)
  • Repetition Is Where We Find the Truth (1:54)
  • We Shouldn't Be Here (2:03)
  • For Those Who Did Not Wake (2:01)
  • Stars That Bleed (1:46)
  • Reintegration Protocol (1:17)
  • Focused Erasures and Sub-routine Resets (1:22)
  • Staring Blindly Through the Keyhole (1:05)
  • Poetry in Ones and Zeroes (0:55)
  • Cascadial Flow of Ethereal Wonder (1:50)
  • It Wasn't a Dream (2:09)
  • Purge (1:48)
  • System Designed to Die (1:45)
  • We Stole a Moon (2:01)
  • Contrition (1:14)
  • We're All Monsters (2:35)
  • Shimmering Cadence of Dancing Light (1:48)
  • In Death We've Just Begun (featuring Poppy and Son Lux) (3:24)
  • Code Race (Brendan Angelides Remix) (2:52)
  • Decontamination Protocol (2:17)
  • Conversation with the Infinite Self (1:32)
  • Only Numbers and Letters (1:30)
  • We Planned for Everything (0:58)
  • Deprecated Systems (1:46)

Marathon, Vol. II: They Are Waiting (Original Game Score)

  • Somewhere in the Heavens (6:58)
  • Feet of Fragile Flesh (2:10)
  • Burn the Boats (7:07)
  • Time Leach (9:22)
  • Mad is the Sword (1:50)
  • Escape Will Make Me God (9:43)
  • Neurosaboteur (10:41)
  • Code Race (9:34)
  • The Dream Is Not Over (2:06)
  • Where Is Death (6:55)
  • Tissue Unwinds (12:58)
  • Pro Corpse Idealist (9:36)
  • Assert (9:30)

When it comes to our partnership with composer Ryan Lott, Audio Director Chase Combs shares...

"Marathon's bold visual direction inspired the Audio team to explore non-traditional approaches to sound — ones that would subvert player expectations and blur the line between music and sound effects. This led to a chance meeting with Ryan during our search for a composer.

In August 2023, Ryan texted me a video shot from his phone of a track playing in his studio. That's when everything clicked. The song was an early sketch of what would become 'Code Race', setting in motion a series of events that shaped not only the score but the sonic identity of Marathon itself."

Want to go behind-the-scenes on the making of Marathon's music? Join Ryan Lott and Chase Combs for a look at the influences, instruments, and inspirations behind the tracks.

It’s been awesome seeing the community resonate so much with Marathon’s music, and we're excited to get the full soundtrack in your hands. Looking forward to hearing all the awesome remixes you put together 🤘

Volume II features the full 90+ minutes of in-game score you hear when playing Marathon. Both volumes of the OST are cleared for use on Twitch—feel free to play them on stream! Looking forward to hearing all the awesome remixes you put together 🤘

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》原声带现已在流媒体平台上线
zhChs.subtitle: 氛围拉满的两卷原声带，42首曲目：现已推出
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
《失落星船：马拉松》原声带第1卷和第2卷现已在各大主流音乐平台上线。

  • 《失落星船：马拉松》原声带第1卷：https://soundtracks.lnk.to/marathonvol1
  • 《失落星船：马拉松》原声带第2卷：https://soundtracks.lnk.to/marathonvol2

第1卷将《失落星船：马拉松》的配乐重新演绎，打造成一段穿越天仓五世界的线性旅程，内含额外曲目、混音版本，以及Son Lux与Poppy联合推出的“In Death We've Just Begun”。第2卷完整收录了你在游玩《失落星船：马拉松》时听到的游戏内配乐，时长超过90分钟。

  • Code Race (9:34)
  • The Dream Is Not Over (2:06)
  • Where Is Death (6:55)
  • Tissue Unwinds (12:58)
  • Pro Corpse Idealist (9:36)
  • Assert (9:30)

提到我们与作曲家Ryan Lott的合作，音频总监Chase Combs是这么说的…

“《失落星船：马拉松》大胆的视觉风格激励了音频团队去探索非传统的声音设计方向——希望能颠覆玩家预期、模糊音乐与音效的界限。我们在这一方向的指引下寻找作曲家时邂逅了Ryan。

2023年8月，Ryan给我发来一条短信，附上了一段他用手机在工作室拍摄的曲目演奏视频。在那一刻，一切豁然开朗。那首曲目是‘Code Race’的早期雏形，它引发了一连串事件，不仅塑造了整部配乐的面貌，更奠定了《失落星船：马拉松》的声音身份。”

想深入了解《失落星船：马拉松》音乐的幕后制作过程吗？与Ryan Lott和Chase Combs一起探寻这些曲目背后的影响、乐器以及灵感。

很高兴看到社区对《失落星船：马拉松》的音乐产生如此强烈的共鸣，能将完整的原声带正式交到各位手中真是太好了。期待着听到大家创作的各种精彩混音作品 🤘

第1卷将《失落星船：马拉松》的配乐重新演绎，打造成一段穿越天仓五世界的线性旅程，内含额外曲目、混音版本，以及Son Lux与Poppy联合推出的“In Death We've Just Begun”。第2卷完整收录了你在游玩《失落星船：马拉松》时听到的游戏内配乐，时长超过90分钟。 这两卷原声带均已获得在Twitch上使用的授权——请在Steam上随意播放！ enUs.title: Marathon Starter Tips
enUs.subtitle: Tips to help you find your footing on the surface!
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Welcome to Tau Ceti IV. Here are some tips to help you find your footing on the surface! 

FIRST STEPS 

  1. If you breeze through the tutorial, skip “Perimeter (Beginner)” and go right to “Perimeter” in zone select for more PvP encounters 
  2. Bring plenty of ammo and healing items. You won’t find a lot in-run. 
  3. You’ll unlock cosmetics for free in the Codex as you play. Scan its pages for any that catch your eye and prioritize those objectives! 

 

TRAVERSAL 

  1. Crouching makes heat dissipate faster
  2. Everything makes noise. Moving, looting, activating exfils, opening doors, using items, healing, swapping weapons, and - of course - shooting things. Stay quiet or you'll give away your location. 
  3. The world is littered with threats like tick nests and UESC claymores. The poison plants are especially deadly. 

 

COMBAT 

  1. The Equipment radial (hold 5 / Left D-Pad) lets you use grenades, ammo crates, and other deployables regardless of which one you have currently equipped
  2. Some weapons have Z / Left D-Pad functions like alternate scopes and gun shields
  3. Smoke fully drops UESC aggro

 

SURVIVAL 

  1. Smart Heal (4 / Down D-Pad) uses the most effective item for your situation. Manually use specific items by holding 4 / Down D-Pad and selecting from the radial. 
  2. Depleted Patch Kits and Shield Charges don’t exfil with you, even for credits. Use them liberally and drop them at the end of the run to make space for other loot! 
  3. Containers on the outskirts are more likely to have healing items 

 

EXFIL 

  1. Exfils spawn semi-randomly throughout a match, not at fixed locations on match start 
  2. Exfils take about a minute to warm up after activation. You don’t need to stand in them until the circle appears. 
  3. Guarded Exfils spawn a UESC patrol when activated 

 

AMMO 

  1. Keep an eye out for Ammo Crates, not just raw ammo 
  2. Conserve ammo by knifing low-level enemies 
  3. Containers on the outskirts are more likely to have ammo 

 

FACTIONS & CONTRACTS 

  1. Want more mobility? Extra vault space? Better purchasable weapons? Read through each faction’s upgrade tree to pick which one to level up first. 
  2. Some contracts are zone-specific. 
  3. Hover over contract objectives on the map screen for info on where to complete them 

 

ARMORY & BARTERING 

  1. Some items are bartered for loot, not sold for credits 
  2. Track needed bartering loot (R / R3) to mark drops in-game 
  3. Unstable Materials can always be traded in for ammo, Patch Kits, and Shield Charges 

 

BUILDCRAFTING 

  1. You can freely swap cores, implants, and weapon mods in and out of run 
  2. Inspect weapons out of run (V / Triangle / Y) to bring up a mod workbench 
  3. Only Standard (gray) tier cores can be used by every shell. All others require specific shells to use.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》新手攻略
zhChs.subtitle: 一些帮你快速上手的小贴士！
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
欢迎来到天仓五IV。以下是一些小贴士，帮你快速上手！ 

第一步 

  1. 如果你轻松完成了教程，可跳过“外围区域（初级）”区域，直接在区域选择界面选择“外围区域”，体验更多PvP战斗。 
  2. 携带充足的弹药和治疗物品。疾行期间这些物品不会很多。 
  3. 在游戏过程中，你会逐渐在百科中免费解锁装饰。浏览页面，找出你感兴趣的内容，并优先完成这些目标！ 

 

移动 

  1. 蹲伏可以更快地散热。
  2. 所有动作都会发出声响。移动、掠夺、激活撤离点、开门、使用物品、治疗、切换武器，当然还有射击。保持安静，否则你会暴露自己的位置。 
  3. 世界遍布各种威胁，例如虱虫巢穴和UESC阔刀地雷。毒草尤其致命。 

 

战斗 

  1. 无论你当前装备如何，你可以通过装备轮盘（按住5/左方向键）来使用手雷、弹药箱和其他部署物。
  2. 一些武器具有Z/左方向键的功能，例如切换瞄准镜和枪盾。
  3. 烟雾可完全解除UESC的敌对状态。

 

生存 

  1. 智能治疗（4/下方向键）会根据你当前的情况使用最有效的物品。按住4/方下向键，然后从轮盘中选择，即可手动使用特定物品。 
  2. 耗尽的修补包和护盾电池也不会随你撤离，即使换成信用点。尽量多加使用，并在疾行结束时将其丢弃，以便腾出空间存放其他战利品！ 
  3. 外围的容器更有可能包含治疗物品。 

 

撤离 

  1. 在整场比赛中撤离点会半随机出现，而不是在比赛开始时固定出现在某个位置。 
  2. 撤离点激活后大约需要一分钟的预热时间。你不需要站在其中直到圆圈出现。 
  3. 激活受到把守的撤离点时，会生成UESC巡逻兵。 

 

弹药 

  1. 留意弹药箱，而不仅仅是散装弹药。 
  2. 用刀攻击低等级敌人可以节省弹药。 
  3. 外围的容器更有可能包含弹药。 

 

阵营与合约 

  1. 想要更高的机动性？额外的保险库空间？购买更好的武器？阅读各阵营的升级树，选择优先升级哪个阵营。 
  2. 部分合约仅限特定区域。 
  3. 将鼠标悬停在地图界面的合约目标上，来查看在哪里完成目标。 

 

军械库与交换 

  1. 部分物品可用于交换战利品，而非出售换取信用点。 
  2. 追踪所需的交换战利品（R/R3），来标记游戏内的掉落物品。 
  3. 不稳定材料始终可用于兑换弹药、修补包和护盾电池。 

 

配装 

  1. 你可以在疾行内外自由切换核心、植入体和武器模组。 
  2. 在疾行外检查武器（V/三角/Y）即可打开模组工作台。 
  3. 只有标准（灰色）级核心才能用于所有外壳。其他核心需要特定的外壳才能使用。

enUs.title: Marathon is Live Now
enUs.subtitle: Your first death awaits
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Today is the day — we’re pressing the big “GO LIVE” button and putting Marathon fully in the hands of our community.

Marathon wouldn’t be the game it is today without the support and feedback of players all the way from alpha to Server Slam. Today marks the start of the next phase of our journey together, with even more passionate players joining the fold. Together we'll continue shaping Marathon into the best version it can be — and the team is ready to cook.

  • If you want to learn more about our plans for seasons and what’s coming in Season 1 and beyond, head to our Seasons in Marathon blog
  • If you have questions about launch, including how to claim Server Slam rewards, Twitch Drops for launch, and what’s new since the Slam, head to our FAQ 
  • And if you want to just get f*(&$# hyped, pop on the launch cinematic as you finish your download and prepare for Tau Ceti

Marathon is available now on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save.

You can keep up with the latest news by following us on Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. You can also follow the official Dev Team account on Twitter and Bluesky, or join the official community Discord to chat with the dev team and find a crew who’s just as passionate about drinkable food as you are!

And with that, the lost colony of Tau Ceti awaits your arrival. Good luck, careful who you trust, and remember — death is the first step.

enUs.title: Marathon Launches Tomorrow
enUs.subtitle: Celebrate with a new cinematic trailer and prepare to infil with our launch FAQ
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Prepare to shed your mortal form and embrace death as a cybernetic mercenary — your future on Tau Ceti awaits.

...if you escape, will they call you god?

Marathon's launch cinematic trailer features new music written by Ryan Lott & Son Lux, with vocals and lyrics by Poppy.

You can listen to "In Death We've Just Begun" on all major music streaming platforms. The full Marathon OST releases on March 6.

Marathon Launches on March 5

Marathon goes live worldwide tomorrow March 5 at 10 AM PT on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. We’re releasing Marathon globally at the same time — here's an image to help you find the release time in your region.

 

Marathon Launch FAQ

As we venture forward into day one of Marathon, here’s an FAQ to make sure you’re prepared:

When does Marathon launch?

Servers go live tomorrow March 5 at 10 AM PT. Check the regional launch times graphic above for your local start time!

Can I pre-load Marathon?

Yes. Pre-loading is available now on all platforms. Make sure to check your storefront of choice to ensure you're ready to go.

Do I need to download the game again if I played the Server Slam?

Yes. The launch build is different from the Server Slam build. Redownload Marathon from your platform’s store.

Which platforms can I play Marathon on?

You can play on Steam (PC), PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with full cross-play and cross-save. You will need an active online subscription on console to play.

What is different from the Server Slam?

Launch includes Marathon’s full progression, a new Runner shell, Outpost, and more:

  • Full faction and contract progression
    • All six factions, including Sekiguchi Genetics
  • All six launch Runner shells, including Thief
  • Three zones, including Outpost
    • Outpost will unlock the day after launch, giving the community time to gear up and unlock the zone at Runner Level 12
  • 28 weapons, plus mods, implants, cores, and more to craft your perfect builds
  • Earnable cosmetics, achievements, and storytelling through the Codex

Launch also includes fixes and updates informed by the Server Slam, including adjustments for PvP frequency on Perimeter (Beginner), with more changes to come. Read more about what we heard in the Server Slam here.

When do Outpost, Cryo Archive, and Ranked mode go live?

  • Outpost will be available the day after launch and will require Runner Level 12. This gives you a bit of time to gear up before you go headlong into one of our more treacherous zones.
  • Ranked mode will go live in the second half of March.
  • Cryo Archive will go live once you unlock the way into orbit in the second half of March.

I played the Server Slam. When will I get my rewards and do they expire?

Server Slam cosmetic rewards and Arrival Caches will roll out during the first day of launch. It will take some time for them to make it to everyone’s in-game Mailboxes, so if you don’t see them upon logging in hold tight — they should arrive soon.

If you earned Server Slam rewards, you must log in before Season 1 concludes to receive them. If you do not log in during Season 1, you will not receive your rewards.

Need a reminder of what tier of Arrival Cache loot you secured in the Slam? Head here.

When will I get my Twitch Drops from watching during the Server Slam?

If you tuned in to Marathon on Twitch and secured Twitch Drops, your rewards will be granted to your Bungie.net profile and delivered in-game at launch on March 5. The Twitch Sponsored Kit may take up to 48 hours to arrive in your in-game Mailbox and must be redeemed by March 31.

Will there be new Twitch Drops at launch? How do I earn them?

Yes! To earn Twitch Drops, make sure you...

  • Link your Bungie.net account to your Twitch account
  • Watch Marathon streams in the Twitch Directory with Drops enabled during the launch window
  • Claim each reward from your Twitch Inventory, then log in to Marathon to receive them

There are six rewards up for grabs during the launch weekend. Tune in from March 5 at 10 AM PT to March 9 at 10 AM PT to secure:

  • Weapon Sticker: Smol K.i.t.t.y. (subscribe or gift a subscription to a creator playing Marathon)
  • Twitch Sponsored Kit, aka Standard in-game loot (watch for 1 hour)
  • Profile Emblem: Pink Graffiti Bingus (watch for 1 hour)
  • Profile Background: Pink Graffiti Bingus (watch for 2 hours)
  • Weapon Sticker: Pink Graffiti Bingus (watch for 3 hours)
  • Weapon Skin (Style): White and Purple – Ballistic Sniper (watch for 4 hours)

You’ll also be able to earn a new set of Twitch Drops during the Tau Ceti Cup on March 14, an event pitting creator teams against each other to prove they’re the best Runners on Tau Ceti. More details to come!

How do I claim my platform's weapon charms? What are they?

Players on PlayStation, Steam, and Xbox will all receive weapon charms unique to their platform.

Steam players will automatically receive the Crowbar weapon charm upon logging in at launch.

PlayStation players receive the For Freedom, Battle Guitar, and Onryō weapon charms. Visit the PlayStation® Store when Marathon releases on March 5 to claim your rewards.

Xbox players will automatically receive the Emerald Clutch and Emerald Catch weapon charms upon logging in at launch.

Will there be login queues occur at launch? How do I check server status?

Launch days are busy! Brief queues or updates may occur, and we’ll communicate status if we need to perform maintenance via the BungieServerStatus Twitter and Bluesky accounts. We’ll also share updates in our community Discord.

How do seasons work? Where can I see what’s coming next?

Head over to our Seasons in Marathon post for a full rundown, including some teases for what’s cooking in Season 2.

How do I get help or report an issue?

  • Visit the Marathon Help Center for troubleshooting and known issues. If you run into reward delivery problems, account linking errors, or crashes, this is a good place to start.
  • You can also join the official Marathon Discord and follow the MarathonDevTeam Twitter for alerts or to ask for help.

Tomorrow is the day — we'll see you on Tau Ceti soon. 🐛
enUs.bodyText: Prepare to shed your mortal form and embrace death as a cybernetic mercenary — your future on Tau Ceti awaits. ...if you escape, will they call you god? Marathon's launch cinematic trailer features new music written by Ryan Lott & Son Lux, with vocals and lyrics by Poppy. You can listen to "In Death We've Just Begun" on all major music streaming platforms. The full Marathon OST releases on March 6. Marathon Launches on March 5 Marathon goes live worldwide tomorrow March 5 at 10 AM PT on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. We’re releasing Marathon globally at the same time — here's an image to help you find the release time in your region. Marathon Launch FAQ As we venture forward into day one of Marathon, here’s an FAQ to make sure you’re prepared: When does Marathon launch? Servers go live tomorrow March 5 at 10 AM PT . Check the regional launch times graphic above for your local start time! Can I pre-load Marathon? Yes. Pre-loading is available now on all platforms. Make sure to check your storefront of choice to ensure you're ready to go. Do I need to download the game again if I played the Server Slam? Yes. The launch build is different from the Server Slam build. Redownload Marathon from your platform’s store. Which platforms can I play Marathon on? You can play on Steam (PC), PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with full cross-play and cross-save. You will need an active online subscription on console to play. What is different from the Server Slam? Launch includes Marathon’s full progression, a new Runner shell, Outpost, and more: Full faction and contract progression All six factions, including Sekiguchi Genetics All six launch Runner shells, including Thief Three zones, including Outpost Outpost will unlock the day after launch, giving the community time to gear up and unlock the zone at Runner Level 12 28 weapons, plus mods, implants, cores, and more to craft your perfect builds Earnable cosmetics, achievements, and storytelling through the Codex Launch also includes fixes and updates informed by the Server Slam, including adjustments for PvP frequency on Perimeter (Beginner), with more changes to come. Read more about what we heard in the Server Slam here. When do Outpost, Cryo Archive, and Ranked mode go live? Outpost will be available the day after launch and will require Runner Level 12. This gives you a bit of time to gear up before you go headlong into one of our more treacherous zones. Ranked mode will go live in the second half of March. Cryo Archive will go live once you unlock the way into orbit in the second half of March. I played the Server Slam. When will I get my rewards and do they expire? Server Slam cosmetic rewards and Arrival Caches will roll out during the first day of launch. It will take some time for them to make it to everyone’s in-game Mailboxes, so if you don’t see them upon logging in hold tight — they should arrive soon. If you earned Server Slam rewards, you must log in before Season 1 concludes to receive them. If you do not log in during Season 1, you will not receive your rewards. Need a reminder of what tier of Arrival Cache loot you secured in the Slam? Head here . When will I get my Twitch Drops from watching during the Server Slam? If you tuned in to Marathon on Twitch and secured Twitch Drops , your rewards will be granted to your Bungie.net profile and delivered in-game at launch on March 5. The Twitch Sponsored Kit may take up to 48 hours to arrive in your in-game Mailbox and must be redeemed by March 31. Will there be new Twitch Drops at launch? How do I earn them? Yes! To earn Twitch Drops, make sure you... Link your Bungie.net account to your Twitch account Watch Marathon streams in the Twitch Directory with Drops enabled during the launch window Claim each reward from your Twitch Inventory, then log in to Marathon to receive them There are six rewards up for grabs during the launch weekend. Tune in from March 5 at 10 AM PT to March 9 at 10 AM PT to secure: Weapon Sticker: Smol K.i.t.t.y. (subscribe or gift a subscription to a creator playing Marathon) Twitch Sponsored Kit , aka Standard in-game loot (watch for 1 hour) Profile Emblem: Pink Graffiti Bingus (watch for 1 hour) Profile Background: Pink Graffiti Bingus (watch for 2 hours) Weapon Sticker: Pink Graffiti Bingus (watch for 3 hours) Weapon Skin (Style): White and Purple – Ballistic Sniper (watch for 4 hours) You’ll also be able to earn a new set of Twitch Drops during the Tau Ceti Cup on March 14, an event pitting creator teams against each other to prove they’re the best Runners on Tau Ceti. More details to come! How do I claim my platform's weapon charms? What are they? Players on PlayStation, Steam, and Xbox will all receive weapon charms unique to their platform. Steam players will automatically receive the Crowbar weapon charm upon logging in at launch. PlayStation players receive the For Freedom, Battle Guitar, and Onryō weapon charms. Visit the PlayStation® Store when Marathon releases on March 5 to claim your rewards. Xbox players will automatically receive the Emerald Clutch and Emerald Catch weapon charms upon logging in at launch. Will there be login queues occur at launch? How do I check server status? Launch days are busy! Brief queues or updates may occur, and we’ll communicate status if we need to perform maintenance via the BungieServerStatus Twitter and Bluesky accounts. We’ll also share updates in our community Discord . How do seasons work? Where can I see what’s coming next? Head over to our Seasons in Marathon post for a full rundown, including some teases for what’s cooking in Season 2. How do I get help or report an issue? Visit the Marathon Help Center for troubleshooting and known issues. If you run into reward delivery problems, account linking errors, or crashes, this is a good place to start. You can also join the official Marathon Discord and follow the MarathonDevTeam Twitter for alerts or to ask for help. Tomorrow is the day — we'll see you on Tau Ceti soon. 🐛

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》明日发布
zhChs.subtitle: 观看全新过场动画预告片，共庆此刻；查阅游戏发布常见问题解答，整装待发，即刻潜入战场。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
舍弃凡躯，以赛博雇佣兵之身直面死亡——你在天仓五的未来正待开启。

…若你成功逃脱，他们会称你为神吗？

《失落星船：马拉松》发布过场动画预告片，采用全新配乐，由Ryan Lott与Son Lux创作，Poppy填词及献唱。

你可以在各大主流音乐平台收听单曲《In Death We've Just Begun》。《失落星船：马拉松》完整原声带将于3月7日发布。

《失落星船：马拉松》将于3月6日发布

《失落星船：马拉松》将于北京时间3月6日凌晨2点全球上线，登陆Steam、PlayStation 5及Xbox Series X|S平台。我们将在全球同一时间发布游戏。查看下图，即可找到你所在地区的发布时间。

 

《失落星船：马拉松》发布常见问题解答

值此《失落星船：马拉松》启程之日，附上常见问题解答一份，助你整装待发：

《失落星船：马拉松》何时发布？

服务器将于北京时间3月6日凌晨2点开启。请查阅上方各地区发布时间图示，确认你所在地区的发布时间！

可以预载吗？

可以。目前所有平台均已开放预载。请前往你选择的商店确认已准备就绪。

我参与过服务器压力测试，还需要重新下载吗？

需要。正式版与服务器压力测试版不同。请在平台商店重新下载《失落星船：马拉松》。

我可以在哪些平台游玩《失落星船：马拉松》？

你可以通过Steam（PC）、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X|S游玩，支持跨平台游戏与跨平台保存。主机玩家需要有效的在线会员订阅才能游玩。

正式版与服务器压力测试版相比有哪些不同？

正式版包含完整进度、全新疾行者外壳、前哨等内容：

  • 完整的阵营与合约进度
    • 全部六大阵营，包括关口基因
  • 全部六款首发疾行者外壳，包括盗贼
  • 三个区域，包括前哨
    • 前哨将在正式发布第二天解锁，给予社区足够时间筹集装备，并在疾行者等级12时解锁该区域。
  • 28种武器，以及模组、植入物、核心等，助你打造理想配置。
  • 可获得的装饰、成就，以及通过百科呈现的剧情。

正式版还包含根据服务器压力测试反馈做出的修复与优化，包括对外围区域（初级）PVP频率的调整，更多改动即将推出。点击此处，了解更多关于我们在服务器压力测试期间收到的反馈。

前哨、低温档案室和排名模式何时上线？

  • 前哨将在游戏发布次日开放，需达到疾行者等级12级。这为你在全力挑战更为险恶的区域之前，预留了一点整备时间。
  • 排名模式将于3月下半月上线。
  • 低温档案室将于3月下半月，在您解锁前往轨道的通路后开放。

我参与过服务器压力测试。奖励何时发放？会过期吗？

服务器压力测试装饰奖励与欢迎储藏箱将在上线首日陆续发放。我们需要一些时间才能将奖励发放给所有人，所以如果你登录后没有在收件箱中看到奖励，请耐心等待——奖励应该很快就会到账。

如果你获得了服务器压力测试奖励，必须在第1赛季结束前登录游戏才能领取。若你在第1赛季期间未登录游戏，将无法领取奖励。

需要回顾你在压力测试中获得的欢迎储藏箱战利品等级吗？来这边。

我在服务器压力测试期间通过观看直播获得的Twitch掉落何时到账？

如果你在Twitch上观看了《失落星船：马拉松》的直播并获得了Twitch掉落，该奖励将发放到你的Bungie.net个人资料，并在3月6日正式上线时在游戏内发放。Twitch赞助包可能需要48小时才能送达你的游戏内邮箱，请务必在4月1日之前进行兑换。

游戏发布时还会有新的Twitch掉落吗？如何获得？

有的！为获得Twitch掉落，请确保完成以下步骤：

  • 将你的Bungie.net账号与你的Twitch账号绑定
  • 在游戏首发窗口期间，前往Twitch分类观看已开启掉落的《失落星船：马拉松》直播
  • 在Twitch物品栏领取每一项奖励，然后登录《失落星船：马拉松》查收

上线周末期间共有6款奖励可领取。请于北京时间3月6日凌晨2点至3月10日凌晨2点观看直播，即可获取：

  • 武器贴纸：乖猫模式（订阅或赠送订阅给游玩《失落星船：马拉松》的创作者）
  • Twitch赞助包，即游戏内标准战利品（观看1小时）
  • 档案徽标：粉色涂鸦Bingus（观看1小时）
  • 档案背景：粉色涂鸦Bingus（观看2小时）
  • 武器贴纸：粉色涂鸦Bingus（观看3小时）
  • 武器皮肤（风格）：白紫配色——弹道狙击步枪（观看4小时）

你还将有机会在3月15日举办的天仓五杯期间，赢取新一批Twitch掉落。届时创作者团队将同台竞技，争夺天仓五最强疾行者桂冠。更多详情，敬请期待！

如何领取各平台专属武器挂件？有哪些挂件？

PlayStation、Steam、Xbox玩家均可获得对应平台专属武器挂件。

Steam玩家上线登录后，将自动获得铁撬武器挂件。

PlayStation玩家可获得追求自由、战斗吉他、怨灵武器挂件。请于3月6日《失落星船：马拉松》发布后，前往PlayStation®Store领取你的奖励。

Xbox玩家上线登录后，将自动获得翡翠接合与翡翠锁扣武器挂件。

游戏发布当天会出现排队登录的情况吗？如何查看服务器状态？

发布当天会非常繁忙！可能出现短暂排队或更新。如需进行维护，我们将通过BungieServerStatus的Twitter与Bluesky账号同步服务器状态。同时，我们也会在官方Discord社区发布更新。

赛季是如何运作的？后续内容在哪里查看？

请前往我们的《失落星船：马拉松》赛季介绍专题文章，获取完整解读，其中还包含第2赛季的前瞻爆料。

如何获取帮助或反馈问题？

  • 访问《失落星船：马拉松》帮助中心，可查询疑难排解与已知问题。奖励发放异常、账号链接错误、游戏崩溃等问题，均可从此处开始解决。
  • 你也可以加入《失落星船：马拉松》官方Discord，并关注MarathonDevTeam的Twitter账号，获取通知或寻求帮助。

就是明天了——我们天仓五见。🐛

你还将有机会在3月15日举办的天仓五杯期间，赢取新一批Twitch掉落。届时创作者团队将同台竞技，争夺天仓五最强疾行者桂冠。更多详情，敬请期待！ 如何领取各平台专属武器挂件？有哪些挂件？ PlayStation、Steam、Xbox玩家均可获得对应平台专属武器挂件。 Steam玩家上线登录后，将自动获得铁撬武器挂件。 PlayStation玩家可获得追求自由、战斗吉他、怨灵武器挂件。请于3月6日《失落星船：马拉松》发布后，前往PlayStation®Store领取你的奖励。 Xbox玩家上线登录后，将自动获得翡翠接合与翡翠锁扣武器挂件。 游戏发布当天会出现排队登录的情况吗？如何查看服务器状态？ 发布当天会非常繁忙！可能出现短暂排队或更新。如需进行维护，我们将通过 BungieServerStatus的Twitter 与 Bluesky 账号同步服务器状态。同时，我们也会在 官方Discord社区 发布更新。 赛季是如何运作的？后续内容在哪里查看？ 请前往我们的 《失落星船：马拉松》赛季 介绍专题文章，获取完整解读，其中还包含第2赛季的前瞻爆料。 如何获取帮助或反馈问题？ 访问 《失落星船：马拉松》帮助中心 ，可查询疑难排解与已知问题。奖励发放异常、账号链接错误、游戏崩溃等问题，均可从此处开始解决。 你也可以加入 《失落星船：马拉松》官方Discord ，并关注 MarathonDevTeam 的Twitter账号，获取通知或寻求帮助。 就是明天了——我们天仓五见。🐛

enUs.title: Introducing Seasons in Marathon
enUs.subtitle: Learn how seasons work in Marathon plus what’s planned for Season 1 and beyond
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
With Marathon’s launch around the corner, we want to take a minute to share how we’re approaching seasons and our plans for Season 1 and beyond.

Seasons Overview

Seasons in Marathon last about three months, and each season will bring new content and features that change the way you master survival, grow your power floor, and progress throughout a season.

Marathon's living universe and gameplay will continue to evolve across seasons, fueled by your feedback and your impact on the world of Tau Ceti as you uncover what happened to the lost colony and on the Marathon ship.

Seasonal updates will introduce new gameplay, including gear, Runner shells, zones, events, and more, which will be free for all players to access or earn–no expansions or DLC required.

A Dangerous Climb

From your first steps on Perimeter to the end-game on Cryo Archive and Ranked mode, each season will challenge you to discover, adapt, and master new survival skills on your climb.

Everyone will start fresh each season with nothing to their name and the constant threat of death in a world more lethal and powerful than you are.

Over the course of the season, you’ll complete contracts and progress your faction upgrades, granting you access to stronger base stats and better wares in the Armory. It’s not just about what you loot, it’s about raising your power floor and the options available to you. Over time, recovering from a bad loss will get easier, and crafting your ideal build will be more accessible.

As you master survival and grow your available resource pool, you’ll be able to take on increasingly challenging contracts, zones, and enemy Runners. Climb the Ranked ladder, prep for high-stakes Cryo Archive runs, and secure the most lucrative loot and prestigious rewards of the season.

Then as the season comes to a close and the feeling of “$@%& it let’s ball” settles in, roll with your best loot knowing a fresh start for everyone, with more to discover and a new climb to master, is just around the corner.

Discover, Adapt, Survive

Each season of Marathon brings a clean slate for the whole community with progression resets. These resets include everyone’s gear, contract progression, faction progression, and player level.

You’ll keep your achievements and ways to express yourself. This includes cosmetics (earned and paid), titles, and other rewards you earn by playing and reaching milestones each season. Your Codex progression also carries over, as unburying the secrets of Tau Ceti takes time.

A few other things carry over too, such as your liaison contract progression; no need to unlock the factions every season.

Seasonal resets mean that the game stays dangerous, loot feels meaningful, and there’s always a good opportunity to get back into the game or bring a friend in without feeling behind the curve. It’s a way to say goodbye to the old, welcome the new, and kickoff a journey from zero-to-hero with new ways to play, content to master, and things to discover.

What’s in Season 1?

Season 1: DEATH IS THE FIRST STEP (aka FIRST STEP) is the start of a new gold rush on Tau Ceti. It's the beginning of a proxy war between rival factions competing for power and answers to what happened to the 30,000 lost souls of the New Cascadia Colony. And as a Runner, you’re at the forefront of the expeditions.

When you step foot on Tau Ceti IV, you’ll find a hostile world that wishes you dead. As you and other Runners begin to explore the surface, you’ll soon discover a way aboard the derelict UESC Marathon ship hanging above.

Once the community unlocks the way into orbit, the fourth zone, Cryo Archive, will become available. Prepare your mind and shell to take on this end-game zone on the Marathon ship, where you’ll solve security puzzles, unseal frozen vaults, and come face-to-face with an entity even the UESC fears.

During the second half of March, Ranked mode will also unlock. Put your survival skills to the test and exfil with valuable loot to climb the Ranked ladder and earn exclusive rewards each season. We’ll share more details about Ranked mode when we get closer to it’s launch.

FIRST STEP also brings events, quality-of-life improvements, balance tuning, new implants, a new weapon, and other surprises.

This is in addition to the full suite of launch content, which includes:

  • Complete faction and contract progression
    • All six factions, including Sekiguchi Genetics
  • All six launch Runner shells, including Thief
  • Three zones, including Outpost
    • Outpost will unlock the day after launch, giving the community time to gear up and unlock the zone at Runner Level 12
  • 28 weapons, plus mods, implants, cores, and more to craft your perfect builds
  • Earnable cosmetics, achievements, and storytelling through the Codex

Looking Ahead: Season 2 and Beyond

You’ll start to see the impact of your presence on Tau Ceti IV in Season 2: NIGHTFALL. Your activities on the lost colony have not gone unnoticed, and the UESC are stepping up their security measures and responding in force to your criminal activities.

Each season of Marathon will have a different theme and a unique combination of new features, content, and stories that continue to evolve the world and gameplay. We’ll also be tuning all of our loot and progression systems, creating space for new metas and ways to play to emerge.

Seasonal updates will include a unique set of new content, which are the things you do, explore, and collect on Tau Ceti. This can include any combination of: weapons, mods, cores, implants, backpacks, Runner shells, zones, PvE combatants, faction upgrades, contracts, and new ways to play existing zones.

For example, NIGHTFALL will bring a nighttime version of Dire Marsh, where you’ll fight to survive when the lights go out, UESC reinforcements flood in, and the a~~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"<>?~~~. Season 2 will also bring our next Runner shell along with new weapons, mods, cores, contracts, and more.

We’re also working on brand new systems that will change the way you play, plan, and progress throughout a season. For example, NIGHTFALL will introduce the Cradle, a new system designed to give you more autonomy over your Runner shell’s statistical strengths and weaknesses.

As we build upon each season, Marathon will continue to grow and evolve. The game and world today and a year from now should feel meaningfully different as we add new features and go on the journey of discovering what happened to the colonists of Tau Ceti... and what happens when you dig up secrets that are better left buried.

The Start of a Journey Together

Finally, we want to say thank you to everyone who’s taken the time to play and share your thoughts and excitement for Marathon. Community feedback throughout the last year has helped us shape Marathon into something better, and we’re excited to continue building alongside you all. Head here for a recap of what we heard during the Server Slam.

We'll see you on Tau Ceti on March 5 as we continue to expand this delightfully weird, pulse-racing, and cosmically horrific game together.

zhChs.title: 《失落星船：马拉松》赛季介绍
zhChs.subtitle: 了解《失落星船：马拉松》的赛季机制，以及第1赛季及后续计划
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
《失落星船：马拉松》上线在即，我们想借此机会分享赛季玩法的设计思路，以及第1赛季及后续计划。

赛季概览

《失落星船：马拉松》的赛季大约持续三个月，每一赛季都会带来全新内容和功能，助你进一步掌握生存技巧、提升能量底线和推动赛季进度。

《失落星船：马拉松》鲜活生动的宇宙与玩法将随着各个赛季不断进化，你的每一次反馈和在天仓五世界的影响，都将推动你揭开失落殖民地的真相，探索马拉松号飞船上的秘密。

赛季更新会带来新玩法，包括装备、疾行者外壳、区域、活动以及更多内容，玩家均可免费体验或获取——无需购买扩展内容或DLC。

攀登天梯，危险相伴

从你踏入外围区域的第一步，到低温档案室与排名模式的终局挑战，每个赛季都会推动你在攀登天梯过程中不断探索、适应并掌握前所未有的生存技巧。

每个赛季，所有玩家都会从零开始，在一个更致命、更强大的世界中生存，每一步都充满死亡威胁。

赛季期间，你需要完成合约、推进阵营升级，从而获得更强的基础属性和更优质的军械库商品。关键不仅在于战利品，更在于提升你的能量底线，拓展可能的选择。随着赛季进行，失败的挫折会更容易克服，理想配置也会更容易打造。

随着生存能力的提升和资源池的累积，你将能够应对更具挑战性的合约、区域和敌对疾行者。攀登排名天梯，备战高风险低温档案室疾行，赢取赛季中最丰厚的战利品和荣耀奖励。

当赛季接近尾声，“$@%&的，就是干”的情绪弥漫时，带上你的最佳战利品尽情出击吧。很快，全员都将迎来全新起点，更多发现与新的攀登挑战就在眼前。

探索、适应、生存

《失落星船：马拉松》的每个赛季都会重置进度，为整个社区带来全新的起点。重置内容包括所有玩家的装备、合约进度、阵营进度和玩家等级。

所有已获得的成就和自我表达的内容都将继续保留。这些内容包括装饰（可赚取或购买）、称号、以及其他可通过游玩和达成里程碑获得的赛季奖励。你的百科进度也会保留，因为揭开天仓五的秘密并非一蹴而就。

还有其他将会继承的内容，例如你联络人合约进度——无需在每个赛季重新解锁阵营。

赛季重置确保游戏始终充满挑战性，战利品也更具意义，同时给玩家提供了在不落下进度的前提下随时回归游戏或邀请好友加入的机会。这是一种告别过去、迎接新篇章的方式，让你从零开始踏上英雄之旅，体验全新玩法、掌握新内容、探索未知世界。

第1赛季内容

第1赛季：死亡是第一步（即第一步）是天仓五新一轮资源争夺战的开端。这标志着对抗阵营之间的代理战争正式开启，他们为掌控权力及寻找新卡斯卡迪亚殖民地3万陨落者的真相展开角力。作为疾行者，你将站在远征行动的最前线。

当你踏上天仓五IV，你会发现这是一个充满敌意、希望夺取你生命的世界。当你和其他疾行者开始探索地表，很快就会发现通往那艘高悬在轨道上的废弃UESC马拉松号飞船的方法。

一旦社区解锁进入轨道的通道，第四区域——低温档案室将会开放。调整你的意识与外壳，准备迎战马拉松号上的终局区域，你将破解安全谜题、解封冰冻保险库，并直面连UESC都忌惮的存在。

三月下半月，排名模式也将解锁。展示你的生存技能，携带珍贵战利品撤离，攀登排名天梯，赢取每赛季专属奖励。临近排名模式发布日期时，我们将分享更多细节。

第一步还将推出活动、游戏体验优化、平衡性调整、新植入物、一件新武器以及其他惊喜。

此外，还将推出完整的正式版发布内容，包括：

  • 完整的阵营与合约进度
    • 全部六大阵营，包括关口基因
  • 全部六款首发疾行者外壳，包括盗贼
  • 三个区域，包括前哨
    • 前哨将在正式发布第二天解锁，给予社区足够时间筹集装备，并在疾行者等级12时解锁该区域。
  • 28种武器，以及模组、植入物、核心等，助你打造理想配置。
  • 可获得的装饰、成就，以及通过百科呈现的剧情。

展望未来：第2赛季及未来内容

在第二赛季NIGHTFALL中，你会开始感受到自己在天仓五IV的行动所带来的影响。你在失落殖民地的行动已引来关注，UESC正加强安全措施，并针对你的非法行为进行强力反制。

《失落星船：马拉松》的每个赛季主题各异，并结合新功能、内容和剧情，持续推进世界与玩法的发展。我们还将调整所有战利品与进度系统，为新的玩法和策略留下发展空间。

赛季更新将带来独特的新内容，涵盖你在天仓五进行的活动、探索和收集。可能包含各种组合：武器、模组、核心、植入物、背包、疾行者外壳、区域、PvE战斗人员、阵营升级、合约，以及现有区域的新玩法。

例如，NIGHTFALL将推出夜间版本的恐怖沼泽，你必须为生存而战，应对没有光线的环境、蜂拥而至的UESC增援，以及a~~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"<>?~~~。第2赛季还将推出下一款疾行者外壳，同时带来新武器、模组、核心、合约及更多内容。

同时，我们还在开发全新系统，彻底改变你在整个赛季中的玩法、规划和进度推进。例如，NIGHTFALL将引入摇篮系统，让你更自由地掌控疾行者外壳的属性强弱。

每个赛季的展开都将推动《失落星船：马拉松》的持续成长与进化。随着我们不断加入新功能、探索天仓五殖民者的命运…以及挖掘那些本该埋葬的秘密，一年后的游戏和世界将与今天的体验有显著不同。

共同旅程的起点

最后，我们要感谢每一位投入时间游玩《失落星船：马拉松》并分享感受和热情的玩家。社区在过去一年中的反馈将帮助我们进一步打磨《失落星船：马拉松》，我们期待继续与大家共同成长。点击此处回顾我们在服务器压力测试期间听到的反馈。

3月6日，天仓五不见不散，让我们一同继续探索这款奇异、刺激、充满太空恐怖氛围的游戏。

随着生存能力的提升和资源池的累积，你将能够应对更具挑战性的合约、区域和敌对疾行者。攀登排名天梯，备战高风险低温档案室疾行，赢取赛季中最丰厚的战利品和荣耀奖励。 当赛季接近尾声，“$@%&的，就是干”的情绪弥漫时，带上你的最佳战利品尽情出击吧。很快，全员都将迎来全新起点，更多发现与新的攀登挑战就在眼前。 探索、适应、生存 《失落星船：马拉松》的每个赛季都会重置进度，为整个社区带来全新的起点。重置内容包括所有玩家的装备、合约进度、阵营进度和玩家等级。 所有已获得的成就和自我表达的内容都将继续保留。这些内容包括装饰（可赚取或购买）、称号、以及其他可通过游玩和达成里程碑获得的赛季奖励。你的百科进度也会保留，因为揭开天仓五的秘密并非一蹴而就。 还有其他将会继承的内容，例如你联络人合约进度——无需在每个赛季重新解锁阵营。 赛季重置确保游戏始终充满挑战性，战利品也更具意义，同时给玩家提供了在不落下进度的前提下随时回归游戏或邀请好友加入的机会。这是一种告别过去、迎接新篇章的方式，让你从零开始踏上英雄之旅，体验全新玩法、掌握新内容、探索未知世界。 第1赛季内容 第1赛季： 死亡是第一步 （即 第一步 ）是天仓五新一轮资源争夺战的开端。这标志着对抗阵营之间的代理战争正式开启，他们为掌控权力及寻找新卡斯卡迪亚殖民地3万陨落者的真相展开角力。作为疾行者，你将站在远征行动的最前线。 当你踏上天仓五IV，你会发现这是一个充满敌意、希望夺取你生命的世界。当你和其他疾行者开始探索地表，很快就会发现通往那艘高悬在轨道上的废弃UESC马拉松号飞船的方法。 一旦社区解锁进入轨道的通道，第四区域—— 低温档案室 将会开放。调整你的意识与外壳，准备迎战马拉松号上的终局区域，你将破解安全谜题、解封冰冻保险库，并直面连UESC都忌惮的存在。 三月下半月， 排名模式 也将解锁。展示你的生存技能，携带珍贵战利品撤离，攀登排名天梯，赢取每赛季专属奖励。临近排名模式发布日期时，我们将分享更多细节。 第一步 还将推出活动、游戏体验优化、平衡性调整、新植入物、一件新武器以及其他惊喜。 此外，还将推出完整的 正式版发布内容 ，包括： 完整的阵营与合约进度 全部六大阵营，包括关口基因 全部六款首发疾行者外壳，包括盗贼 三个区域，包括前哨 前哨将在正式发布第二天解锁，给予社区足够时间筹集装备，并在疾行者等级12时解锁该区域。 28种武器，以及模组、植入物、核心等，助你打造理想配置。 可获得的装饰、成就，以及通过百科呈现的剧情。 展望未来：第2赛季及未来内容 在第二赛季 NIGHTFALL 中，你会开始感受到自己在天仓五IV的行动所带来的影响。你在失落殖民地的行动已引来关注，UESC正加强安全措施，并针对你的非法行为进行强力反制。 《失落星船：马拉松》的每个赛季主题各异，并结合新功能、内容和剧情，持续推进世界与玩法的发展。我们还将调整所有战利品与进度系统，为新的玩法和策略留下发展空间。 赛季更新将带来独特的 新内容 ，涵盖你在天仓五进行的活动、探索和收集。可能包含各种组合：武器、模组、核心、植入物、背包、疾行者外壳、区域、PvE战斗人员、阵营升级、合约，以及现有区域的新玩法。 例如， NIGHTFALL 将推出夜间版本的恐怖沼泽，你必须为生存而战，应对没有光线的环境、蜂拥而至的UESC增援，以及a~~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"<>?~~~。第2赛季还将推出下一款疾行者外壳，同时带来新武器、模组、核心、合约及更多内容。 同时，我们还在开发 全新系统 ，彻底改变你在整个赛季中的玩法、规划和进度推进。例如， NIGHTFALL 将引入摇篮系统，让你更自由地掌控疾行者外壳的属性强弱。 每个赛季的展开都将推动《失落星船：马拉松》的持续成长与进化。随着我们不断加入新功能、探索天仓五殖民者的命运…以及挖掘那些本该埋葬的秘密，一年后的游戏和世界将与今天的体验有显著不同。 共同旅程的起点 最后，我们要感谢每一位投入时间游玩《失落星船：马拉松》并分享感受和热情的玩家。社区在过去一年中的反馈将帮助我们进一步打磨《失落星船：马拉松》，我们期待继续与大家共同成长。点击 此处 回顾我们在服务器压力测试期间听到的反馈。 3月6日，天仓五不见不散，让我们一同继续探索这款奇异、刺激、充满太空恐怖氛围的游戏。

enUs.title: Thanks for playing in the Server Slam!
enUs.subtitle: Check out fun stats from the Slam and get ready for the real deal on March 5.
enUs.author: Marathon Dev Team
enUs.bodyHtml:
Thank you to everyone who came out to play in the Server Slam this weekend and helped stress test the servers for launch. We appreciate all your feedback and bug reports, and we’ll share some of our key learnings from the Slam soon.

In the meantime, here’s a look at some community stats from the preview weekend. Drop by our socials if you’d like to see more.

 

Server Slam Rewards on Launch Day

When Marathon launches on March 5, we’ll rollout the rewards you secured during the Server Slam . It will take some time for them to make it to everyone’s in-game  Mailboxes, so if you don’t see them upon logging in hold tight—they should arrive soon.

This includes your cosmetic rewards (Complex Study emblem and Beta.exe background) as well as your Arrival Cache of loot based on your progression during the Server Slam. Head here if you’d like a reminder of what’s in each tier of Arrival Caches.

Note that your Server Slam rewards will expire if you don’t login to claim them before the end of Season 1. So if you played during the Server Slam, but do not log into Marathon before Season 1 ends, you won't receive your rewards.

If you tuned in to Marathon on Twitch and secured Twitch Drops, your rewards will be granted to your Bungie.net profile and delivered in-game* at launch on March 5. The Twitch Sponsored Kit may take up to 48 hours to arrive in your in-game Mailbox and must be redeemed by March 31.

 
Prepare for March 5

Thank you again for participating in the Server Slam. Whether you tried to go for safe runs or were out for blood as Arachne acolytes, we hope your first hours in Marathon were as fun as they were lethal. 

The Server Slam was only a slice of Marathon’s gameplay and progression. Launch will bring the full faction and contract progression, all six launch Runner shells (including Thief), and three zones (including Outpost). The end-game zone, Cryo Archive, on the UESC Marathon ship and Ranked mode are also coming during Season 1, along with other surprises. 

Marathon launches on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Serries X|S, on March 5. 

 

*Internet connection and online multiplayer subscription may be required.

zhChs.title: 感谢参与服务器压力测试
zhChs.subtitle: 查看压力测试的有趣统计数据，准备迎接3月6日游戏正式上线。
zhChs.author: Marathon Dev Team
zhChs.bodyHtml:
感谢这个周末帮助我们在游戏上线前进行服务器压力测试的所有玩家。谢谢你们提供反馈与错误报告，我们很快就会分享来自本次测试的一些重要收获。

与此同时，以下是本次预览周末的一些社区数据统计。欢迎到访我们的社交媒体来了解更多信息。

 

 

 

 

 

 

发布日的服务器压力测试奖励

当《失落星船：马拉松》于3月6日上线后，我们就会开始发放你在服务器压力测试期间获得的奖励。我们需要一些时间才能将奖励发放给所有人，所以如果你登录后没有在收件箱中看到奖励，请耐心等待——奖励应该很快就会到账。

它们包括你的装饰奖励（综合设施徽标和测试版.exe背景），以及基于你在服务器压力测试期间的进度分发的欢迎储藏箱。你可以来这里回顾各个阶级的欢迎储藏箱的具体内容。

请注意，如果你未在第1赛季结束前登录领取，你的服务器压力测试奖励就会过期。因此，如果你参与了服务器压力测试，但未在第1赛季结束前登录《失落星船：马拉松》，你就无法收到奖励。

如果你在Twitch上观看了《失落星船：马拉松》的直播并获得了Twitch掉落，该奖励将发放到你的Bungie.net个人资料，并在3月6日正式上线时在游戏内*发放。Twitch赞助包可能需要48小时才能送达你的游戏内邮箱，请务必在4月1日之前进行兑换。

 
准备迎接3月6日

再次感谢大家参与服务器压力测试。无论你当时是致力于安全撤离，还是以阿拉克尼仆从的身份嗜血厮杀，我们都希望你在《失落星船：马拉松》中度过的头几个小时既充满乐趣，又惊险刺激。 

服务器压力测试仅开放了《失落星船：马拉松》的部分玩法与进度系统。游戏正式上线后将带来完整的阵营与合约进度、全部六款首发疾行者外壳（包括盗贼），以及三个区域（包括前哨）。终局区域，也就是位于UESC马拉松号飞船上的低温档案室，以及排名模式也将在第1赛季内上线，届时还有更多惊喜等你发现。 

《失落星船：马拉松》将于3月6日在Steam、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X|S平台上推出。 

 

*可能需要互联网连接及在线多人游戏订阅。
